202110080900|Book of Wishes
October 8, 2021 Friday 9:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
One day at the Magic Bakery...
Ivy: Here you go, Little Red. It is... Ivy: The Book of Wishes.
LRRH: It is so cute! With this I can keep track of people's wishes!
Vivi: If that's all you wanted couldn't you use any notebook?
LRRH: Yes, but a gift makes it a special treasure. Thank you, Ivy! Little Red Riding Hood thanks Ivy.
Ivy: Actually it is more than just a notebook. Try opening it.
LRRH: Wow, it already has people's wishes in it! ** (Book shows Red's wish) ** // Red's overall wish: A culture of fulfilling wishes // Resolution 1: A simple story book // Resolution 2: Routine with Quest
Ivy: Every page is a screen connected to the backend. ** (Book shows Ivy's wish) ** // Ivy's overall wish: Populate Book of Knowledge // Ivy's Resolution: Have it used as a reference. That is so overkill.
LRRH: Vivi, what is your wish?
Vivi: I won't bother myself with that. Besides, wasn't there a saying that if you tell others your wish, then it won't come true?
LRRH: The saying is there, but I tell my wish and people help me fulfill it. So if you tell me yours I will help you make it true.
Vivi: If you tell others your wish, you also let others sabotage it. Right, Vivi had a very game-of-throne-y life. But it's okay. There is a lot of time for you to decide what you want to do from now on.
LRRH: When Kisaragi came she also had no clue. She stayed and everything works out fine. It has been almost a year now.
Vivi: So has she found her wish?
Kisaragi: My wish? I wish to stay here and keep cooking for everyone. Zero ambition.
LRRH: If your wish is simple, you will be happy every day.
Kisaragi: Since everyone seems to be making a book, maybe I should make one too. That'd be awesome!
LRRH: Vivi, that reminds me, since I know you and you are talking to me in this book, you have earned some credits. I should show you on the board too.
Vivi: I don't get the enthusiasm about the quests. It's not like there's any real reward for doing it…
LRRH: Vivi you have 3 points. The graph shows you at the bottom. But this is not a competition. Everyone starts at the bottom. **Disturbed** Who is Ledia? She is a paladin that comes sometimes. She doesn't live here... I don't think you have ever met her. ** Sulks and walks out of the room **
LRRH: Ivy, what was that about? Vivi was a queen. She is not used to seeing herself at the bottom. She wants to beat Ledia. In scores, I meant. Should we not show the scores of new people? There is no problem with the leaderboard. It is functioning as designed. ** (Just as planned) **

202110102037|CH24 Plan
October 10, 2021 Sunday 8:37 PM
Magic Bakery
⭐
The organization for CH 24 seems too overwhelming, how can it be simplified?
Tanya: The subtitle “100 ways to do good and feel good about it” doesn't match the contents listed in the TOC. What do you really want to include in this book?
Natalie: I want to make a book about doing good. It is good for others and a great source of happiness. It gives people purpose and energy. I want to share this to those who have not discovered this hobby in life, and help those who are already doing it to keep doing it without getting burned out.
Tanya: I think the purpose of your book is to motivate in two stages: 1. To persuade the reader from doing nothing to doing good; and 2. To reward someone who is doing good with tips to keep going. Are you okay with the book having only these two parts instead of the current five parts? Yes
Tanya: You could still mention the definition and concepts in passing, but they don't need their own sections since they are not the focus. The focus of the first part is on someone who has not been doing good or doesn't know that they have been doing good. I wonder how to actually go about persuading someone who is doing nothing to do good. To me it is like a game. But you are self-motivated. The question is how would someone become self-motivated?
Sasha: How about we bring the game to them? If you give yourself a pat in the back, then we will give them a pat in the back when they do something good. That could get them started. Then once they get used to it, they would start patting themselves. "
Natalie: Bring the game to them. I think that is a great idea, Sasha. “Challenge yourself to become a better self.” New organization: Part 1: From doing nothing to doing good. Part 2: From doing good to doing better."
Sasha: Natalie, I just read what P4 talked about regarding her music book. She said instead of aiming to write about what she wants others to know, she will write what she finds useful for herself. So I was wonder, if you write this book, does it help you?
Natalie: Not really, it is second nature. And it is not like I would carry a book around when I try to do something. That seems like a red flag. If what you are trying to write is not useful for you, it might end up being not useful to anyone. Hmm… I see.
Evelyn: I think this book or the topic is useful for me. A little bit earlier, I was trying to write a manual on when to and how to response to online discussions. But that content doesn't really fit with what I want to write about in my book, which is happiness. I think the manual content would fit really well here. Umm. Then aren't you hijacking Natalie's project? I don't mind, the more the merrier. We get MORE points for having more participants! And, rules of engagement is a paladin concept.
Tanya: If you are accepting topics, I would want to read an actual paladin manual. Then you could keep your tone and talk about the subject like a recruiter.
Natalie: Book of Paladins! I think that topic is more intuitive to me.
Tanya: What is your perspective on being a paladin?
Natalie: Paladins are both at the frontline and last line of defending peace. We de-escalate and end physical confrontations. We stop fights. We watch for and eliminate physical threats. We encourage everyone to be aware of threats because an alert citizenry keeps everyone safe. Are you the police? What is the difference? Paladins do not exist to “enforce the law”. We only exist for mutual protection. Everyone can be a paladin and get paladin certificates and do paladin quests. Again, we encourage everyone to train and get paladin skills. Even if you don't do paladin quests, your understanding what we do makes paladin quests easier.
Sasha: I don't really like doing physical things though.
Natalie: But you would be interested in solving crimes yes? Ooo murder mysteries!!!
Evelyn: We are kids! 😖 I didn't say anything. She already knew.
Sasha: Evelyn is more like the police than Natalie. That is the kind of protection I don't need. I am sorry. I don't mean it in a bad way. I appreciate your trying to look after me, but I am strong and I can decide for myself what I don't like.
Natalie: Independence is strong with this one. That is a great trait to be a paladin. Sasha the detective! I like the sound of that!
Natalie: And Evelyn too. Evelyn is always cautious and has a keen eye to keep everyone safe. It is better to offer help and be rejected than to not offer at all to avoid rejections. Evelyn has her priorities right. Being so reliable and consistent are also highly sought traits to be paladins. 😊 Being able to see relevant skills in people is a good trait as a recruiter.
Natalie: Yes, the ever observant Tanya. We can count on Tanya to notice the smallest clue at a crime scene. Hold on, who makes the better detective? Tanya or I? Both, of course. Paladins work together and value healthy rivalry. Good competition brings the best work out of everyone. I hope something happens so we have a mystery to solve. Just saying.

202111070900|Black's Wish
November 7, 2021 Sunday 9:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Evelyn, today I want to check on people's wishes. I think we have collected enough wishes so I want to focus on fulfilling them. Black has been talking about wanting to buy a desk. But I don't see an order. Let's see what's going on. Okay.
Black: Oh, the desk. I haven't made up my mind because I planned to put a keyboard on a shorter desk under a desk. I think that it would help my posture, but I am not sure that I could type without looking at the keyboard.
Red: That seems like a very easy test. Let's find something to cover your hands over the keyboard… There. Now no one can see your hands, or the keyboard. Try typing something.
Black: It looks a bit intimidating. But apparently I can still type. I am not sure about the punctuations though. I don't know where the punctuation marks are… And there is not keypad, so typing number is also a problem.
Evelyn: But is it more comfortable this way?
Black: Yes it is. And less distracting because I don't see my moving fingers.
Evelyn: Do you feel that you can memorize the other keys?
Black: Possibly. I just realized that I can type the question mark without thinking where it is. I still can't type numbers accurately.
Red: I have an idea. How about you take a picture of the keyboard and put it on top of the top table. Then if you really forget where a key is you can just see that.
Black: That's a good idea. Or I could get a full-sized keyboard with a keypad. Let try first. Hmm… Looking at a photo isn't working all that well. I need to type many numbers. Being able to type numbers is important.
Red: Full size keyboard then.
Black: I really don't like full size keyboard though. It makes the mouse really far from the keyboard. Why didn't they make a keypad on the left side?
Evelyn: You can get a separate keypad.
Red: I got another idea. You can add texture to the number keys. If you can feel where 3 and 8 are, the other number keys are just two spaces from them.
Black: That's interesting. Let me put some tapes on… That is working quite well. Give me some random number to try. 1925.8 3706.3 5287.6
Black: It is faster than without tape, but still very slow. I might keep another keyboard on top where I can see just in case. But if I keep using that all the time it would be waste to get the shorter desk.
Evelyn: I think it is worth trying though. Even if you don't need the desk, I am sure it is useful in other ways.
Black: We already have other desks like that that no one uses. This one that I want to get is just shorter so that it could fit under the desk.
Red: Then are we forgetting something? The desk has wheels! If you really need to see your hands, you could just pull out the keyboard or the desk more.
Black: That's true. But doing that would add about a foot between me and the screen.
Evelyn: I think it is still worth trying.
Black: And I still can't decide…
Red: Black is that kind of person. He has problem deciding to spend money on himself. So if it were free that you would have tried? Yes.
V: There is a free table. This one. Next to the piano. It is pretty short.
Black: I forgot about this. It is the right height, but it has this ledge at the edge. It would get into the way of typing. And it has no wheels. If I try pulling it, it will probably make a horrible noise.
V: You could pad it up.
Black: I also have the alternative of just raising my seat. Then I don't need to buy any desk or keyboard.
V: Isn't it frustrating talking to this guy? His indecision is borderline pathological. 😅
Evelyn: What should we do, Red?
Red: Let's move on to the next person. At least we now know what's going on.
Evelyn: I hope you find a way that is comfortable. You deserve to be comfortable. Sorry to bother. I will try that short desk. Please do! 😃
202111140900|Free'ku
November 14, 2021 Sunday 9:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
The Wishpedition Team checks how Black is doing. So I tried to short desk. I really couldn't type correctly without seeing my keyboard. I ended up attaching a shorter keyboard and things seem fine. I learned that I am most comfortable sitting with my body touching the edge of the desk and have my elbows resting on the desk. So my wish is fulfilled. We don't need to buy a new desk. Thank you for trying. Red, whose wish is next? Let's go through the 2021 New Year's resolution and see who needs help. Here they are.
2021 New Year's Resolutions
LRRH: A culture of fulling wishes | A simple story book | A routine with quest
James: Free'ku
Natalie: Good Deeds tracking and rubric
P4: To end the pandemic
Casey: To build her own house
Evelyn: To have lasting friends
Sasha: To beat Tanya in a game
Zoey: To be popular
Tanya: To Grow, acknowledgement of growth
3B: Draw everyone's story
Ivy: Populate the book of knowledge and have it used as a reference
Black: Study for Japanese N3 test
Evelyn: I don't understand some of them. But mine is fulfilled. It is not something that others need to help me fulfill.
LRRH: Two of mine are fulfilled. Let's check on James. He wants to write Free'ku. What is a Free'ku? Let's ask the master.
James: A free'ku is a haiku about freedom. A haiku is a poem that follows a 5 syllables, 7 syllables and 5 syllables format.
Evelyn: I've never written a poem before, is it difficult?
James: Free'ku means freedom // It is as hard as you want // Let's give it a try!
Evelyn: I am Evelyn // Giving Free'ku my first try // Thank you for teaching
James: Congrats Evelyn! // Here presents your free'ku badge. // May your rhymes fly free!
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEh7_FUHCr8gqtPIugLAZJU7auOWWexseR6eFlbq26lHzpUj1NOkqDjgG22b7ccOvXx0Q0vLyojpsNh1583aQHsf3tluEuyWnxjGL31KOgUmevOlzLmShrA9WOYLeT4Yn9f0toi13dvzrgNDYzD5hCLIYhxyTJN5M5-aFcPlLN0SAIDFXyN6LlSVYv88SQ/s1600/20211114%20-%20Freeku.png"}
Evelyn has received a Free'ku badge.
Evelyn: It's a badge! Our first badge! I've got to tell my friends. I can't be the only one having this!
LRRH: Magic Bakery // Promote freedom for a badge // Don't you want one too?
Ivy: Dad, what's going on?
James: Just chilling and giving badges.
Ivy: That's just a prototype!
James: Not any more.
You will never know // How ready you really are // Until you try it. James receives That was... Arcacia Award (*Link to 2021-11-14 Scoring Discussion*) ! James got an Arcacia Award! I am so making a badge for that for myself.
Public Locker
[202111152002]
202111152002|Public Lock
▷ 2021 NOV 15 MON 8:02 PM
Puzzle Plaza
⭐
This is about a puzzle: Sasha: Jim and Sarah are in a long-distance relationship. Jim buys an engagement ring for Sarah and wants to mail it to her. Unfortunately, the only way to ensure the ring will be received is to place a lock on the package. Jim has locks and Sarah has locks, but neither has keys for each other’s locks. How can they make sure the ring isn’t stolen? Sasha: And the answer is the following. Don't read it if you don't want spoilers. Sasha: Answer: The ring is sent through the mail multiple times. First, Jim puts a lock on the package and sends it to Sarah. Then, Sarah places one of her locks on the package and sends it back to Jim. Then, Jim removes his lock and sends the package back to Sarah. Finally, Sarah unlocks the package and gets the ring.
Sasha: I don't get it. Keep reading if you don't mind spoilers. Sasha: The solution requires the ring to be sent 3 times. Sarah could just send her open lock to Jim, then Jim can lock the box with her lock. Tanya: I also don't understand the solution. Maybe it was simplified from some computer protocol. Now it doesn't make sense. Sasha: So we agree that it is a bad puzzle. Tanya: I agree. StarTree: It would make sense if the box is not a box but a public locker. Jim locks the locker with his lock and tell Sarah about it. Then Sarah comes with her lock and locks it and notifies Jim. Then Jim comes to unlock his lock and tells Sarah to come unlock hers one last time! Sasha: Ooo it is so shady. I like it. Let’s change the puzzle. Tanya: I see an improvement. But if I see a locker with two locks I would be suspicious. StarTree: StarTree did her best! Tanya: 👍

202112021000|Wish Story #4
December 2, 2021 Thursday 10:00 AM
Wishpedition
⭐
We were chatting at Daily Quest just before we came back to here at @Wish.
LRRH: I want @Wish to contain standalone stories so I want it to have its own thread.
Ledia: For those wondering, the Daily Quest is a game we are playing at Magic Bakery. In that game, the Evil Queen Vivi is taking over the world unless the heroes defend each location by updating their corresponding project. So, if we sound too gungho about trying to fulfill people's wishes, that's the reason. Oh, and by the way, I am Ledia, an EXP hungry DPS in that game.
Evelyn: Hi, I am Evelyn. I was helping Red on her quest to check everyone's new year resolution before we had the Daily Quest game.
LRRH: So Ledia was saying it is hard to fulfill someone's wish in one sitting. That's true. And that's part of the reason I want a different thread. With a different thread, I can time skip to the next point when there is progress on fulfilling the wish.
Ledia: Then you are essentially having a thread for each player then?
LRRH: Except for those whose wish is already fulfilled or don't need help. It would be weird for a section to just have a line saying their wish is fulfilled or they don't need help.
Tanya: I have a wish that you could fulfill today. I want to make some changes to the Daily Quest Game. What changes?
Tanya: The purpose of the game to promote peacemaking activities for those who wouldn't have done those activities otherwise. It should not take away from those who are already doing peacemaking activities. Do you agree? Yes?
Tanya: I feel that the current game is drawing attention away from more important peacemaking activities because the peacemaking contents of each project is not the same. The update tracker sees each project as if they are equal, but that is not correct. With about 20 projects on the tracker, even if we update each one every week, each project would only get updated once a week. I think some projects should be updated more often.
LRRH: Which projects do you think should update more often?
⭐
Tanya: I think @Seed, @Concept, and @Carrot. @Seed is the main project where we describe the whole system of what we are doing so others can replicate. That is the most important. @Concept helps us debate and spread our peace ideas. And @Carrot is currently our most promising project to spread our idea in a fun way.
Tanya: @Cardinal, our gamification project, should focus on drawing people's effort to working on those three projects. The rest of the projects do not need an update tracker. They exist to support the main peacemaking efforts. Tanya receives
LRRH: Hmm. I understand what you mean. There might be some debate on which projects is worthy to be tracked. But let's bring @Vivi to the discussion because she is running the Daily Quest.
Vivi: You are making me come read your log at @Wish, when you could have just kept the conversation at @Cardinal. Sorry…?
Ledia: Although it does feel really quiet, almost zen here.
LRRH: You are sitting with Little Red Riding Hood the Sage on a picnic mat at a warm hill somewhere out there at the expedition.
Vivi: I read it. I am not trying to be a dictator, and I think you can make such changes as part of the game at @Cardinal. There is nothing stopping people from casting Sanctuary on each project they feel they don't need tracking. And, you don't have to care about the “Panic Level”, you could just ignore it and update whatever project as you see fit.
Sasha: Sasha followed the Queen the found them at the mountains way out. It seems that the Queen is about to duel Tanya.
Ledia: I think the Queen is correct. The bottom line is anyone may just ignore the Daily Quest and update what they want. There is no bonus doing the quests DQ lists, and no actual penalty when the “game world” is in panic.
Tanya: My wish is that similar to how you pin @Cardinal to be on every day, could you also pin a quest from the “important” category?
Vivi: I can discuss more if we return to @Cardinal. This white background is hurting my eyes. (Editor's note: This conversation took place at Google Slides with a white background.) Tanya follows Vivi back to @Cardinal.
Ledia: Well?
LRRH: I suppose we all go back to Cardinal?
Ledia: Vivi is so powerful now it eclipses Red.
LRRH: @Cardinal is her charter. She is not doing anything out of line. And I am already used to being a bakery guild master when hardly anyone bakes. Let's go back to @Cardinal.
To be continued. (?)
Blogger
[202112032024]
202112032024|Let's Try Blogger
▷ 2021 DEC 03 FRI 8:24 PM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Dear Bakers,
The internet connection is still quite unstable, but we were able to squeeze in some updates to know that current status. Yesterday, the main quest party managed to end Queen Vivi's seizure of daylight, and Tanya said she was going to make some changes about the game to help people focus on the quality instead of the quantity of updates. But I haven't seen her plan yet. So, for those who still care about the panic level, the current chapter in danger are: @Book, @Paladin, and @Puzzle.
Happy Friday,
Little Red Riding Hood
Patricia has defended the library by herself again!
Ledia: So I take it that we will use Blogger exactly the same way as how we have been using Google Slides? Keeping all messages for the daily quest in one thread? Unless someone suggests another way. Then unless someone explains what should change I will be doing the same thing as usual and try to update the least updated chapter. But here at Blogger the screen is too bland. Back at @Cardinal the screen was more compact and intense. That was more interesting to me.
StarTree: For the confused reader, the screen that is more interesting to Ledia is this:
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjS6781BcNnjzoK9l_gyzFuCOpLl7faF-8NIVkVtzzbg3l3CnYAMetjXzLFXIDPj1RKSXakU_02JPFJHs8dYO8eK2ASa04hkPeQvsSFAn_lnixq41jg69D3hP7zcqmEz3koy4BS-cqc9_0ig0RqrsGy7kBtHxbGiGYRLXoUfEvBDAGAaMZUgEErdMIM6A=s320"}
It might take some time to adjust the theme. Let's give it a try before we give up. For @Paladin, I will answer the question "What is the difference between Paladins and Vigilantes?" Ledia receives StarTree: Ledia gets Arcacia Award for mentioning that paladins travel! {"cmd":"url","url":"https://tinyurl.com/MB24Paladin#slide=id.g10616988e8e_0_0","desc":"🔗"} Ledia has fended off Vivi's minions at Paladin HQ.
Evelyn: I wish that Tanya would come explain her plan. I am feeling lost without knowing what our goal is for daily quest... Tanya was trying to reduce our stress, but with us switching to blogger there will be even more work. Discussing what to do will probably take more than one quest slot.

202112060736|Daily Quest Diary
December 6, 2021 Monday 7:36 AM
Vivi's Castle
⭐
Queen Vivi woke up from her slumber. "Cardinal, how many hit points do I have?" Vivi has 1 hit point out of 3 hit points.
Vivi: Queen Vivi is displeased. A whole day has passed but she did not recover any hit point. "StarTree. Explain."
StarTree: StarTree doesn't know the rules, but found some clues on how Cardinal might work! StarTree shows Queen Vivi the result (Charter 30) locating the buried castle.
Vivi: Queen Vivi looked at the detailed result. She would have been happy except for one enchantment that was apparently present restraining the Cardinal Castle:
Vivi: "Low Stress Gameplay: While the game provides a platform as a reward for peacemakers to play, with in-game activities not necessarily eligible for earning peacemaker EXP, the Engine shall have mechanism against over-indulgence in the game itself. The stress level created by the game itself shall not be more than that of current events occurring at the time of play."
Vivi: Although the magical seal was written in alien language, the One-And-Only-Truly-Out-of-this-world embodiment of perfection Queen Vivi has no trouble deciphering its true meaning.
Vivi: We found the Cardinal Castle underground, but its true power is still sealed. The seal is preventing its power to be used to bring terror to the world, to say the least. But Queen Vivi would not be satisfied with simply being an Entertainer for the Heroes. Queen Vivi decides that she will find a way to use the Cardinal for her own purpose, and not be a tool used by the Cardinal. Vivi receives
Vivi: Cardinal, you shall address me as Queen Vivi. Vivi is now known as Queen Vivi.
Vivi: Cardinal, who is the perfection of this world? Perfection is undefined.
Vivi: Cardinal, I am the perfection of this world. Queen Vivi is the perfection of this world.
Vivi: Mwahahahaha!
Vivi: Cardinal, what are the rules regarding my hit points? Why didn't I heal? There is only a rule that a player may not fully recover the next day after KO. Black receives
Vivi: Cardinal, is it true that Heal and Revive do not work for villains? That is False. Cardinal receives
StarTree: StarTree is confused! Is Cardinal a player? Should StarTree keep score for Cardinal also? StarTree thinks that she probably should since the Cardinal is probably a being similar to herself! If something can get Arcacia Award, then it is a player! StarTree receives
Vivi: Cardinal, is it true that a villain can be a peacemaker? That is True.
Vivi: Queen Vivi got an idea on how she could heal herself.
StarTree: StarTree reminds Queen Vivi that she could attack a location without being there herself! All she needed to do is to assign a target, then the minions will attack while she remains at the Cardinal Castle!
Vivi: Queen Vivi is not interested in attacking without being able to see a war map and a war banner. "Make me a war map, then a war banner. Then the Queen shall consider entertaining the world with her prowess."
StarTree: Yes, Queen Vivi!
Continue: Where is dashboard?
?? Issues | ??? Quests
???
👑

202112092300|G-rated Dungeon
December 9, 2021 Thursday 11:00 PM
Arx Catacomb
⭐
The party gathered at Arx Catacomb where Tanya wants to show Evelyn her plan of using the Catacomb as a training place against evil beings.
Before we start, may I suggest that we stop referring to Cardinal as that gate? That... gate has a special meaning so it is offensive to some people. Alright, I'm sorry.
Sasha: Casey, how did you get here?
Casey: What do you mean? I logged on.
Sasha: Where were you in the game world before you got here?
Casey: It seemed like a long time ago, I don't quite remember. Why? Tanya has reconnected the teleport crystal at Pirate Bay and World Tree.
Zoey: By the way, I think Casey was at the Plaza last time. So ARP won't have done anything.
Evelyn: Sasha, we are on the same team... aren't we?
Sasha: Let me think. Nope, not really. My game role is still an agent of Queen Vivi.
Evelyn: But if we are playing in character, we won't let you join our party.
Sasha: Then what are you going to do? Are you going to kick me out?
Evelyn: ...
Sasha: Cardinal, AES. Emotional Safeguard module activated. Emotional distress detected for Evelyn. Evelyn takes 1 psychic damage. Evelyn now has 1 hit point.
Zoey: Sasha, that's mean!
Sasha: I am in-character, and this IS the training ground. My character alignment is Evil, same as Queen Vivi. In the game, that is.
Zoey: OMG, Sasha is the BOSS this time!
Tanya: That was not my plan. I didn't see that coming. I'm sorry. Should we KO Sasha first? It is 4 v 1.
Sasha: Let's see if you can! Sasha takes a critical hit for 2 damages. Sasha is now KO'ed.
Sasha: Overkill. Ouch.
Casey: Wait, who did that?
Zoey: I haven't done anything yet. Was that a spell attack? The only magic users here are Evelyn and Sasha.
Evelyn: I didn't do it...
Sasha: Murder Mystery!
Casey: Are we sure Sasha didn't just KO herself to trick us? We can't trust her character if she is evil.
Zoey: What is her motive though?
Tanya: Maybe she wanted us to argue and blame each other for her KO.
Evelyn: I am not going to blame anyone. That would be mean for me to do so because the whoever it was that did this was just trying to protect us... protect me. Evelyn receives Evelyn's emotional distress is relived. Evelyn now has 2 hit points.
Sasha: Did Arcacia KO me?
Tanya: I think no one here knows except Cardinal. If we are not lying, we are just guessing.
Sasha: Cardinal, don't say it. I want to guess.
Tanya: We are not here for that kind of puzzle.
Evelyn: Tanya, what were you trying to show me? Let's see that first.
Tanya's Plan
Tanya: As some of you may know, my chapter @Concept is about peacemaking concepts. In that chapter I include terms and philosophy both for and against peace. When it is "my turn", I would pick a concept from the backlog and posts it as a BOSS. Then each of us may come up with their best response, and together, we see whether we have a good answer to beat the BOSS (address the prompt).
Tanya: During that exercise, it is us who may roleplay and define what kind of boss could be a fitting personification of the prompt. Without our interpretation, the prompt itself is just a question. But our personification of it turns that into a roleplay game element. As we identifying more bosses and the kind of skills that defeat them, we are also personifying the solutions to the prompts, and turning the information into more memorable stories.
Zoey: I don't remember what the question was last time, but I remembered that I one-shot the boss. I went Legolas on that boss. What did you do to come up with the your response.
Zoey: The prompt said something so I looked up whether it was true. I fact-checked. Then I made a counter argument, that the fear that prompt made had no ground, because the United States has arguably the most powerful military and it is an all-voluntary force. Oh, now I remembered the prompt. The prompt was, "You can't reward people enough to serve in the military". It was trying to say that if we don't force people to serve in the military, there won't be enough people serving in the military to protect a country. That... fear didn't pass fact check. Zoey receives
Tanya: How did you feel when you beat the boss?
Zoey: I felt like I might be good at answering that kind of questions. I wanted to do it again, with others, so I... I know who KO'ed Sasha! XD Don't say it! I'm still guessing!
Tanya: Does it help if every time you fact check against a boss, I say that you are drawing an arrow and taking aim?
Zoey: A mnemonic device! I have a quiver of fact checking! Zoey receives Tanya receives
Casey: I can picture it too.
Tanya: What kind of boss do you think you defeated?
Zoey: Maybe some kind of cowardly mage, it was creating an illusion that didn't pass fact-check. What do others think?
Casey: I think you pictured quite well. I could see a witch doctor type monster. They attack with lies.
Evelyn: It could just ignorance if they didn't mean to deceive anyone. They simply don't know any better. But with facts, we can give the real healing. Are we fighting or are we healing.
Evelyn: I see us fighting off things that keep a person from being good, truthful, and knowledgeable. Ignorance and fear are status effects debilitating a person's potential. I don't think fighting sentient humanoid could pass Evelyn's test.
Evelyn: I prefer not. I am okay with cutesy representation, such as when defeated enemies are sent back to their home or they repent and turn into good character we can party with. And I am okay with fighting and sealing evil spirits to save the people affected by them. I am okay with the sealing away evil part of Cardinal's story. I don't get why we need to release evil just to seal them again. Especially not in our game world. Our game world should be a sanctuary so that people who come here don't have to worry about or being on guard of evil spirits possessing people.
Zoey: Then we are fighting non-physical things. Arrows against non-physical things...
Casey: You can have magical arrows.
Evelyn: Isn't it better to just use magic? Getting hit by arrow is... painful. Even if we agree that there is no pain system, just hit points being deducted.
Zoey: In other words, a non-violent Dungeon Crawl.
Evelyn: That would be better... and closer to reality if we are talking about concepts. In a real discussion you can't settle an argument by fighting, but if you maintain an attitude to help people who are confused, or are ignorant about something, then you can help them without calling that evil. They are not evil people. They are affected by biases and deeply rooted fears from their experiences. We should save them, not fight them.
Tanya: In Evelyn's eyes, this is an exorcising activity. We are dispelling evil spirits and illnesses affecting people's wellbeing and judgement.
Evelyn: I prefer that interpretation.
Casey: I think exorcising is still very awesome. I do prefer being able to land a hit on something solid instead of swinging the air though.
Evelyn: If you can hit them, they can hit you.
Casey: Is it okay if we are fighting undead? We are at a catacomb.
Evelyn: I am more okay with that as long as it is not graphical. I prefer not to promote and celebrate destruction. I prefer not to promote people looking forward to... fighting other humanoid or sentient beings.
Tanya: I think this is a good time to return to our bonus challenge. Evelyn, you said you don't blame the person who KO'ed Sasha, but how would you have dealt with it?
Evelyn: In our game, KO'ing someone is acceptable to me because it is really a skill-activated Timeout button. We are asking Sasha to stop hurting a fellow player in the game. It is like Sasha got tranquilized. Please don't force me to think about what I would do if Sasha really tries to hurt us.
Tanya: Cardinal, please refer to this discussion for maintaining a game world that Evelyn accepts.
Cardinal: Acceptable theme is now defined and can be enforced by invoking Cardinal command "Acceptable Theme Violation (ATV)". Defining Evil Quest is now Completed.
Cardinal: Is anyone still guessing who KO'ed Sasha?
Sasha: I think I know who did it.
Evelyn: May I come up with my guess later? It is late now.
🌒 The date has changed. Daily Quest for Thursday December 9, 2021 is now closed.
Sasha is revived with 1 hit point.
Sasha: Cardinal, Pixie. Initiating player exhaustion check. Casey, Evelyn, Sasha, Tanya, Zoey are exhausted. They are now KO'ed.
Evelyn: Sweet dreams, Sasha.


Q: Should @Seed be its own blog?
202112120536|Statue of Legacy
December 12, 2021 Sunday 5:36 AM
Freedom Plaza
⭐
A Sight to Behold! // New Dawn At Freedom Plaza // Where Heroes are Made
After defeating Queen Vivi and her invasion force, James the dictator governor had decided that there was no respectable town plaza without a statue of the town's hero, which shall be none but the revered forever-incumbent self-elected governor James himself. Being a hulk figure himself, he decided that the statue shall be at least twice as tall as himself and be made with all metal, which happened to be in short supply in order to rebuild the town. Therefore, he created a quest for Heroes to gather material. For the rebuilding, of course, according to the wording of the quest...
HEROES, WE NEED YOUR HELP!
To speed up the rebuilding process, please restore the supply chains to the following places. They are listed in none but alphabetical order, may our town be blessed by your wisdom:

The Academy: Our legendary blacksmith is missing. There is a rumor that she is still locked up by Queen Vivi. We need her back for rebuilding.

The Farms: Carrots are in short supply. We need them for draft animals.

The Harbor: Please check and increase security at the Harbor, and retrieve any stranded supplies.

The Lighthouse: Please check and repair the lighthouse at Cape Etherealis. 💗

The Pirate Bay: There are rumors that the Evil Queen Vivi had been looking for a ca3tographer to create a map for her evil plans. Please investigate and alert us of her plans.

Vacation Islands: Please check and retrieve rumored supplies and tools left there.

Teleport to most of those locations are not working. None other than HEROES like you know how to fix them. For further details please ask Ivy.
James receives
Ledia: Ledia arrives at the plaza and wishes that @Evelyn would be there.
⭐
StarTree: (Narrator) While waiting there, Ledia heard a telepathic voice: "Why don't you connect the teleport for everyone first?" Ledia does not recognize that voice. GM, how did that voice sound? StarTree is the GM? From my view, yes. StarTree is now recognized as a Magician. Wee~~!!
StarTree: (GM) The telepathy voice sounds like a young girl. It sounded soft, curious, and innocent. It was not a voice that Ledia could recognize.
Ledia: Ledia looks around for anything unusual.
StarTree: Ledia sees many people working around the plaza rebuilding. At the quest board, there is a young girl in a yellow cloak checking looking at the quest that Governor James had posted just a moment earlier. Ledia recognizes that as V.
Ledia: Ledia wants to remind the GM that although V doesn't speak often, Ledia would recognize V's voice.
StarTree: Ledia would recognize that the telepathy voice was different from V's voice or anyone who had spoken in Vacation Island.
Ledia: Ledia realized that she had never💗 heard Patricia spoke. Could that lady's voice be that of a young girl? Ledia receives
Ledia: GM, that hint was too obvious. It was not a hint! StarTree knows nothing!
StarTree: In the meantime, Ledia saw that P4 had joined V's party. The two were heading out.
Ledia: Ledia asks P4 where they are going.
P4: We are going to music practice. Nothing to do with James' quest? Nothing to do with it. See you later!
StarTree: P4 and V 's party had moved out, on V's ride.
Ledia: Ledia thought that the telepathic voice might belong to Patricia. As an oracle, Patricia might have farseeing and telepathy abilities. It seems that P4 and V might not have realized that the teleport system was down. So she started fixing the teleports for everyone while waiting for Evelyn. Teleport to Main Stage is now restored. Teleport to Vacation Island is now restored. Teleport to The Library is now restored. Patricia added a quote to the library:
When you discover your mission, you will feel its demand.
It will fill you with enthusiasm and a burning desire to get to work on it.
Ledia: Ledia thought, if Evelyn doesn't come she should start working on the new player designs. But at this moment, what was in her mind was to quest with Evelyn again since they were KO'ed at Ivy's lab. They really didn't notice how quickly time was passing. Patricia has defined the Alchemist skill Elemental Control. Patricia receives Patricia receives Kudos from Ledia: "Thank you for defining ALL elemental control skill in one entry, that has pretty much everything I need without defining each one separately."
Evelyn: Hi, Ledia. Have you waited long?
Ledia: Just enough for the best part of today. Ledia showed Evelyn the quest that James posted today. "Shall we quest?"

202112130911|@Seed Blog
December 13, 2021 Monday 9:11 AM
World Tree
⭐
Q Should @Seed be its own blog? Status: @Seed Lv2 | 12 days cycle | 0 Issues | 3 Quests | Boss Lv 4
Tanya: I am thinking of eventually yes. For now, maybe it is better to just make posts and use the label "CH13" to mark the @Seed posts. One of those posts will be the table of content of what you want to present in the book. When you have a set that is complete, that is when it would make sense to "launch" and make a separate blog. The way you do it might be more different from mine because my chapter has less to do with us. Your chapter includes surveys and discussion of participant behaviors and feedback. Your chapter might end up staying here.
Zoey: What would be worse if I start another blog now?
Tanya: You might spend too much time on tweaking the style of the organizing the content. YMMV.
Zoey: I was thinking, if I start another blog and tweak just the appearance and style first, then I only have to transfer to content once, instead of from the old chapter to here, than to the new blog. I think @Concept can be a section in that same blog. So the Seed of Peace blog can include @Concept posts. The style of that blog will be professional looking with Royalty Free images. No Roleplay, no manga, no anime style drawing posts.
Tanya: That's a good plan. But I think I still want @Concept to be completely standalone. So unless you tell me, not only would your blog does not show our avatars, it also does not link to Magic Bakery Posts showing avatars, then I would have @Concept there. Otherwise, I would make @Concept to be its own blog, but you can link to it.
Zoey: I can't make that promise, I think it is more personal and convenient if give examples of how we use the game mods...
Tanya: Is it okay if you try to make a new blog? I might not add content to yours, but I could learn from yours to see what I want for mine. In the meantime I might just start a simple blog to transfer my existing chapter contents, and worry about the format later. I want a blog template that is simpler and faster transitioning between posts.
Zoey: In that case may I just style your new blog? I need content to test the layout.
Tanya: That's fine with me. Some of the Seed of Peace content would fall under my "Tactics" section, and possibly a "Schema" section that I don't yet have.
Zoey: That's fine with me also. I think @Concept is important. It would be a waste if it is held down just because it is ugly and not styled.
Tanya: RP ON: After talking to Zoey, the two formed an agreement to have Tanya's Starship be constructed at the World Tree, with the starting design done by Zoey.
Zoey: "Starship at World Tree" sounds so much like StarTree. Maybe we need a different name for the ship for roleplay?
Tanya: That's worth its own thread. Let's make a new post for our plan and naming.
Tanya: Summary of Plan:
Tanya: 1. @Concept needs its own blog to be isolated from roleplay with no links to roleplay
Tanya: 2. @Seed might also need its own blog isolated from roleplay, but its content might mention and link to roleplay and discuss how scores are kept and how players think about the game.
Tanya: 3. For now, Zoey will help Tanya format the new blog, while Tanya focus on adding content without worrying about the formatting (@Concept has a backlog in content).
Tanya: 4. For roleplay, the Starship needs name other than "that starship being built at World Tree". This question has been answered.


Natalie: we added a quiz feature! By the way, Ledia and I have answered all questions from the old chapter. Please keep asking questions if you have more. I can also roleplay if anyone needs help from more paladins in the story!


⭐
Zoey: I tried using the what Ivy added for @Arena manga script. I plan to add back the previous page (with drawing) and see how it would look. Ageless Forest

202112142048|Puzzle Time
December 14, 2021 Tuesday 8:48 PM
Puzzle Time
⭐
Hey hey hey It's your puzzle master Mikela! Are you all ready for a puzzle? Would you deflect to Queen Vivi if we get it wrong? 😖 As far as I know, Queen Vivi is not attacking anyone anymore. So let's just play! Okay 😀
Prices
Mikela: The owner of a popular clothing store comes up with his own method of pricing items. A vest costs $8. Socks cost $10. A tie costs $6. And a blouse costs $12. Using the owner's method, how much would a pair of underwear cost? It's too easy!!! I agree. Next! I want to file a complaint against Mikela. She should screen the puzzles before posting them. Okay! I'll start skipping! Here is the answer to this puzzle... Mikela: It's $18! Each letter costs $2!
Password
Mikela: A woman wants to enter an exclusive club, but she doesn't know the password. A man walks to the door and the doorman says 12, the man says 6, and is let in. Another man walks up and the doorman says 6, the man says 3, and is let in. Thinking she's figured it out, she walks up to the door and the doorman says 10, she says 5, and she isn't let in. What should she have said? Still too easy... This might be okay if not for the first puzzle. The next one better be better. You're on fire! Mikela: It's 3! The reply needs to be the number of letters of the word the doorman spoke!
Reading
Mikela: Jessica is telling her friends this story and asks them to guess if it's the truth or a lie: “There was a man sitting in a house at night that had no lights on at all. There was no lamp, no candle, and no other source of light. Yet, he sat in the house and read his book happily.” Her friends say she's lying, but Jessica corrects them and says she's telling the truth. Jessica's story is true—but how? Mikela Mikela Mikela... Casey receives What was that for?! I think Arcacia liked Casey for being nice. Compared to... last time. May I answer this one? Yes, please. P4: Did he read it with his hands?
Sasha: Who agrees with P4's answer? Sasha: Zoey: Evelyn: Casey:
Sasha: Tanya, Yes or No?
Tanya: I don't like to take meaningless risk.
Sasha: There is no risk! Just pick so if we fail, we ALL fail together!
Tanya: I'm sorry. I'm not interested in failing together.
Casey: Well, if we get it right, then we ALL win together.
Tanya: Okay. I agree with P4's answer.
Mikela: Okay!! Are you ready? We are ALL IN!
Mikela: And the answer is... 🥁🥁🥁 The man is blind and is reading braille! Congratulations!! Everybody wins!! That's all, folks! Thanks for playing! See you next time! Today's puzzles are from ! Cheers!
202112142223
202112142223|Farewell Messages
▷
December 14, 2021 Tuesday 10:23 PM
Magic Detectives
⭐
Writing farewell message has always been one of my weaker skills. How do you do it? This is a post from @Happy: Lv1
OMG, Evelyn! Don't make titles like this! I thought you were leaving! I'm sorry! I'm not! I'm just trying to ask because someone else is leaving! 😖
Tanya: Is it difficult because you know them well or because you don't? Tanya receives This time it is because I don't. I feel like I failed to know them better. 😔 If you had known them better, what would you have written? Then I could wish them luck on what they plan to do. Right now I don't know their plans. 😔 I see. I propose a generic "Wish you all the best!" Let's see if someone else can come up with a better message. Thank you. 🙂
Casey: How about an inspiring quote? Such as: "All the little things will add to a happy journey." I like that! 😀 Casey receives
Zoey: Is there something you could thank them? We haven't worked together for years. I can't think of something to thank them. If I mention something from years ago, I think it just shows how long it had been since we last talked to each other. 😔 But how do you feel when you see them? I feel excited because it was as if we went back in time in another dimension. But that's probably just me. 😊 What if it is not just you? Then I will thank them for being them? And for reminding me the happy moments? That sounds kind of boring though. How about: "Thank you for making time-travel possible." That's funny. That's a little daring but I will try. 😳
Summary
Zoey/Sasha: "Thank you for making time-travel possible."
Casey: "All the little things will add to a happy journey."
Tanya: "Wish you all the best!"
Evelyn: I think together this is a good size for the message. Thank you all! 😊✅ The online form only accepts 80 characters! My planned message was too long... So I will just include the last two. Thanks again! 😊✅ Tanya, Casey, Zoey, Sasha receive Kudos from Evelyn.

Cardinal Quest
[202112170900]
202112170900|Cardinal's Call
▷ 2021 DEC 17 FRI 9:00 AM
Magic Bakery
📯
Tanya was planning for building the new Albatross when she learned about the situation at Deer Crossing. "This is serious." She thought to herself. "The plan for the Albatross can wait, but this cannot." Although there is no map to Deer Crossing, she reasoned that it is somewhere south of Arcacia's farm. Tanya started heading there, hopefully a map will be created soon.
🗺️ Quest map
Tanya: Could we get a map showing Deer Crossing and Arsenal Castle? I think we will also need local maps to show locations of monster spawn points.
Casey: I've just done the large map.
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEgF6aHyBJSF4SXosGMscuR5h5sEJ2tWHPeLE--z0K-8qxENbU8mc-vVbW14x7lt2nE8VGrxtp_hyuHub0C3687qqAlNkqu0MkBa3Wfq2ffC8gYld7Fc0Hsi2YH_vQNJIaHgGnwmiazwW45jAmK2l7krcYWZOt-vENdR0iq6uXHTRTilpX13L-EM0BDQBg"}
What kind of location is Deer Crossing and Arsenal Castle? I'll let the others decide. LRRH: Just a friendly suggestion. This type of non-RP conversation about the game could be part of the RP thread. You could just hide it as an aside. I think it would be interesting to read those notes while reading the main RP. StarTree, Could you copy that so we can see and decide whether to keep doing so? StarTree: I'll add this 💬 icon. If you click on it, it shows you the aside comments! Wow, this is REALLY Interesting! Red deserves merit!
⭐ LRRH is awarded Merit by Casey.
🦌 What Deer Crossing is
💡Evelyn: I've got a suggestion about what Deer Crossing is... I want the Deer Crossing to be a safe haven for deer. It means that it is not a hunting zone.
That sounds like the Ageless Forest. That's on the other side of the ocean. Could you move Ageless Forest to our continent? I think Ageless Forest should be closer to us. It was where P4 went for training. Then what about the World Tree? Could you move that too? Is there any reason there needs to be land at the northwest corner? If not I'll just remove that continent. I don't know if that continent is necessary, but I have an idea.
🧭 The Continents
💡Zoey: When people discuss politics, they often refer to a 2D political compass. Why don't we place the cities according to their alignment?
I think doing that would make the world look much less 'organic', and our map should show how cities of different political view can coexist in the same region under Hospitalian principles. You shouldn't need to move very far to find a community that shares your political alignment. Okay. But as of now it almost looks like that with the four corners. The northwest continent is the libertarian left. The northeast corner is authoritarian right. The southwest corner is libertarian right. The southeast corner is authoritarian left. I am okay with the countries being moved, but I still want some leeway to show how Hospitalian principles work, so individual cities should not be located according to their political alignment. So, World Tree on the bottom left. Country of Walls at top left. Country of Possessions at top right, and Pirate Bay at bottom right? Pirate Bay should be between countries that trade. May I also add my two cents?
👑 The Countries
💡Sasha: I want good countries to be one top and evil countries to be at the bottom.
That is somewhat opposite of Zoey's suggestion. But having the good countries at the top is like what we have now. What should I do if your wishes contradict each other? The person who draws decide. It is up to you, Casey. If you want to be Arcacian about, you would give priority to the one with more credits. @StarTree, what is our current ranking order? StarTree: It is:
336 points: Tanya: Wants the map to show Hospitalian Principles where cities of different political views can coexist in different regions.
233 points: Zoey: Wants the main countries to follow the political compass.
224 points: Sasha: Wants the good countries to be on top (north).
207 points: Evelyn: Evelyn: Wants Deer Crossing to be a sanctuary for deer (no hunting).
Hold on... Wouldn't the top scorer make all the calls? How many player levels are Tanya spending to get her priority? Remember, it is not about raw exp. It is about player level. It is not about who is the highest level, it is about who wants to spend the most of their player level (game coins). Currently: Tanya has 19 coins, Zoey has 15, Sasha has 15, Evelyn has 14! Are we really going to bid on the priority on deciding the game map...? I say Yes. Unless the others forfeit, then I get my way. But Queen Vivi is up north right now, do you want Castle Vivi to be at the south pole? What is wrong with it? Queen Vivi is obviously the good team. You guys go down. Are we talking to the normal Sasha or the villain Sasha...? 😅 I think it means there is no conflict. There is no need to bid. I am just going to draw something first. Tell me again if you don't like it. And this time I am going to make a square 8x8 map because that is what I want.
Tanya thanks all for answering the call.

Ivy: There are three kinds of links. Brown means that it will show/hide element within the same page. Green means that it will jump to another page within this website. Blue means that it will jump to another website. If you don't want the page to jump, please right click on those links to select open in the new tab or new window.

Tanya: StarTree, could you list the top 3 quest in each tier to show what's up next? Done!
Vivi: 3 is too many on mobile.
Tanya: On second thought, I want to see the full list of quests so we can audit the tier/priority. That section should be pretty much the same on each day unless we need to shift priority. So it can be normally hidden, but it needs to be there per day.
Mikela: I want Puzzle Time to be weekly. StarTree trades with you starting tomorrow!
Tanya: I've just realized what Cardinal's Quest is about. It is important. That should be the sole Tier 1 quest. We need to do that daily. Please move @Concept and @Whale to Tier 3 starting tomorrow, and shift @Guild to Tier 2. Tanya receives Cardinal receives
StarTree: I am closing today's Daily Quest. 🥨

[202112201000]
202112201000|Quest Map
202112170900|◀ ▷ 2021 DEC 20 MON 10:00 AM
Magic Bakery
📯
Zoey checks out the new quest map!
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEgdsqqKMJjgUUS3ULHCq8vl1q_fLjBwX1_2ZNcQB0RaIVXKGn6TJLTE1RxPmhyAbtzXpJWiByxauF5W2ZIipdV7oegKYyJueeoHmgNpiftgEHwMzbig2EEgzFfFjBG1TYQt2LQmdrsYguPTP8byFCvLHeIkJBGVujOsePHyVZhN3p9-6MZJNVnxTtJOJg"} I like this new map. But I can only see the cat island... But more importantly, what exactly do we need to do for this quest? @Tanya.
🔮 Deer Crossing's Barrier
Tanya: Since Tanya arrived near Deer Crossing, she had heard rumors and sighting from the locals, but there was no concrete report on what was going it. "This was almost like a ghost hunt," she thought herself. But she knew very well that the sightings were not ghosts, but signs of the guardian statues losing its power to maintain its barrier to protect the sanctuary. If the barriers go down, the sanctuary will be no more.
Tanya: But first, they should find someone who knew more about the guardian statues. It just happens that now is a holiday season and none is around.
Ledia: Ledia has arrived. She asked, "What about the monster spawning points? How do we seal them?"
Tanya: The guardian statues are what that would, or have been sealing the spawn points. When they are weakened, the monster will come out and take people's lives, including deer.
Ledia: Is there any monster that is already out, that we can fight?
🔮Tanya: There is a monster at large that is luring the Heroes' attention away from the impending issues giving false hope that things will just be okay. Tanya thinks that some heroes are already struck by it without knowing it. Zoey: Are you talking about Sloth? Tanya: It is a combination of Sloth, Distraction, False Hope, and Pride. Ledia: Ledia would see that as a team of four monsters. Zoey: We should make notes about the monsters somewhere. Where would be good? Cardinal or Catacomb? Let's make a separate post with the label Monster. Let's spec out the monsters.

Now with a bell 🛎️! And a WINNER! Guess who won this time...! 🟢














202112210900|Backup
December 21, 2021 Tuesday 9:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Since we are not making a new post for each day on a topic, the content of each post becomes LONG!! So I started backing up the blog since Blogger doesn't seem to have version history. If you delete a post it is gone forever! Weee~~~~!
Ivy: Unbelievable... But apparently true.
LRRH: The more reasons Little Red Riding Hood doesn't trust technologies. StarTree is awarded Merit by Red.
202112211000|Puzzle Time!
December 21, 2021 Tuesday 10:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Hey Hey Hey! It's your puzzle master Mikela! Are you all ready for a puzzle? Just one good one, please. P4, come sit with me! P4 sits on Evelyn's lap. We are ready. 😊 Here we go!
Paying the Bill
Wednesday, Steve and Pam go to a restaurant to eat lunch. After eating lunch, they pay the bill. But Steve and Pam do not pay the bill. So... who does?
Casey: There are way too many possibilities...
P4: I know this one. Is it Wednesday?
Casey: OMG, that is so dumb! I was so dumb!
Evelyn: Could we not use that word...?
Sasha: I can't. I can't be satisfied with just one puzzle. Especially not like this...
Mikela: AND... P4 is Right! Congratulations!!
Sasha: I... need... more...
Zoey: Don't give in, Sasha. It won't get better.
Sasha: Just one more please...

Mikela: And here we go...
Pick Your Own Poison
An evil man kidnapped someone and made them take one of two pills. One was harmless, but the other was poisonous. Whichever pill the victim took, the kidnapper took the other one. The victim took their pill with water and died. The kidnapper survived. How did the kidnapper get the harmless pill?
P4: The kidnapper is immune to the poison.
Sasha: The pill mixed with water becomes lethal, otherwise the poison isn't enough to kill a person.
Casey: The kidnapper has antidote.
Evelyn: ... I don't really want to think about this kind of puzzle... 🏳️
Zoey: I think the wording of the puzzle is wrong. It didn't just say the kidnapper end up surviving even if he took the poison pill. It said the kidnapper end up taking the harmless one regardless which one the victim took. That is impossible.
Sasha: @Tanya, make us whole!
Tanya: I don't see what the puzzle is. It just said the victim took the poisonous pill, so the kidnapper is left with and took the harmless pill.

Mikela: Alright! And the answer is...
Evelyn: Hold on. I don't want to be the only one not answering. So... The pills were labeled. The victim intentionally took the poisonous pill because she didn't want the evil man to die even if he was evil.
Evelyn receives Sasha: I can't tell whether that was dark or moving. Evelyn deserves a roleplay award.
Evelyn receives Mikela: OKAY! Six different answers! And the answer to the puzzle is... 🥁🥁🥁

🎊

Mikela: Both pills were harmless -- the poison was in the water! Sasha wins! Congratulations!
Sasha: Yes! I won and beat Tanya!
Zoey: But I was also right, the puzzle was worded WRONG. It said one of the pill was poisonous. The puzzle contradicted itself! It is a bad puzzle.
Sasha: That's part of the game! You have to factor in how people don't always write the puzzles correctly!
Zoey: But you also assumed one of them was in fact poisonous, just not enough to be lethal.
Sasha: I still got the closest answer and a better answer because my answer didn't contradict with the puzzle.
Zoey: True.
Mikela: And that's all, folks! See you next time!

Cardinal Campaign: Defense of Deer Crossing
Setting up
202112281000|Haunted House
December 28, 2021 Tuesday 10:00 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Hey Hey Hey! It's your Puzzle Master Mikela! Are you all ready for Puzzle Tuesday? I'm ready! Here it comes:
The Haunted House
Jack and Jill were visiting a very scary haunted house on Halloween. There was no light source in the house other than the flashlights they were holding. Jack was walking behind Jill, then he was just gone. Jill looked around but couldn't see him. She called him but there was not response. What happened?
Isn't this...? Yes it is. Then do you know the answer? Not yet. What if it turns out dark? Then I'll pick the best answer as the winner! Mikela receives merit from LRRH. Evelyn: Maybe Jack fainted? Wouldn't you hear something when someone falls? And what about the flashlight he was holding? Maybe he fell on something soft and his body covered the light? Maybe he fainted because his flashlight went out of battery. I don't think it is loud when someone faints and collapses. Jill might simply not notice when Jack fainted and walked some more before she realized. Casey: I say Jack just hid himself intentionally. Maybe he was trying to scare Jill, or he was too scared and went back by himself. Wouldn't he tell Jill if he was just going back? Maybe he did, but Jill didn't hear it or listen, or he might be too ashamed to admit it so he didn't say anything.
Mikela: Okay, so far we have two types of answers: Accident, or Intentional. Do you have more answers? LRRH: There is another kind of intentional action, but not by Jack. Such as when someone else intentionally turned him into a pudding. What do you want to call this third type? Hostility? Sasha: That's kid-friendly but it doesn't make any sense. If it is a haunted house, it could be something like the house has painting and it sucked Jack into one of them. I like that theme better. Sasha receives kudos from Evelyn. Why didn't the painting suck Jill? She was in front. If the painting sucked Jill first, Jack could see it happen. By sucking Jack first, Jill may still don't know what happened and could be sucked also. Then the paintings are sentient? The word hostile implies someone intentionally does something harmful. Otherwise it would just be dangerous or hazardous. There is something playing as the villain. P4: What if he smelled something really good? He was hungry and so he wandered off. Cute ! 😊 P4 receives kudos from Evelyn. Casey: How about the picture that sucked Jack happened to show something he was attracted to? You need to be drawn to the picture to be sucked in. And that was why Jill and Jack both walked past that painting, but only Jack was sucked in it. There is no villain, but the house is hazardous. If nothing bad is actually happening to Jack, then what would you call it? He saw a better place and went there. It doesn't mean that the House was doing anything bad. Mesmerized. Charmed. That's what kids' games would call it.
Mikela: Okay, so now e have five types of answers: Accident, Charmed, Hazard, Hostility, Voluntary. Are there more? Zoey: What about a misunderstanding or a mistake? Maybe Jack saw the Exit and went there, or Jill missed the Exit and kept going. Then Jill would think that Jack should still be behind her, but it was normal that Jack would not be. Casey: Jill went inside a women's restroom inside the haunted house, Jack saw that so he was waiting outside! That's funny! Casey is awarded Merit from Sasha. Tanya: What if we were misled by the puzzle? The puzzle presented what it said as the truth, but it could be wrong like the last time. Maybe the account by Jill was false. Jack didn't disappear suddenly. That's just Jill's testimony. The puzzler left out important information. I would call this false witness. Like... Jack and Jill had an argument and one of them intentionally walked off. Then when Jill was asked what happened, Jill didn't want to talk about the argument so she just says, 'Jack just disappeared suddenly'. That's one possibility. I want Tanya to play Murder Mystery. She would help us solve cases, it would be fun and possibly educational. Why are we suddently talking about murder mystery? 😅 LRRH: Sasha, you are making Evelyn uncomfortable. If you keep pushing I would considered your being hostile to another guild member and turn you into a pudding. Then eat you. I want to know what is going on and I don't want to be separated. I want to play murder mystery with everyone but Red won't let us play here. I think the first question is, does Evelyn even want to play that. If not, then you shouldn't keep asking because you already know she wants to be with you but you are using that to make her do something uncomfortable. But if you say it like that, you are also pressuring her to do more because she now knows that there are things we want to do but would never bring it up for fear that it would make her uncomfortable, then we would become more and more like strangers to each other, and we will become separated because we won't know how to talk to each other anymore. Then she would regret having been so opposed to everything and blame herself for breaking our group. I see. I am against those games because they associate evil intentions and behaviors to pleasures. Even if you are playing the protagonist trying to solve the crime, you are still propagating evil thought patterns by describing them. When you do that you create a world of evil and suffering. I object your thought pattern for several reasons. 1) People who help solve crimes should not be stigmatized. They need to be supported. You are isolating them from support when you don't let them talk about what they do, or don't let them turn what they have to do into something fun. When you do that, you are forcing them into a corner to be traumatized because you keep telling them that the only way they should feel is to be traumatized when something bad happens. 2) In those crimes someone is hurt. Do you go save them or do you seal them away? 3) If you don't let people play, how do you train people to solve the crimes? For point #2, I think people may choose to coop with an incident by sealing it away. We can help them start over by not bring them back to the past. We can also help those who want to find answer in the past find answer. That is the victim's choice. You can't decide for a victim whether they shall face the past and make it normal to talk about it. And we don't need to go out of our way to save imaginary victims because Arcacia can do that and give them a new life. There is no place of unwanted eternal suffering. Evelyn receives For point #1 and #3, I don't think I am trying to stigmatize anything. There are places where people can talk about things and get training on how to do things. But this place is a bakery. Red has been generous for letting us do things unrelated to baking. Then if I go play that would you come? Am I forcing you or making you uncomfortable? And where would we go to play it? I don't get the big deal about those games. What is so more interesting about them than regular puzzles. I don't get why people would play those but not when the crime is about "just a bank robbery". I think horror and violence are part of the attraction. It is the same as how a person would go watch a horror movie compared to an action movie. It is kind of like dare, like eating spicy food. People challenge each other to see who can stomach more. Sasha, why do you want to play these games? Because the puzzle is more complicated, more realistic and there is a storyline. But is it violent? That's the thing, I don't know how or whether I am allowed to talk about it. When we played Vivi's game, we can get KO'ed. Zoey KO'ed me in one hit. In the KO mystery people also got KO'ed in one hit in a locked haunted house and you are trying to figure out who did it. I am not trying to dare anyone to be violent. I am seeing it as a puzzle that we can solve together. I don't care if we make things cuter as long as the puzzle is the same. How would you know what is important to the puzzle if you start translating it to a less-violent equivalent? I don't know how until we finish playing it! But by then we won't be playing it. So we would just have to translate it as we play and hope that we didn't miss anything that is vital to the puzzle. In the end it should be a small fix if we missed anything. But in that case, what is our purpose of translating it? We are still playing the real thing. We are doing it so other people can play the non-violent version, the family friend version that is about motives and figuring our false witnesses, instead of simply decoding ciphers like in Escape Room puzzles. I see. What would you call the translated type of game, after removing the violence? Magic Bakery Detectives. ... Is that a silent approval? Should I write a charter? We translate violent murder mystery puzzles into non-violent family-friendly puzzles. We will have a translation team, and another section with the translated puzzles for others to play. Our goal is to promote logical thinking so people don't get deceived and get taken advantage of. This is peacemaking not by censoring but by providing a more popular and enjoyable alternative. It is Arcacian. Mom isn't responding. I can't tell whether what you do is okay until I see it. @Ivy, how can they do it as a trial? They can do it on a page and don't link to it. Then it becomes unsearchable. Then you may do it there but I am not giving you a charter number or credits for doing so until I see what you can actually do. I guess that is fair. Who wants to join my translation team? I want to join but could we do the other quests first?
Mikela: Okay! And the kids went questing. Stay tuned next time for the answer!

⭐ DEC 29: Hiding Map Page


Red: I am hiding the Map page because I don't think we need it anymore.


🎲


🏅


🏅


⭐


🏅


⭐


⭐
Defending Deer Crossing
Command Center, Western Statue
⛺ DX Command Center
Deer Crossing Command Center
Wednesday December 29, 2021


⭐
To recharge the Guardian Statues, Tanya believed that the first step was to setup a command center so that heroes who would arrive later would know the status. As of now, the pertinent information is as follows:
Deer Crossing Status Summary
December 29, 2021
1. The Deer Crossing Sanctuary is protected by three guardian statues. The sister statues form a reuleaux triangle covering the entirety of Deer Crossing.

2. The power of the statues are running out. In their weakened states, monster would start spawning to attack the sanctuary and area nearby.

3. The quest goal is to recharge the statues and to protect the area from monster attacks in the meantime.

4. Sages may have useful information if they can be located. If they cannot be found, the statues need to be studied to recharge the seals.

5. Rumor has it that there are more than a dozen interrelated magic seals on each statue to be recharged.

6. The exact date when the statue power would run out is unknown. Rumor has it that it will run out before Spring.
~ End of Summary ~
...


Zoey was unsatisfied with point 5 and 6 in Tanya's status report. "Knowing how many seals we need to restore and when its power will run out are important. If we know the truth too late, we won't be able to adjust our efforts in time. We need facts, not rumors. I am going to track down the facts and destroy the rumors. Who would join me?" Zoey didn't intend to explore alone. She wanted at least one other Hero to join her party.

Zoey added Rumor as a monster.
Tanya: Tanya intended to stay and set up base camp. "Monster activity is low at the moment," Tanya said to Zoey, "Are you sure you don't want to go solo?"

Zoey: Unlike Tanya, Zoey normally don't do things alone unless she was in a safe zone. According to the reports, Deer Crossing is no longer a safe zone. It seems unreasonable to venture alone in such unfamiliar environment. "I only have 1 hit point." Zoey reminded Tanya.

Zoey added Pride as a monster.
Tanya: Noted.

Zoey: Zoey thought Ledia or Evelyn would response but they didn't. There was one person she knew would response, although it would seem overkill in this situation. But since no one else was coming, Zoey summoned that person...

🧭 Western Statue
To the Western Statue
Wednesday December 29, 2021


⭐
Zoey wanted to dispel the rumors and get the facts straight within today. She reasoned that although Deer Crossing was not inside Ageless Forest, the most capable person for the task would be Fina.

Zoey summons Fina. Zoey is recognized as a Herald.



Fina: Good job avoid saying that I'm your last choice. Let's get something done.
Fina: Fina led Zoey through the forest. She tried to do it swiftly but quickly realized that it was more like a babysitting deal than a scouting deal.
Zoey: Although both Fina and Zoey are Heralds, Zoey was more comfortable as dispatch behind a desk looking up information than as a ranger following tracks.
Fina: We aren't even following any tracks. We are just going from point A to point B.
Zoey: Through a jungle, with no roads, no stairs... *pant*
Fina: Save your breath...

The party reached a hilltop where one of the statues were located. Teleport to the Western Deer Crossing Guardian Statue is now connected. Zoey receives Kudo from Tanya: "Thank you for taking one for the team."
Sasha has teleported to the Western Statue.


Sasha: Pixie.

Zoey is hungry and exhausted. Zoey is now KO'ed.
Zoey: What was that for?
Sasha: That's for you to go take a break, and for me to take my turn.
Zoey: Fina, Sasha is the enemy!
Sasha: Not right now. Queen Vivi wasn't the one attacking. This is something new. I'm just trying to understand what's going on. Same as you.
Fina: Hmm. In that case, you won't mind if I just start cooking would you? Meanwhile you could examine the Statue, then we can eat together.
Sasha: I guess that's fair.
🔍 Investigation
Investigation
Wednesday December 29, 2021


⭐
With her unrivaled magical aptitude, Sasha deciphered that the Statues, together, would run out of power on Spring Equinox, which would be Sunday March 20, 2022. As for the number of magical seals to recharge, she counted 18.



Ledia: "What do we need to do to recharge them?" Ledia had followed the tracks and reached the summit of the Western Statue.

Sasha: It says that the statues are supposed to recharge itself, but apparently the landscape or terrain has changed, preventing it from doing so. We would need to alter the magical leylines for them to recharge from the current terrain. The 18 seals correspond to locations where the leyline had already changed. We need to fine alternate sources to reconnect them. For example:


Sasha: This magic seal was originally at the bottom of the lake. But the lake had gotten deeper. The original seal is now too far from where it needs to be to seal the monster spawn point. I can make you a scroll but you still need to dive down there for the scroll to activate because I can't tell the exact locations from here. Translocation Scroll 📜


Zoey: Zoey was surprised that Sasha was actually being helpful and felt bad about calling her an enemy earlier.
Sasha: A likeable villain is not bad all the time. Sasha receives Kudos from Zoey Sasha is now recognized as a Magician. Sasha: Pixie. Zoey has returned to normal condition. Zoey now has 1 hitpoint. Fina is now recognized as an Alchemist. Fina receives Kudos from Zoey: "Thank you for the meal."
Ledia: I will go to the lake, find the old seal and apply this scroll. If you would, could you list the rest of the sub quests at the command center?
Sasha: Actually, I was thinking, since we need to check the status of the statues all the time, why don't we set the command center here at the statue?
Ledia: I will let you sort that out with Tanya. Either way is fine with me as long as there is a list.
Ledia is now recognized as a Paladin.
🔮 Lake Monster
Base Camp
Wednesday December 29, 2021


⭐
Before diving into the lake, Ledia teleported back to base camp to consult with Tanya.

Ledia: Tanya, with our current information and preparation, what are my odds of succeeding if I go to the lake right now?



Tanya: I've found historical records of this mission type being done with this kind of scroll. But since the location happens to be underwater, it would be difficult even if you succeed. I expect you to lose 1 hit point just for diving. There is a small chance (1/6) that you will need to fight monsters that had already spawned. If you encounter them, you would lose another hit point just for fighting. Your odds of winning if you fight is less than half (2/6). Otherwise, your chance of finding the spawn point and being able to apply the new seal is one half (3/6) per dive. In summary:
For each diving attempt:
1. Roll for monster encounter (1/6)
2. If there is a monster encounter, roll for combat success (2/6)
3. If combat fails, lose 1 hit point and resurface (Skip to Step 5)
4. Roll for success in finding and applying the scroll (3/6)
5. Resurface: Lose 1 hit point.
Ledia: It seems to worth a try. Tanya is now recognized as an Oracle.
