202208141928|Puzzle Plaza

 202202190900|📈 Simple Math {"cmd":"PIN2","node":"202202190900","music":""}
Start with any whole number. If it is odd, multiply it by 3 and add 1. If it is even, divide it by two. Repeat this with the result. If you repeat enough times, you will always get the number 1. True or false?
Show Answer
The answer is not posted yet. Take a guess! {"cmd":"url","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collatz_conjecture","desc":"[Wiki]"}
💬 Discussions
{"id":"202202190900","parentid":"202208141928","parentname":"Puzzle Plaza","icon":"📈","title":"Simple Math","subtitle":"Puzzle","img":"https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2017/10/17/14/10/financial-2860753_1280.jpg","music":"","author":"Mikela","description":"","card-text":""}
A group of five strangers come together to honor the same person none of them knew. What is going on?
Link |
They come together to honor their organ donor! |
SATURDAY FEB 19 2022
Robert: Is it because Google told them to and people are sheep? Mikela: Very interesting but not the answer to this puzzle! | Amelia: Is it a holiday? Like Martin Luther King? Mikela: No. | Evelyn: Is the person famous? So they know about them, but don't know them personally? Mikela: The person is not famous, but became very important to those five people who honor them sincerely! | Ledia: Did that person die saving their lives? Mikela: That is extremely close! I would consider that an equally correct answer, but there is just one piece of detail if others want to keep guessing. Hint: The person who died didn't die while trying to save someone. Zoey: You mean the person dies, and their death ended up saving the five people? Mikela: Yes, what is going on? Evelyn: The deceased was an organ donor. 😢 Mikela: That is the full answer! Zoey: Onion Ninja. 😢 |
{"id":"202202191000","parentid":"202208141928","parentname":"Puzzle Plaza","icon":"🎂","title":"Coming Together","subtitle":"Puzzle","img":"https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2014/06/30/11/40/cupcakes-380178_1280.jpg","music":"","author":"Mikela","description":"","card-text":""}
You wake up in the middle of a pitch dark night. You remember that on your bedside table are a glass of water, a pen, and your phone that is out of battery. How do you get your phone without touching the other two?
Link | Turn on the light! | |
SATURDAY FEB 19 2022
Amelia: Turn on the light. Mikela: Congratulations! You are the winner! Casey: Too quick! | Robert: Alexa, Turn on lights? Mikela: Congratulations! You are a winner! {"id":"202202191100","parentid":"202208141928","parentname":"Puzzle Plaza","icon":"🌙","title":"Pitch Dark","subtitle":"Puzzle","img":"https://cdn.pixabay.com/photo/2016/11/23/14/08/crater-1853110_1280.jpg","music":"","author":"Mikela","description":"","card-text":""}
💟
Thank you for being a great GM!
💟
Thank you for being so cute!
💟
Thank you for GM'ing!

Thank you for taking my idea seriously!

Where is the Pea?
⭐
Why do people seldom win when they play the shell game where they guess which shell has a pea after shuffling? P4: Is it because the shuffler is cheating? Mikela: Yes, but how? Sasha: They don't put the pea there until they reveal it! Mikela: That's correct! Congratulations!
🥨 | | Because the shuffler chooses whether to put the pea under the shell (from their sleeve) as they lift a shell!
⭐
Last week, we talked about what we will play next. Who wants to finish Hellapagos first? Ledia: It has been a while. Can we get a recap on where we were? Otherwise I am for finishing Hellapagos first. StarTree: It was Day 4 with heavy rain 🌧️🌧️🌧️! The players were forming a woodcutting / fighting group to deal with the snake. Players who signed up for the fighting were: StarTree, Ledia, Natalie, Vivi, Black, Mikela, and 3B! Zoey: I want to fight now that I know I am DPS XD 😆 Black: I can trade spot with you. Zoey: @Evelyn, come join the fighting party. Evelyn: Okay. 😀 Tanya: Then I will gather food. Black will gather wood. StarTree: @Sasha, who will be GM and when are we doing this? Sasha: I think Cardinal can GM. Is it too must of a rush if we shoot for restarting tomorrow? Zoey: I'm used to playing in the weekend XD 😆 StarTree: Now Pinging @Natalie and @3B. StarTree: @Cardinal, this was the summary of the boss. According to Ledia, the boss snake was a robot! Cardinal: Understood. Natalie: Hey! Long time no see! Let's do this! StarTree: Welcome back! 3B: I can play but my level is probably the lowest in the group. Zoey: 12 levels should be plenty to last three rounds! 😆 Ledia: At start of Round 4 there is supposed to be a heavy area attack dealing 3 dmg to each. That can go through protect and KO maybe half of us. Cardinal: @3B, @Natalie, could you add your game skills to the skill list before the game? I need to know at least three stats: Your max hit point, your basic melee or ranged attack, and your ability to dodge attacks. Mikela: Hype!
⭐
How do you like the calendar with emoji under the day number? Vivi: It doesn't look very nice. It turns into a crash of colors. Could you make another one with avatar pictures for comparison? Ledia: I think it looks fine if we avoid cool color icons like blue and purple. StarTree: I made a second Calendar with avatar of the person with highest score of that day! Zoey: @Sylvia is the MVP of this month! XD 😆 Red: @StarTree, could you change the icon for participation and unicorn to the pretzel? Crystal ball to an egg. Desert island to coconut. And the present to pancakes? StarTree: And it is done! Ledia: Color-wise it looks better, but the pretzel for Adventure Begins series doesn't really fit. Could you try 🐤? Mikela: Can Puzzles use the hatching chicken icon? Albatross can use another bird icon. StarTree: And that is done! Evelyn: It looks so cute! 😍

5






4






4
SCOREBOARD
🦄 Players: 3B, Black, Cardinal, Evelyn, Ledia, LRRH, Mikela, Natalie, P4, Sasha, StarTree, Tanya, Zoey
⭐ Merits: Mikela, Sasha, StarTree
🏅 Recognitions:
💟 Kudos:
💗 Awards:
🏆 Top: 5 StarTree 4 Mikela 4 LRRH 3 Cardinal 3 Ivy 2 Natalie 2 Kisaragi 2 James 2 P4 2 Sasha 2 Ledia 2 Zoey 2 Evelyn 1 Amelia 1 Ken 1 3B 1 Sylvia 1 Black 1 Casey 1 Tanya
Hunting Party
February 27, 2022 Sunday
Vacation Island
⭐
It was Day 4 since the 22 castaways were stranded at Hellapagos. In the Heavy Rain, the castaways rooted for a plan for everyone to escape. Hunting down the snake in the wood gathering area was the first and pivotal task the castaways must succeed.
Cardinal: Roll call for the hunting party please. Present. Natalie is ready to kick some ... Present. 😅 Wee~!!! I'm here. Present. With P4. Present! 💕
Cardinal: Zoey, Evelyn, in this game you were a kid. You only have 1 hit point. Understood. Yes.
Cardinal: Does the hunting party have a leader? What is the plan or formation going to the woods?
Ledia: I'm the party leader. The plan is StarTree will lead the way because, according to Ivy, the Snake bit her every day. The others who can intercept or stun will follow StarTree nearby to stun the Snake when it appears. All others follow further back, and encircle the snake once the fight starts. Tanya had already seen the Snake's attack pattern. An AE attack will happen in round 2 and 4, dealing 2 and 4 damages. If you will get KO at the start of round 2, close in after it does the AE and get out of range at the end of round 3. Gotta dance! For those who can fly, decide for yourself whether you can safely fly in heavy rain.
Natalie: Do we see lightning and thunder at the moment? I can normally sense how bad the weather. Does it cost you anything to do so? It doesn't. It is kind of part of my intuition. Can you change the weather? Sometimes...? Changing the weather is easier with wind magic. I can make a cloud rain, but once it rained it is gone. Natalie, roll once please. Do we get our own die? There are 10 dice and one is blue. That's up to you and your party. We have many more dice. Natalie: (D6)=5.
Cardinal: You feel that it is quite safe for flying, and you will be forewarned if the weather gets worse.
Natalie is recognized to have the passive ability Lightning Sense Rank A.
She can sense if lightning strike is likely in the next round. Natalie: I tell the group.
P4: P4 can sense lightning also. When lightning is about to come, P4's ear feels funny inside.
P4 is recognized to have the passive ability Sense Electricity Rank A. Cardinal: So the hunting party goes into the wood in the formation of where StarTree is in front alone. All kids are in the back. Everyone else is in the middle. Natalie is flying. Who else is flying. I am not flying. I am flying around Evelyn.
Mikela: I'm hovering on my cloud. Since... it's all muddy... Flying nimbus XD 😆
Mikela is recognized as a Cloud Rider Rank S.
Evelyn: I cast Protect... Evelyn: (D6+)=2,6.
Protect II is now in effect. Cardinal: StarTree, roll once please. Hold on! Do I have a bow?... XD 😅 StarTree can make you one! Yes, please, I don't want to get ARP in the middle of the fight since Sasha is watching. 😅 StarTree is recognized for Wood Crafting Rank S. Zoey now has a bow and 12 vine arrows.
Zoey: Sorry I didn't think it through. I am not DPS in this fight. I am support... XD 😅 StarTree: (D6)=4.
Cardinal: The party is in the middle of the woods, after a short stop where StarTree just walked back to the rear and gave Zoey the bow and arrows. Everyone other than StarTree and Natalie roll once please. Cardinal receives Zoey: O. M. G. ...
Sasha: (Commentary: HAHAHAHAHAHA!!!!!)
Ledia: Way to make it exciting, Cardinal.
Ledia gives Cardinal Kudos for taking the opportunities to make things go wrong for the heroes.
🎲
Vivi: Well... Vivi: (D6)=1. Ledia: (D6)=5. 3B: (D6)=2. Mikela: (D6)=2 Zoey: (D6)=5. Evelyn: (D6)=2. P4: (D6)=4.
Vivi: Anti-Venom, Shadow Bind.
Cardinal: Vivi, roll with advantage please. Vivi: (D6)=6, 2.
Vivi felt she was bitten but immediately expelled the venom.
Her Protect has worn off. Cardinal: Vivi tried to use shadow bind, but there is no shadow to bind.
Vivi: But I would know where it is, won't I?
Cardinal: You feel that it is a long and slender thing extending from deeper in the woods.
⭐
Zoey: Faerie Fire!
Faerie Fire lights up a long and slender tentacle shaped object extending from deeper in the woods.
🍇
StarTree: Binding Vines!
Cardinal: Vines spring out from the surrounding to curl around the tentacle. But the nimble tentacle can still retreat quickly back to the deep woods.
Ledia: I follow it to see where it goes with Accel.
Mikela: I follow Ledia on my cloud and amplify Faerie Fire along where I go.
Mikela is recognized for Amplify Rank S. Cardinal | As you give chase with amplified Faerie Fire, you see about a dozen more tentacles in the woods extending toward the party.
⚔️
Ledia: I hit the tentacle I am chasing with Chain Lightning on contact. Roll once with advantage please. Ledia: (D6+)=6,5. Roll four dice please. Ledia: (D6x4)=5,4,4,1.
Chain Lightning spreads through the tentacle monster, dealing it 3 damage. The monster is momentarily stunned. Cardinal: Natalie, from the sky you see the light from Chain Lightning takes the shape of a scorpion. There are tentacles in front, and something bigger rising up at the back like the tail of a scorpion.
Natalie: Water Spear at level 4, aiming at where the body is, the part where everything connects to. Roll 6 dice with advantage please. May I get some dice? 💟 Natalie: (D6+x6)={6,3,3,1,1,1},{6,6,5,3,3,2}.
The Hellapagos King Scorpython takes 3 damage. Cardinal: The ends of the tentacles are glowing in red.
Evelyn: I cast Sanctuary around me, if anyone wants to come in...😅 What does Sanctuary do in combat? It creates a sphere and blocks physical and magical attacks from entering the sphere for one round. It costs 3 mana. Roll three dice please. Evelyn: (D6x3)=1,4,2.
Sanctuary (Blocks 1 damage) is in effect around Evelyn. Evelyn is recognized for the skill Sanctuary Rank B.
P4: P4 double splits in the sanctuary.
Cardinal: 3B, what would your character do?
3B: Is the monster within throwing range?
Cardinal: Although it is raining heavily, it was still day time and you have clear line of sight to several small tentacle heads that are glowing red. One of them is within your throwing range, but the body of the monster is otherwise invisible.
3B: Wing Toss at the head please. Roll once for hit please. 3B: (D6)=4. The tentacle head is hit and destroyed. The monster takes 2 damage. The tentacle leading to that head loses camouflage partially. 3B: I thought I was useless...
Evelyn: I run to 3B to give her a hug.
Cardinal: As Evelyn runs to 3B, every remaining head shoots a red beam toward its target. I am running with Evelyn to stay in the Sanctuary XD 😆 Me 4! I don't run super fast, there should be no problem 😖 I armorize. StarTree hides behind trees! Perfect dodge. Dodge. Barrel Roll
🌈
Natalie: Reflect Light.
Natalie receives Cardinal: StarTree, Ledia, Mikela, Natalie, roll with advantage please. StarTree: (D6+)=5,3. Ledia: (D6+)=4,1. Mikela: (D6+)=1,1. 😱 Natalie: (D6+)=5,5.
Cardinal: The laser sliced trees as StarTree hid behind trees. The party gains 1 extra wood for making rafts. Wee~!!! "Just as planned" XD 🤣
Cardinal: Natalie reflected the laser back at the Scorpython.
The King Scorpython takes 1 damage. Cardinal: As for Mikela... Mikela: Mikela misjudged which head was aiming at her and barrel rolled into the one Ledia dodged. Mikela was hit twice and crashing into a puddle of mud.
Here it comes! XD 🤣
Mikela takes 4 damage. Mikela is KO'ed.
🏳️
Mikela: It was nice meeting you all...
Cardinal: Evelyn, P4, Zoey, roll once please. Evelyn: (D6)=3. P4: (D6)=1. Zoey: (D6)=6.
Protect on Evelyn and P4 have worn off.
Evelyn: I go toward Mikela to revive her. It will take you the whole turn to reach her. OK 😖
Cardinal: Ledia, you see trees falling ahead of you towards you. everyone else also hear that noise and feel the earth trembling as if a giant insect is moving.
Ledia: I want to use my Monster Recognition knowledge and recognize that acid spray can damage this kind of camouflage Roll with advantage please. Ledia: (D6+)=1,3. You vaguely remember that that might be the case. What do you do about it? I Tiamat spray it with acid. No one else is around yet so there should be no friendly fire. Thanks for the consideration! 🏳️ Roll 5 dice with disadvantage please, due to heavy rain. Hmm... Forgot about that... Ledia: (D6-x5)={5,3,2,2,1}, {6,3,2,2,1}. Cardinal: (D6)=1.
Cardinal: As the trees were falling in front of her, Ledia summoned her Tiamat power and spray the monster with acid. Although the rain quickly washes away the acid, the acid seared the camouflage coating of the King Scorpython. Its torso is now covered in a stripe pattern.
The King Scorpython takes 1 damage. Its camouflage on its torso is now damaged. Cardinal: The King Scorpython is not slowing down and is about to run over Ledia. Can I Accel and dive my sword into it The height is not a problem. But you need to roll with advantage. Ledia: (D6+)=6,4.
Cardinal: As the King Scorpython runs toward Ledia, she jumps on top and dove her sword into it from above. Ledia is now riding on it toward the rest of the party.
The King Scorpython takes 1 damage.
Natalie: Do I see its tail? I want to use water spear to take its tail off.
You don't see its tail. But you could see Ledia and remember where the tail would connect to the body. You could also guess where the tail is. I will wait for a better opportunity. Roll with advantage please. Natalie: (D6+)=4,4. Cardinal: (D6)=4.
Cardinal: Natalie, you feel that it will have lightning soon (during next round). I tell the group.
Cardinal: The rest of the group see Ledia riding the King Scorpython toward them, crushing trees in the process. It is going to hit Vivi, StarTree, Evelyn, and 3B, in that order.
☀️
Natalie: Oh oh oh! I scoop down and cast light from the back.
Natalie's light makes long shadow of the monster towards the party.
🌑
Vivi: Shadow Bind. Nice combo! Natalie receives Vivi receives Cardinal: Vivi roll with advantage please. Vivi: (D6+)=6,6.
Vivi is now recognized for Shadow Bind Rank S. Cardinal: As soon as Natalie cast light, Vivi's Shadow Bind connected. The King Scorpython is stunned. As the Shadow Bind spreads through its body outlining its tentacles, tail, and legs. Every time the monster takes damage, it will cost Vivi 1 mana per damage to keep it bound.
⚔️
3B: I leap and use Iron Cross with a chain attached while hovering in the sky. Roll with advantage please. 3B: (D6)=3,3.
Cardinal: Ledia, you see 3B's Iron Cross coming down but it will just miss and scrap off the Scorpython. Hmm...
StarTree: Wood Pillars!
Cardinal: Wood Pillars spring forth from the tree stumps on both sides, pinning the Scorpython and pushing it sideway where the Iron Cross lands at a joint to its leg.
King Scorpython takes 3 dmg from the Iron Cross. Cardinal: Vivi?
I will hold on just a bit longer.
⚔️
P4: Assassinate. P4: (D6+x3)={2,1,1},{4,4,1}.
King Scorpython takes 4 damage from P4. Vivi: I release shadow bind.
3B: Create lightning rod. How do you plan to hold it up there? I don't know yet. 3B is going to go Back to the Future for us! XD 😆
Natalie: GM, do I have time to refocus my light spell to turn it into Sun Ray? Yes, barely.
Natalie: I use Sun Ray at where its tail connects to the body. Roll with advantage please. Natalie: (D6+)=6,2. The King Scorpython takes 2 damage. Cardinal: You see the monster adjusting its tail and rotating its legs to remove the chain attached to it.
Ledia: Anyone has an ability to tell how many hit points a monster has?
Vivi: I should be able to tell after shadow bind. Vivi, roll with advantage please. Vivi: (D6+)=4,6.
Cardinal: Vivi felt that the monster has 30 hit points.
🏹
Zoey: Barrage. I am aiming at the legs to tie them to the wood pillars. 5 with advantage. Zoey: (D6+ x5)={6,6,4,4,3},{6,6,6,4,4}
Cardinal: The barrage hit all five legs Zoey aimed for. As the vine arrows tighten, you hear popping sound as three of the joints broke.
The King Scorpython takes 3 damage. Cardinal: Everyone except Mikela roll 1 die please.
Mikela: Hey Hey Hey! Red said this is a good time for a CLIFF HANGER as the Hellapagos King Scorpython will choose a second lucky winner to eat mud! Will the party triumph? Or will we see our first TPK? Stay tune for the next episode on Magic Bakery Plays Hellapagos!!

To change to the JQuery format for the Calendar, I'll move the JQuery-able contents to a Blogger *Page*! StarTree: Pages are on a separate tab in the Blogger Editor! Doing so will let us change its url freely!
😊
After practice, I can do lip trills without putting my fingers on my cheeks! Red: Congratulations! 🎂 Ledia: What do you mean? Evelyn: Like this: Br. B.. I lost it... 😖 Ledia: Hmm...? P4: She did it earlier. Brrrrrrrrrrr~~~ Evelyn: Kids can do it naturally... 😖 Ledia: Then can Red do it? Red: Of course I can! Pr. P.. Evelyn: It's not about age! It's about relaxation ... 😖 Red: Pr.. P.. P..!
Worried that he would forget the 4-digit passcode to a computer, a programmer wrote down a hint next to the computer. A year later, the programmer returned and sure enough he had forgotten the passcode. The hint was "English". What is the passcode?
Amelia: Is it formed by digits that look like the alphabets? Black: No.

Backup Log
⭐
Blogger and Guild Spreadsheets are backed up to OneDrive. Blogger: Content, CSS, Theme. Guild Spreadsheets: Log, Script Maker, Inventory. James: @Ivy, Is the calendar ready if I want to add December 2021? Are you planning any big change to the calendar? Ivy: The next changes for the Calendar would be making the calendar itself automatically generated. This means we won't have to create a page for each month. But I don't have a plan to do that soon. I will make JQuery sort Div first. James: Great plan, Ivy! Then I will make sure that the monthly calendars I add are so unique that you give up trying to generate them automatically. Ivy: Thanks, Dad. Zoey: I can't tell if you two are being serious or sarcastic! XD 🤣

👑 Top: 16 Casey 8 Evelyn 7 James 6 Albatross 6 P4 6 Ledia 5 Vladanya 5 LRRH 4 Sylvia 4 Arcacia 4 StarTree 3 Zoey 3 Tanya 2 V 2 Natalie 1 Ken 1 Kisaragi
Getting Toys
⭐
Do we have a guild policy on getting toys? Red: It has to be cute. Casey: What about this? Red: It is cute except the crossbones. Ivy: We have lots of LEGOs already. I thought we were trying to get rid of them. Red: But pirates is kind of Casey's theme. Casey: To be precise, it is treasure hunting. Ivy: The problem with LEGOs is that once you get one, you would want to get more. Then you will need a place to put them since you won't be taking apart what you built. Casey: I can make space for it. Ivy: I oppose because it has nothing to do with the guild's goal. You are free to play and display it in your place. Casey: What if I build Magic Bakery? Then it will promote the guild by drawing LEGO fans attention. Red: I'm leaning for it because it is cute. Ivy: Do you mean you will get the pirate set and build a bakery from it? Or are you talking about a separate project to build a LEGO Magic Bakery in addition to displaying a pirate ship? Zoey: What if that ship is the Albatross? Ivy: The Albatross doesn't look like a pirate ship at all. It is not even the same color. The Albatross was white... Zoey: Couldn't we just make it different this time around? We can make it whatever we want. Red: I am still leaning toward a yes. Especially when they would build Magic Bakery. I want to see that. Casey: I don't see why we can't just build it together. Red: I am ready to approve that as a guild activity. Ivy: Couldn't you just have 3B draw it? Then we don't need a physical model. Casey: If you do that I can't really participate. Besides, 3B hasn't drawn anything for months. Ivy: If you build a LEGO Magic Bakery set, then she really won't be drawing anything. Casey: Why not? If anything it should make it easier to draw having a model to look at. Ivy: By then you would just take photographs, and the guild website will look like a LEGO fan site. Casey: If we take photos, we could just keep them in its own thread. I am not controlling what is shown in the calendar. Evelyn: Does this mean... each of us will have a LEGO person? Ivy: It won't look exactly like you. Evelyn: I'm curious... 😳 Red: This is Ivy as a Minifig. Evelyn: CUTE!! It looks like you! Ivy: I didn't ask for it. But more importantly, it can't depict each of us. So I am against using LEGO as our art medium. Evelyn: What about these other LEGO people? Are they... someone? Red: They were in another story and are townsfolks at Freedom Plaza. In fact 3B drew at least three of them. Evelyn: I wish that they would join our story.
Issues: 8 | Quests: 587
TIER 1: 7 Cardinal
TIER 2: 21 Treasure 20 Skill 19 Guild 18 Makeover 17 Seed 3 Puzzle 2 Freedom
TIER 3: 48 Manga 46 Paladin 30 Whale 22 Wish 15 Music ✅ 13 Book 5 Vacation 3 Happy 2 Board
TIER 4: 58 Arena 56 Carrot 53 Concept

7






2






2
SCOREBOARD
🥨 Players: Casey, Evelyn, Ivy, LRRH, Zoey
⭐ Merits: Casey
🏅 Recognitions:
💟 Kudos:
💗 Awards:
👑 Top: 7 Casey 2 Patricia 2 Kisaragi 2 Ivy 2 Arcacia 2 LRRH 2 Evelyn 1 Albatross 1 Ken 1 V 1 Natalie 1 P4 1 Ledia 1 Zoey 1 StarTree
🌴 Hellapagos Finale
King Scorpython
March 6, 2022 Sunday
Vacation Island
⭐
The Heroes were fighting the King Scorpython in heavy rain. Mikela had been KO'ed. Ledia, StarTree, and Natalie are almost out of mana. It is now the start of Round 3. Everyone except Mikela roll one die please.
Natalie: We got new dice! Then everyone can have their color. We lost yellow... 😅 That would be me. Cardinal: Result: Ledia: D20=10. StarTree: D20=16. 3B: D20=19. P4: D20=3. Vivi: D20=18. Zoey: D20=15. Natalie: D20=10. Evelyn: D20=13.
P4: May I dodge? I can hear things coming.
Cardinal: In the heavy rain, P4 suddenly hear something she had never heard before, a sound that seemed to come from all directions. Then it went dark for her. The others see that a giant snake head had appeared, having swallowed P4 whole.
P4 takes 1 damage. P4 is now KO'ed.
Ledia: With my sword still in the monster, I stun it with shock.
Cardinal: The shock going through the body didn't stun the snake head. It went for Ledia and bumped her off. Ledia crashes a distance from the King Scorpython. She is out of breath and out of mana.
Protect on Ledia has broken.
Natalie: Is the head attached or moving on its own?
Cardinal: As Natalie wondered about that, the head goes at her at an angle like a whip.
Natalie: I dodge and shoot it with water jet. Roll with advantage twice please. Natalie: (D20+)x2 = {16,19}, {4,1} Cardinal: (D20)=12
Cardinal: Natalie dodged the attack, but the water jet missed. The head then goes for Evelyn.
Evelyn: I cast Protect.
🏹
Zoey: I release Barrage at the head. I am aiming for the moment when the head hits Evelyn. Evelyn, roll with advantage. Zoey, barrage with advantage. Evelyn: D20+ = 15, 5. Zoey: D20+x5={5,5,11,20,9} {20,11,8,5,2}
Cardinal: The head hit Protect just in time for two of the arrows to land. The impact still sent Evelyn flying.
Evelyn takes 1 damage. King Scorpython takes 2 damage. Protect is now in effect for the party except Evelyn. Cardinal: The head is momentarily tied to the ground by vine arrows.
Vivi: Accel, Shadow Claws on the head. Once with advantage please Vivi: D20+={6,7}. Cardinal: D20=7.
King Scorpython takes 1 damage. It is no longer stunned. Cardinal: At this point, lightning hits the lightning rod. 3B, roll once please. 3B: D20=3.
Cardinal: The lightning passes through 3B down the chain... Cardinal: D20=19. ... To the body, but did not go further as most damage were dealt to 3B. 3B takes 4 lightning damage. King Scorpython takes 1 lightning damage. 3B is KO'ed. Cardinal: The King Scorpython is momentarily stunned as StarTree sees 3B falls from the sky.
3B: I'm sorry.
StarTree: StarTree doesn't know what to do!
Zoey: Just hit, it only has 3 hit points left.
StarTree: StarTree hits it with the axe. Roll twice please. StarTree: D20x2 = 10,18. StarTree is now recognized to have Melee Attack Rank B. King Scorpython takes 1 damage. It is no longer stunned.
Cardinal: The axe hit the King Scorpython and broke a pipe. High concentration poison gas leaked out and filled the area. Dealing 3 poison damage to all without poison resist, and 2 to those who do. At the same time, the head detaches itself and start to burrow into the ground.
Zoey: Erm.. I think I am KO'ed.
StarTree: StarTree will plug the leak!
Cardinal: StarTree plugs the leak. Everyone other than StarTree takes 1 poison damage and feel light headed.
Zoey is KO'ed. Ledia: I attack it. You are exhausted. You only have time to get up the monster to pull out your sword.
Vivi: Accel, Shadow Claw once then Shadow Bind. Roll once with advantage. Vivi: D20+=3,3. You missed. I know that.
Cardinal: The King Scorpython is stunned.
Natalie: I don't have any attack left that can do 2 damages in one hit.
Ledia: Use my sword. I pull it out and give it to Natalie.
Natalie: I take the sword and swiftly and carefully drive it down the head. Cardinal: D20=6. Cardinal: How do you want to do this?
⚔️
Natalie: After taking the sword, I scoop up and drive it into the part that tries to escape.
Cardinal: The sword drove deep into the King Scorpython. A low winding noise hums through its body as it collapses into the muddy ground. WIth the camouflage disabled, a hatch near its neck pops open and spills out P4 covered in synthetic mucus. I catch P4.
Cardinal: In the mud are Mikela, 3B, and Zoey.
Evelyn: I want to try Raise II.
Cardinal: Roll 3 dice as a skill check. If they all fail, you lose 1 mana and no one is raised. If you get two success, it works this time at Rank B. If you get three success, you get Rank B Raise II and Rank A Raise 1. Okay. Raise II is hard to level up so I need to try. Evelyn wants us to get KO'ed more often XD 🤣 That's not what I mean! 😖 I am just kidding. XD 🤣 Evelyn: Spirits of light, please revive our fallen friends so we may escape this island together.
Evelyn: D20x2={12,19,7}. Evelyn is now recognized for Raise 2 Rank B. Evelyn: I raise Mikela and 3B. Because... kids are easier to carry back... 😅
Mikela and 3B are revived at 1 hit point.
3B: Thank you.
🎤
Mikela: Congratulations! You beat the snake! Now it's time to gather supplies and to get off the island! I blow my Conch and sing Song of March to recharge mana. Roll 3 dice for skill test please. Mikela: D20x3={13, 5, 3}. Mikela is recognized for Song of March Rank B. The Heroes party other than Mikela recovers 1 mana each. Mikela: How many times can I sing and skill test? I would say once per session for skill test, and once per scene for singing. Then the effect of Song of March should be bigger. 1 mana is too little. I will consider upgrading it when your Song of March is Rank A.
Cardinal: The Heroes party recovers 1 mana from resting.
Evelyn: I revive Zoey and P4.
Zoey and P4 are revived to 1 hit point.
Natalie: So. I assume I would gather or would have gathered 6 water with my Flask?
Ledia: Is there anything I can loot from the snake?
Cardinal: You don't know what the snake might have. You could choose to salvage or gather after drinking coffee.
Zoey: According to Helen, we have almost taken everything useful from the salvage deck. Does the Snake have its own loot deck? Cardinal: You took a casual glance and notice nothing that would stand out to be useful for escaping the island. Then I guess I will just drink the Coffee and chop wood then...
Fishing
March 6, 2022 Sunday
Beach
⭐
After fighting and defeating the King Scorpython, the castaways gathered supplies for the day.
Cardinal: @Casey, draw for fishing result please. You have a fishing rod, so you may draw two balls from the bag.
Casey: Do we get to use Advantages?
Yes, but each time you use it you need a different reason. Hmm... I will just draw first and see. Casey: (Ball x2)=1,1. I use an advantage that I am patient. Casey: (Ball x2)=2,1. I am good at swimming. Casey: (Ball x2)=2,1. This is way harder than it looks...
V: May I also fish at the same time? Yes, and everyone else who plan to fish. Sasha, we fish together. Let's see how lucky we are. Sasha: (Ball x1)=2. I use my Lucky trait. Sasha: (Ball x1)=1. I guess 2 is not too bad.
Tanya: We should try to get a 3, within reason. Tanya: (Ball x1)=1. I use Insight for Casey. Oh, thanks. Casey: (Ball x2)=3,1. Hey, it is working!
LRRH: Do you want bait? Yes!
Casey: Can I use Bait and Insight at the same time and draw 3 balls to keep two?
I like that idea. And if the GM allows it, we should stack it even more so we draw all balls and choose two. Then I stack my patience and good at swimming. The fishing rod already lets you draw two balls. So with a stack of 4 advantages, you would be able to draw all balls. @GM? Who is the GM? I assume it is Sasha since this is not combat. I am okay with it because this feels more cooperative and less tedious. But, @Cardinal, could you GM the rest of the game? I am a player. It feels weird to be GM'ing at the same time. If you want me to GM, I will add details to the rule. That's fine.
Cardinal: With a stack of five advantages (including the fishing rod), roll 6 dice. As long as not all of them fail, you succeed and get 5 fish. Otherwise it is an epic failure. An epic failure would prevent you from fishing again today. I like it. Hold on. @Tanya, is this a good deal or not? If I do nothing, I get 4 fish. If I gamble, I either get 5 fish or none for today. If you gamble, your chance of getting no fish is only 1 in 64, that is about 1.5%. That's not exactly what I'm asking. Your answer would be the same even if I didn't already have 4 fishes. But the more fish I have, the more risky the deal is. What is that risk?
Ivy: That's cost-benefit analysis. Ivy: (Ball x1) = 3. Holy moly I need to go back to the lab. You kids can figure it out.
Ivy gets 3 fish. Ivy is now recognized to be Lucky Rank A.
Tanya: I see.
Sasha: The cost of gambling is 4 fish because that is what you are betting. The benefit is...98.5% to get 5 fish, which is 4.9. So you should still do it.
Tanya: Hold on. I think we should see V's result first, then start with the lowest risk gamble.
V: I fish.
V: (Ball x1) = 1.
Cardinal: By the way, I am allowing a free attempt without advantages just because it could save time. If the opportunity is unique I will tell you beforehand that you have only one chance and need to stack your advantages if you decide to do so. So Casey, Sasha/Tanya, and V, each of you have one chance to stack advantages and try again if you choose to do so.
V: Instead of "fishing", may I just use Ice Carousel and get 3 fish? Yes. V gets 3 fish with Ice Carousel.
Tanya: With this there is no reason to take more risk. We should now have 17 water and 17 food to leave. If the wood gathering team would return with 17 rafts. What if they don't? Then we leave Natalie, Red, and V behind. Red makes coffee brownies again and feed the group of three for the day and give each two actions. Natalie and V get their usual resources then all go finish their own rafts. There is no risk. I still want to see stacked advantages at least once before we leave. Now I have 2 fish. With a stack of 5 advantages, 98% to get 3. I get 2.94 at the cost of 2. It is a better deal than 4.9 at cost of 4.
@Cardinal, I want to be recognized for the skill Foresee. It allows me to preview the result of a die roll. But that takes the fun out of me. We are in the same fishing team. You and me. Well, then let's split up. You foresee your fishing and I just roll. You can't stop me from using foreseeing on your roll. I don't mind if you foresee my result. Just let me roll and you may look at it before I look at it. ... @Cardinal, since we rolled a 2, each of us have 1 fish. I want to bet my fish and roll again. Your gain will be tiny. If you get a 3 ball that counts at 1.5. I just want to roll more dice! I help you with insight. And I use Foresee on your roll. I give you bait. I give you fishing guidance. I'll help you freeze it. Plus my luck that is a stack of 5. @Cardinal, how do you want to do this?
Cardinal: First, Tanya rolls 3 dice for skill check. Tanya: (D20x3)={5,18,16}
Tanya is recognized to have the skill Foresee Rank B. Cardinal: Then Sasha rolls 6 dice for Tanya to see. That's just creepy since I have already decided to roll. Sasha: (D20x6)={7,7,2,1,1,1} Casey: HOLY MOLY! Sasha NEEDS stronger Lucky!
Sasha: Well. from your reaction it can only mean one thing. If Tanya tells me not to go forward I would listen.
Tanya: You should just keep what you have.
Sasha: Well. I am not a stubborn person. I got to roll and it was fun. I listen to Tanya and keep my fish. Let me see what I rolled.
It could be worse... Still, that's six tails in a row! and three 1's from D20! You were going to drown or something. @Tanya, what did you see? I don't want to imagine bad things happening to my friends. Cardinal gives Tanya Kudos. Sasha: Although I wouldn't mind if you do.
Casey: Now that we have foresee, can I see if I can get 5 fish? I don't have enough mana for that. V is level 11. Foresee costs me 1 mana per dice. I already used 7 mana. If I use insight on you, I can only see three of your dice. I only need 1 die to succeed though. Tanya: @Cardinal, Helen is only level 7. If we need to use abilities tonight, do we max out at 7 mana?
Cardinal: There is no rule on limiting mana now or tonight. You have 19 mana remaining.
Tanya: I see. Casey, do you want me to read your fortune?
I don't want to waste your mana. Could you read it one by one. I only need 1 to succeed. Tanya, your current Foresee is rank B. You have 50% chance of spending 1 mana without getting a reading. That'll be too tedious. When you decide to use Foresee, roll one die, that costs 1 mana. If it is low, Then the divination fails and you can't use foresee for the same person that day. If it is high, then you can see up to six dice for that person. Total mana cost is 6 at the maximum. I see. Then I'll see if I can tell Casey's fortune. Tanya: (D20)=18. I will keep rolling. Tanya: (D20...) = 3, 12.
Tanya: Casey, if we give you advantage, you will succeed. Then I do it.
Casey gets 5 fish. Casey: I still want to see the rest of my four dice... Casey: (D20 x6)={3,12,12,2,6,5} Scary.
Tanya: Let's return to camp and resolve today.
Final Puzzle
March 6, 2022 Sunday
Camp Site
⭐
The Castaway gathered at the camp site to tally their harvest.
Tanya: Food 18, water 21, rafts 14.3. Details: StarTree 8 wood with axe and bonus during combat; Ledia 6 wood after drinking coffee. James and Kisaragi 14 wood each with coffee brownies and 2 person saw. Patricia and Black 6 wood each. Details: Natalie 10 water with flask. Helen and Arcacia 3 water each. Details: Ivy 3 fish; V 3 fish, Casey 5 fish, Sasha and Tanya 1 fish each.
Sasha: We could almost all leave tonight.
Tanya: If we really want to, StarTree could just make 3 rafts right now since we could use as much mana as our level.
Sasha: But there is no challenge and no drama. We could have just left on Day 1.
Tanya: Evelyn, do you still prefer we all leave tonight, or is it okay to leave some behind to leave tomorrow? I have a plan for that.
Evelyn: I still prefer us leaving together, although I don't want to make it stressful for anyone. 😖
Black: Let's talk while we eat.
Helen: I bring out the fruit basket.
Casey: Thematically, do we really want to leave during heavy rain? It seems unsafe.
Evelyn: Wouldn't it be good if it stops raining when we leave? Cardinal: (D20)=13.
Cardinal: As Evelyn wondered when the rain would stop, the rain seemed to be getting softer.
Black: We are banking on heavy rain so the "flies" don't come out.
Evelyn: I wish that the flies do not come regardless. 😖 Evelyn, roll with advantage please. Evelyn: (D20+) = {7,18}
Cardinal: Soon after the castaway started eating, the rain subsided. The air was fresh, the sky was beautiful, and there was no sign that any insect was going to come. It seems completely safe if they want to leave tonight.
Mikela: But I don't want to just leave with rafts that StarTree summons from nowhere. That is just anti-climatic. How about we have a contest for the best idea to leave together tonight?
3B: Could we repair the boat? We don't have a relevant skill to repair fiberglass hull. If we tie rafts to it, it willl just drag the rafts down with it.
Zoey: I know it won't work but I can summon a giant toad. They can't swim in saltwater.
Black: If your ability is back, you could just teleport us back.
Mikela: Actually I would prefer that than to be on a raft for another day.
Sasha: Is that it? Are we sick of this game setting and ready to move on to another one?
Evelyn: I prefer games that we don't have to think about leaving someone behind... 😅
Sasha: In terms of game mechanics, do you feel that there is anything we can learn from this game?
Ivy: I do like how the constraints force us to make plans. If we had just more people from food or water gathering on wood gathering today, We would have enough rafts to leave, since we could argue that Red and Natalie could gather food and water even on their rafts, we really only need 15 water and 15 food at the time we leave. Helen, Arcacia, and I could have went to gather wood. Then we would have enough to leave together. We were adding too many rules to update the plan. But we knew Natalie and Red's abilities since Day 1. I am not forgiving myself for such blantant error.
James: Feeling that he hasn't been getting any attention as he deserves, James said, we have 14 out of 17 rafts. If I could drift on anyone of them, there is no way they can't carry us all if we just join some of them. Tanya: That depends on how StarTree had been building them. StarTree copied what James did on the first day! Wee~~~!
Ivy: This could work if on average everyone else weigh less than 80% of James' weight. From the look of it... This could be true...
Helen: Then when we join two rafts together, it could carry two adults and one kid. CUTE!!! If adults other than James takes 0.8 and kids take only 0.4 then we only need 13.8 rafts. 7 rafts for 21 people. It is perfect.
Mikela: It looks like we have a WINNER!
James: If you let James play, James will always save the day. We drift free tonight!
James is recognized as Rank S Free'ku Master. Mikela: And so the castaway formed three-people rafts and drift to safety! The End!
Tanya: Are we not actually picking who to drift with? Who do you want to drift with, Tanya? Arcacia. And? Patricia. Raft #1 is ready! If it is not random, can I take Red and V? Free food and free ice cream! Raft #2 is ready! Casey: Then I pick James and Ivy. To save some trouble. Raft #3 is ready! Then I pick Mikela and StarTree! Wee~~! Raft #4 is ready! Kisa. Raft #5 is ready! 3B and Black. Raft #6 is ready! Ledia and Helen 😃 Raft #7 is ready!
Sasha: That's all folks. That's for playing! Our next game will be Wonder Woman Challenge of the Amazons!

March Goal
Tidying Showcase
⭐
My goal for Treasure this month is to tidy the showcase area. Casey: To do so, I'm going to removing everything and start over. Things that don't fit will be kept in boxes or be donated. Evelyn: Are we talking about just the showcases? Or everywhere...? Casey: I was planning to tidy just the showcases. Why? Evelyn: KonMari said it is more efficient if we tidy by item type instead of by area... Otherwise, we might discover more things of the same type to tidy and we won't have a place for them...😅 Casey: I think we are in Rule 3: Finish Discarding First. I'm going to put everything in the showcases in boxes. Then we sort out what we want to keep and return to the showcase. Casey: When the showcases are empty, we might also decide a new place for them. Evelyn: Okay. Sasha: I think we should move the showcases because they aren't getting proper lighting. You can't really see what they have when you pass by them. Tanya: I like the way it is, out of sight and unnoticeable. It is too colorful and distracting otherwise.
⭐
Sasha: I want to see them when we play games. Sasha: If Tanya doesn't want to see them, she can sit with her back to them. Tanya: I'm fine with that. Evelyn: It seems we will make many changes. Perhaps more than we can handle...? 😅 Casey: Putting things in boxes and putting away those we don't need is my goal. We can decide the rearrangement when things become easy to move. Tanya: I suggest first putting everything on the table in boxes. I think we need to move the table. Evelyn: There are so many cute things on the table... 😅 Tanya: They will come back. But perhaps not on the table.

March Goal
Tidying Showcase
⭐
This weekend we ended up tidying almost everything in the game room except the display area...😅 We will continue next week after donating all the things we don't need. Somehow we made a lot of room. I don't think it was just because we put stuff away... How did we end up having so much room? We put away almost all of the picture frames. We filled up some boxes that were not full. I think we stacked things higher along the walls. I like how we have a complete garbage sorting in the game room: paper, compost, recyclable and trash. I like how the monitor is not facing a wall. I like the big space where we can sit on cushions. I can't tell whether I like this until we play games here. We didn't start a game... 😖 We didn't do anything except tidying the room. I think we are behind in Cardinal Quest.
Casey: Who will play the game? It is a 2 to 5 player cooperative game. I think we can all play. We could just make it a 6 player game. Who plays Ares? No one needs to play Ares. His actions are decided. Are we playing as ourselves or as the DC characters? That's up to you. The point of the game is to have fun and see what we can use in our game. But I heard this game is a strategy game. We might have abilities that would break the game. If you want to play yourself, please start with abilities in the game.

Cardinal Quest
March 15, 2022 Tuesday
Deer Crossing
⭐
So. How do we do Cardinal Quest nowadays? We are obviously doing Cardinal Quest almost every day, but there is no story and the day counter for Cardinal Quest doesn't reset. @StarTree, what is going on?
StarTree: The typos you fixed for previous story will count as an update! You should see the tracker reset tomorrow! That feels like a cheap shot though.
Tanya: We are at Wisp Circle. Who wants to help upgrade the leyline? It is only barely holding together. I would help but I don't know how. 😖
Tanya: The leyline node at Wisp Circle is that it needs to switch depending mana type. Right now, we need the wisps that enter to cast a spell to do the switching before they can cast a spell in their language. What we really want is for the crystal aura to automatically decipher the language as they cast the spell.
Tanya: Previously, we have already decided 9 intonations the aura would check to tell what leyline to open. These 9 intonations together will control five mana gates. Let's start with the two easiest two intonations that controls the Arcacian gate.
Evelyn: Okay. So the 7th intonation would start the Arcacian aura, and the 8th intonation will stop it. But how do we make the crystal do it? By the way, I'm here. This seems like an interesting topic.
Tanya: Let's find an example where the Crystal does something similar.
Zoey: I'll check to see if the Arcacian gate already checks for intonation.
Zoey: I found something... I found a map of other intonations being used by the crystal, but not the ones we want. That's expected because... that's why we need to add them.
Zoey: @GM, do I get recognized for something? I think I found a clue. I think you would already have high tracking skills. What do you want to be recognized for? How about "intuition" as applied to tracking? If there is no clue, I would tend to pick the right path where I would find the next clue.
Zoey receives Zoey is recognized to have Intuition Rank A.
Ledia: I also want to get some skills, but... I'm not really following what I need to do.
Zoey: Let's make a step by step guide on how we do this. Where should we put that guide?
Tanya: Let's add it to the biggest field book. Then we don't need to know which book to check. Since there is only one book.
Evelyn: I like that idea 😃
Zoey has left bread crumbs. Zoey: May I be recognized for another skill Bread Crumb? This allows others to follow my trail as I pursue things.
Zoey is recognized to have Bread Crumb Rank S. Zoey: Sweet.
LRRH: It looks like someone gets it!
Little Red Riding Hood gives Kudos to Zoey for having bakery-themed skill! Zoey: XD 🤣
Ledia: Thanks to Zoey's bread crumbs, I found something I can do. But it is late. Could we continue tomorrow?
Tanya: Yes, let's do that. This is not entirely urgent. We could even do it in the weekend.
Evelyn: I like this pace 😃.
Sasha: Just for my understanding. If you get to choose, would you rather play Adventure Begin, Wonder Woman, or Cardinal Quest this coming weekend? Cardinal Quest. Cardinal Quest 😃 Cardinal Quest 😆 Care to tell why? Cardinal Quest gives way more EXP. That is, if you leave me enough bread crumbs so I could get to where I could do something. We are actually helping the Wisps and that is important to me. We are helping people and having fun at the same time. We played Adventure Begin already, and I'm not interested in a "strategy game" as you said for Wonder Woman. 🤣
Sasha: Okay. Let's do Cardinal Quest this weekend first. @StarTree, could you set the schedule?
StarTree: It's done!

Relationship History
March 17, 2022 Thursday
Magic Bakery
⭐
For online dating, if someone says they are looking for a serious relationship which means "never married",
those who have married or divorced should know that they are disqualified, right?
Tanya: How is it phrased? "In a partner, I'm looking for...: Serious relationship. (Never married, no kids)" I agree that those who are married are disqualified. I think you shouldn't give up so easily... 😅 Why don't you tell them and let them consider anyway?
Evelyn casts Wish: "I wish things will work out." Evelyn receives Black: Then what should I reply? They said they want to start with a simple intro with 3 things the other should know about them. The first thing they list is "Never married, no kids." If you follow their protocol, then you would reply with 3 things they should know about you. If I answer according to their priority, I would first say I was married and had no kid. But that answer would be misleading because the situation was complicated... 😖 But that is why he would be disqualified. They are specifically looking for people with simple history. Black does not qualify. So just let them look for someone else. Black deserves a second chance. 😢 You can't force or trick people to give you a second chance. That is not Arcacian.
Tanya receives
LRRH: But the reply can't be cold. That is not Magic Bakery-ish. Not Pan-arcadian.
LRRH receives Black: Is this okay: "1. Married for 8 months five years ago. No kids. Still a kid. Have tenants. 🐣 I think this is a good response. 🙂
Ledia: Tanya, if Black gives this response, how likely will he get a reply? Low. They seem to be in a hurry. So they might not reply. @Cardinal, I call that they will reply at least once. If they do, can I level up my Oracle skill? I'd allow that. Yes! 😅
StarTree: Sorry to interrupt! Does this post qualifies as a Cardinal Quest post? StarTree is confused! Cardinal Quest is not just about gamifying "work", but "life" itself. So, yes, this is part of Cardinal Quest. Then should I change point 3 to "Gamify work for EXP 40 hours weekly. Only eats lunch. Treasure hunting weekly. 👑" It sounds more fun 😊
Zoey: Why don't you run it through grammarly? Actually, I'd just run it for you... ✌️ Optimistic 5, 😊 Friendly 4, 🤝 Confident 3. Grammarly approved! 😊
Black: Then I am sending it. Thanks, all.
Black gives kudos to Cardinal, Evelyn, Ledia, LRRH, StarTree, Tanya, Zoey for advices and support.

Minifigures
March 18, 2022 Friday
Magic Bakery
⭐
What do we feel like doing this weekend?
We planned for Cardinal Quest this weekend, but I think we have caught up somewhat.
Casey: The pirate ship arrived. Who wants to build "The Albatross"? What is it? It is a LEGO pirate ship. But I think our plan is to make it into the Albatross.
Ledia: Isn't the Albatross supposed to be really different? If it is cute then it is fine.
Black: Do we take pictures of us building it? Yea. Why not. If you want to be in the picture, then make yourself a minifigure. I don't think there are enough kid faces... 😖 It doesn't have to look like you. It can be anything. Okay 😅
LRRH: To make your minifigure, you may use these parts over here, but not those. Those already belong to someone. Okay 😊
Evelyn: It is harder than it seems... 😖 Just don't be too picky. I made myself, see? I want a pirate hat. You'll get one when we open the set. Actually... There is a whole other box of minifigure parts to choose from... Here. OMG, I'm gonna keep making! XD 🤣
StarTree: StarTree made herself! Wee~~ This is me then 😊 I'm going full ranger XD 🤣 P4 made one. Cute!! And this is me. No pirate hat? It looks weird without hair. But this one looks really like you.😊 Sasha's hat XD 🤣 I made Queen Vivi also.

202203191203|Team Building
March 19, 2022 Saturday
Harbor

⭐
Welcome to our first team BUILDING event! My plan is to build the ship according to the instruction, and make changes as we go to make the ship the Albatross.
Tanya wants to be the one taking pictures. The old camera is fogged up. Is it reparable? It has moisture in between the lenses. Why don't we just use the phone to take pictures? I think it can be fixed but it takes times to dry it. Let's continue with the phone. Ok.
Casey: P4, do you want to open the box? Okay 💟 P4 opens the box.
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEj-PvaSUpGxj_zUHX1Q40r2OzEzNtp_9xHo_NHXR4cMUNpxgkbidDKZzlkoQoWhY3yNPAiEAL1NDWAutYjLcOfUjJ2za2FVnA_LQljDZ1GwCVw8mISUh6LnsFjEDMR_Nc-fi5g7rjFwFhg2xqPK2LCMje9td9X6z7XxuVWwU-pCI8UOUBLp7soZpOm8Og"}
Cute!! 😊
Casey: The first bag are the people. Do we make those people alive?
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEhtv3AkL9l2u-ua8Bc29fyQV9wO-URT7JevK0hzomZCSaTyLscIr2RybHnZFZ2GdKtixDplcUbBCLoiP6U8Ffx7wnsX8NpPr8wR4sd7J_sFJhIf4LZomzUBPMeWgQliMKYdhFrFksA7m9uO1ik9-c4OKf85QON9UjHJ-Ig7BSxn2-qnmeWxpwxQoik2rA"}
What if they don't want their ship altered? 😅 I wish that they would let us. @Cardinal. Evelyn, roll with advantage please. Sasha turned this into an RPG XD 🤣 Evelyn: (D20+)={20,2} 😃 Natural 20 XD Evelyn wakes up the pirate crew, the bird and the shark.
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEisJi0aaLZixUZoR6Q9mgm5k-sR2FJeipPTvROniIKblpthcKohO74QNrWF_o6_Xc6O3AT21poGpXwqSfDzq4K_HrMjlJpwMJ5UucccMqf3XOVOzSe_5-Hln4UgosQwu_-MXYWR5F_ABui3XCCHsZQUF225YxRRZ95OhlB8-gYr7xj7ZE6wBE_bUVWrvg"}
Sasha: (Captain): Rumor has it that you all plan to take our ship. That can't be right. You'll need to give us something in return. What would you like? (Captain): How about... your LIFE? 😅
Zoey: Do we need to "take" their ship? I thought we were just changing it. (Captain): If you change it, how is it still mine? You'll still be the captain? (Captain): But I'll be forced to do your missions. If that's not slavery I don't know what is. Sasha, why are you making this difficult? Evelyn rolled a natural 20. Cardinal, ARP. There is no contradiction yet.
Evelyn: We are from the guild Magic Bakery and we are trying to build a peacemaking ship. I hope that you would join us. We would go on mission together, it would be fun and meaningful! 😃 (Captain): How is a toy ship going to make peace? I don't fully know yet, but we can find out together... 😅 (Captain): This is too vague. I need a better reason.
Casey: There are many LEGO fans out there. If we use LEGO to help talk about peace, then hopefully we will get a bigger audience, which will help us spread peaceful ideas. (Captain): That's more like it. I shall appoint you to be our Navigator!
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEid-YsGDnv2GliMW76od_xv3SfK301RsBJPuYSlunYsK5wdU5Re9n8kVky_t_sJaEXfYY3GOvtAyQ4QxbXXJluHriqMAo7qct9AJeLltMPlyniPQebE66I9-YxV1m2e63hkpvCABRqTckUMG-mwfvtjIkxt1v3emhcdUtnfBzBLhe2Nvu5tt9NMPgm2qA"}
Thank you! (Captain): Now let's get to building! To peace we build! 😊🙏
Casey is now recognized as a Navigator.
LRRH: Look, P4 made the shark happy!
{"cmd":"img","src":"https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEheveELl4k4LYxBexI_FtzHUcxz9snPs72TssxlHBBMRpYdLQHf7rZ1Ffhcz405QU1qmeu_JK4UmDio4CLPIb8ypv32j5ZTlb4U9Ty-TpcsMqr3F67UhvW1qZiFsbKdgbd6hlhQdNcf-WSpXDvkF4WLidgFdrBoNnHv811EyKZyUfEwkU-pugLsROoetA"}
CUTE!!! 😍 That IS the instruction. Evelyn gives Kudos to LEGO for the happy shark.
The Ship
March 19, 2022 Saturday
Harbor
⭐
And so, we continued building the ship.

Maybe... not on a peacemaker ship? 😅 Like, on the shark? That will totally make it look like a warplane. At least that would be separate. But it shouldn't be on animals. They don't choose to fight for people. Agreed. Let's continue and get back to this question later.

LRRH: How about replacing it with a gold cap?

Casey: For the sails, what do you think about this design?

👑 Top: 8 StarTree 5 Casey 5 Tanya 4 Arcacia 4 LRRH 3 V 3 Natalie 3 Sylvia 3 Vivi 3 P4 3 Ledia 3 Evelyn 3 Black 2 Kisaragi 2 James 1 44 1 Amelia 1 Neil 1 Cardinal 1 Ivy 1 Sasha 1 Zoey
Intermittent Fasting
March 21, 2022 Monday
Magic Bakery

⭐
I am marking March 9th as the date to be the start of our intermittent fasting trial.
Really? It took you two weeks to start after watching the video? Frankly I don't remember when we started. That was the day Red decided I could get Guild Credit for tracking it. I thought fasting is only for adults. I didn't say I am doing it. It is just the day I start getting credits for tracking. For those who wants to join, I'll keep track of some health stats and investigate whether you are becoming more or less healthy.
Ledia: Do we also get credits for trying? No. Why not? We are helping you as guinea pigs. No you are not. I'm curious, but the data I get from you is not applicable to someone else. You are helping yourself, and I'm helping you figure out whether you are healthier. But normally Paladins get credits for training and exercise. This is not a paladin program. I'm just offering a service. You are welcome to join for free. There is no pressure one way or another. You don't get points for joining and you don't get points deducted for not joining.
Tanya: People don't normally get points for just staying healthy. You only get credits for bringing new healthy ideas or help other be healthy. If you join, even if you don't get credits for joining, you can get credits for sharing new ideas. That is true. Although I don't want people to join hoping to find new ideas every day for credits... and, you don't need to join to get credits for new ideas.
Vivi: What is the "program"? I don't think you described it.
Ivy: I'm sorry. The program is you eat just once a day. Ivy: Since many food takes time to digest, we are doing the meal at lunch. You may eat more than your previous lunch when you had more than one meal per day. In other words, this is not "only eat lunch", but "eating only during lunch". Eat for 1 hour and fast for 23 hours. And what is the purpose? The alleged benefit is that having a short eating time activates reparative pathways and your body will adapt to make itself stronger and healthier. Whereas if you just eat around the clock, the body won't have time to clean up and repair itself. The unrepaired damages manifest as aging. Isn't sleeping supposed to be the time the body repairs itself? This program doesn't change your sleep pattern. But while you are awake, you are to eat just one meal. The question is whether this change in eating habit would improve health. If you want to try tweaking your sleep pattern and see if you are healthy with more or less sleep, you are welcome to try.

March 22, 2022 Tuesday
Magic Bakery

⭐
Who do you think is the most suitable person as "Arcacian Ambassador"?

Tanya: I think it is Red. She does the most talking outside the guild. She is the one actually trying to spread it, even though it is ineffective. "Even though it is ineffective" XD. I shouldn't laugh but it is funny. How can Red do better? I don't think we should answer that question unless Red is the one asking. You could instead ask each of us for ideas to be more efficient than she is. Then I ask that.
Tanya: For me, to be more effective I need the Albatross up and running. The Albatross will be the store of relevant information so I could link to them in online discussions. For the past few months we have been concentrating on Cardinal Quest because it was, and still is pressing. We should get a better balance to work on the Albatross.
Zoey: By Albatross do you mean the Seed of Peace website? Yes. Is there something wrong with it? It is a little too white. It hurts my eyes. ... It has been so long I don't remember what I can do with it XD 😅
Evelyn: I don't think it is that bad, we just need to keep adding content to it. 🙂 I like all the flowers there. 😊
LRRH: When I go to Twitter, I bookmark things that we could discuss. Could we use Seed of Peace to post our discussion results? That was the intended usage. I thought you want to detach the guild from Albatross. You can still detach the guild from the result. But the post would have a link to Red's Twitter. Not necessarily. You could just link to the news article or the original poster whom you are commenting on. Ok.
Ivy: How about we try one of the bookmarked topics? Ok.

LRRH: Today I talked about objective vs universal morality, and veganism Objective and universal morality would be a definition post. Veganism would be a concept post. Let's add a morality post. But I am out of mana. I will add it. By the way, I changed the background to pink. It is better. I like the new background. 😊 Could you also add the calendar back? Please be patient, I am trying to figure out where things are.
Zoey: Need to find an image for morality XD
Zoey: Okay. It is added: Morality. It is pretty! 😊 May I tweet this? I think that is the intended use. Anyone can tweet this. The image doesn't show. Um.... XD 😅
Ivy: It's called Twitter Card. Here Ooo 😲 It looks super cute! 🍰 Yes it does. Tanya gives kudos to Zoey and Ivy for building the Albatross.

March 24, 2022 Thursday
Magic Bakery

⭐
Congratulations! To Ledia who now has Sharingan!
Helpful little background: Last Thursday, Ledia predicted that Black's answer would get a reply despite Tanya said that the chance was low. For the correct prediction, Ledia has earned "Oracle Credit"!
Zoey: Congratulations!
Ledia: I need time to consider whether I want to call it Sharingan or make up something more original. Ledia is now recognized to have Combat Insight Rank A. Rank A, that's generous.
Cardinal: You may change the name and define the specific rules later. The description says "Sharingan" XD 🤣
Evelyn: I hope that the response was positive...? 😅
Black: She thanked me for the intro and asked about how introverted I am out of curiosity. Evelyn thanks Black for sharing. I am going to say I am the most introverted person I know. Is that true though? I can easily think of someone who is even more introverted. They might be so introverted that you forgot about them.
Tanya: Three B. I miss her. 😥 She is so introverted that she feels she is wasting other people's time when she shows up.
Casey: Could we get a blue LEGO hair piece so we could invite her to build her LEGO minifig? Actually I was thinking maybe she should change her hair color. Blue is a well known curse in manga and anime character design. 😅 I wish that 3B would play with us as we would help her in what she needs. 3B is not an NPC. It is up to her. There is no dice roll. Evelyn wishes for 3B's companionship.
Candy Power
⭐
Miles from the nearest repair shop, a driver had a problem with his car in a remote area. He stopped at a little candy store where his problem was quickly solved. What was the problem? 44: Is it a toy car? Mikela: It is a real car! | Robert: There are so many possibilities! Did he just call for help? Mikela: Nope. The problem is fixed there! | Mikela: It is a real car! | Evelyn: Did he just run out of gas, and candy store has fuel to spare? Mikela: Nope. The store being a candy store is relevant. | Zoey: I think it sounds very suspicious that there is a candy store in a remote area. Casey: I think it just means a populated area without an auto shop. I HOPE that the answer is informative, such as certain type of auto problem can actually be fixed by candies... Casey: Is there a small leak and he just needed some chewing gum or something? Mikela: Congratulations! You are correct! He used it to plug a leaking roof in heavy rain! Casey: This is a little too easy but I'll take the win.🤷 Zoey: One more please! XD
🥨 | | He bought chewing gum to plug a leaky roof in the rain!
202203242144|Life Saving Speech
March 24, 2022 Thursday
Puzzle Time

⭐
A politician wrote a speech that saved his life without actually giving the speech. What happened?
Evelyn: Is he a political prisoner, so he wrote a false speech to condemn his oppositions? 😖 The politician was not a prisoner and wrote what he wanted to say! Tanya: Did he spend a long time writing it, so he missed some accident that could have killed him? The speech was long, and that was relevant. But he did not miss the event that would have killed him. Ledia: Was he being attacked so he threw the speech at the attack and got away? That is very close! Yes there was an attacker, but the speech still in his pocket. I see. P4: Was he getting bitten by a venomous snake and the speech blocked the bite? That is so very close! I'd consider P4 the winner! The attacker was a person, and... (Don't click if you want to keep guessing) The politician was Theodore Roosevelt, whose long speech helped to stop a bullet! Congratulations! Fact check... [Wiki]. Seems legit 👍 This is an interesting puzzle. 😊 That's all for now! Thanks for playing!

Zoey: Actually I don't remember what North Shore is XD. I remember it was good though. If it is hard to remember maybe we should record it first.
Evelyn: This is North Shore: d.mrm.d...fmfdr.d.mrm.d...r.d.t. ~~ The Arcacian Force is strong with this one. It is wave after wave of ASMR. The Fort Arsenal song doesn't do this. Actually I don't know of any song that would do this. Ledia receives
V: Can we say the Vivi song was January song of the month, Fort Arsenal was February, and North Shore is March? It does feel that way. Let's record that this weekend. We should probably give it a better title.

202203271027|JQuery for Skills
March 27, 2022 Sunday
Adventurers' Hall
⭐
I think we can use JQuery to implement the Skill list, so that when you select a person, it will list all the skills for that person.
This thread is for discussing how to do it and what it should show. The main concept is that there will be a hidden Blogger Page that lists the definitions of all Skills. Each skill can be tagged by its associated Archetype, and a list of those who have that skill.
Ledia: I think we also need the Roster back. The Roster can be another hidden page that lists all members. I don't think what would be "Hidden". It would be a visible page. It should be displayed on the page bar. I think you are right. At the Roster, you could have a button that lists all character that are recognized for different archetype or RPG class: Tank, DPS, Support, etc.. I like that idea. Let's start with the Profile/Roster first. This would mean moving the Profile section from Deer Crossing post to a page. I was imagining a more elaborated character profile page, similar to what we had in Chapter 12. I see. The levels at the Deer Crossing post are all old! I'm level 23 but it still says I'm level 17! XD 🤣 The content should be automatic or robo-made. For content that is robo-made and needs frequent update, it is easier if the whole content can be updated.
Ledia: What is the first step? Create a hidden character data page with names and level.
StarTree: I updated Roster page to have *something*! @StarTree, could you add Name and Level as attribute and value for each character? It's done!
Ivy: Since data stored in div attributes are not displayed, next we need JS script to display them when the user clicks on a button. Who wants to take charge of making the profile page? I have some other things to do. I'd do that, with StarTree. StarTree is hired! Wee!~~ Ivy thanks Ledia and StarTree in advance.
Ledia: @StarTree, if I understand correctly, we need a JS function that composes the content for the given Div. Could you make that? Does the function takes the character name as input, and display the content in the next div? I think we need a specified div name because the character names would be listed on a separate menu bar. Understood!
StarTree: Roster page is now online! 📣
202203271408|Roster is UP
March 27, 2022 Sunday
Adventurers' Hall
⭐
Roster page is now online! What would you like to see there?
Ledia: Could we get a personal section where we could just write whatever? I mean a section that is not robo made. What do you want to call that section? "Custom profile"? There is now a custom profile section for Ledia! Awesome!
Sasha: I don't feel like filling up my profile again... I think you could get credit for importing anyone's profile from the old slides. Then someone else do it for me please.
Vivi: The roster needs URL enabled per member. But I can wait until there is actual content. Who is in charge of the Roster, so I could log the bug? I think this falls under Makeover. Although I think StarTree will end out fixing it.
Evelyn: What can we do about Skill? I think Ivy is too busy to make updates. 😅 What can we do to lower the lag counter for Chapter 20? Most recently Ivy wanted to list signs of good health that one can check by themselves! I like that idea! It will be useful. Where should we put it? I think it should be a page if it is a summary of everything on that topic. I feel the pendulum is just swinging back and forth on whether the content should be in a page or in a post. Our chapter posts should really be a page then? Since they are summaries. We use posts because we were using Blogger Labels. Pages do not have labels. On the other hand, the advantage of pages is that they could be hidden from the user because there is no way to browse to a page without listing it on the page list. Then shouldn't the sign of health content be on a Blogger Post? The Page List right now only has content specific to the guild: The Calendar and the Roster. Everything else are in posts. I don't think self-health check should be among the page list. Especially when we don't create its content. Then let's make a post. It is easy to change. Then you don't have a compelling reason to use a Page? Yes I do. I think the URL of posts are ugly. But that is subjective. If we ever want to send someone else our list of healthy topics, I would prefer to send a link that is Page. I don't foresee people would need to click on a label to navigate to related topics because we have collapsible Div. That whole Page could be its self-contained health check module. I don't think people care about the URL. But it does look uglier now you mentioned it... How do we browse to it if it is a page? We could add a link to it at Adventurers' Hall or JQuery it from there. I'm fine with it being a page. Let's work on the content and help Ivy! 😊
Sasha: Could we call the page Pixie? Since the content will be similar to what Cardinal do for PHC-Player Health Check. I'm for it! XD 🤣 It does sound more fun, and I think it ties better to the mission of the Adventurers' Hall. Fun is good. 😊 As long as you don't fantasize the content. The content should not need further translation.
Zoey: How do we judge whether the YouTube content is legit? How about we add additional references as we learn more? I think as we collect more links, we can find better information and keep the better one. 👍

James: All right! Let's do it!

😊

James: Having been questing at Deer Crossing, James returned to Freedom Plaza to tidy up the town record. To help people see the history of the town, he decided that the old calendars need to be upgraded to the the new format. Blogger already has a 2021 December calendar post. So I am going to make a copy to archive the old format content, so that everyone in the world may see how the calendar used to look. James created the new blank 2021 December calendar.
James: Now we can start putting the contents back!
Zoey: For a moment I thought you guys are done already! XD 🤣 Of course not. You wouldn't think that it was just about the 'calendar' itself without the content, right? Actually that was what I thought we could do as the minium. 31 days to go, baby! Do we get guild credit per day? Sure! Yes! Who's first? I'll take point. Starting with December 31st, 2021. Zoey: Secret achievement! XD 🤣

How is it looking? Could you also get the Deer Crossing post? Jumping to Deer Crossing page to view the post is annoying. I won't consider Dec 31 done unless that link is also gone. I don't know how Cardinal wants to change its page when some of the story posts are moved. Leave them there and make a copy for the Calendar. Ledia: So I did two and bit more already. Can I get recognized to have surgical strike? Ledia is now recognized to have Surgical Strike Rank A. Ledia thanks Cardinal.
Evelyn: I'll start on Dec 12 and work toward you. 🙂 👍 Evelyn is now recognized as an Initiate of the Sealing Team.
Ledia: I am OOM. This quest is very hard. I don't think we can finish it this month. 😅 I think we did enough for @Freedom. Should we do something for @Treasure? Okay. 😊
StarTree: Casey wants a query of all LEGO posts at Treasure! It is a good idea! I'll add it. 😊

202203282139|Daily Quest
March 28, 2022 Monday 9:39 PM
Magic Bakery
Spring has come but our quest at Deer Crossing has not finished. Evelyn hopes to bring it to a good end with daily care.
⭐
Evelyn: A few days ago, we started putting effort in reducing the task counts from field log. Right now we only have two categories to reduce to keep the backlog from increasing. One left now. Thank you! 💟 Now both are done. Thank you so much!
🕰️ [10:10 PM] 🕰️
Black: This attempt is just going to get harder because the tasks that remain are the difficult ones. If we stick to not doing anything mentally intensive after 10 PM, we won't be able to do anything once we leave the quest area. 😖 Do you mean we should leave later? That could be convenient for those who are doing intermittent fasting and not having dinner anyway. That sounds way too stressful. Then what about starting earlier? There are tasks we could do before going to the quest area, and we won't have to worry about fighting adds. I like that idea.😊 How early can you start though? It would only be one or two hours at most. It would help some, I think. We could at least plan and get a better sense of what needs to be done each day. I am okay with morning meeting before going to quest area. If we do that it would be pretty much just Evelyn, StarTree and me at the meeting. No one else is going to get up so early. Then please pave the way for us XD 😆 I don't mind starting first. It would be quiet and cozy. Let's try it tomorrow.
202203282306|Daily Routine
March 28, 2022 Monday 11:06 PM
Magic Bakery
⭐
I want to have a sidebar item showing our daily routine. Please tell us about yours and whether you want company in your routine.
LRRH: The morning is a good time to finish many small tasks. I check the news in the morning along with Natalie, Ledia and V.
Ledia: For checking the news I use Bing because it has a reward. Usually clicking on each headline is enough to max out the mobile phone quota. The computer quota can be maxed out easily by clicking on a special link where it just cycles to the next place to visit. That link seems special. If I just search for a place, it doesn't give me that convenient list where I could just keep clicking at the same point but have Bing search each location one by one. Interesting. I thought that is the default behavior of Bing. I shouldn't lose that link then.
Evelyn: I want to add the morning quest meeting, if we can stick to it.
Ledia: I have a second routine in the morning, which is the paladin morning exercise. I think that is about all the routines in the morning.
StarTree: StarTree starts the quest with checking the schedule, and tallying the scores at night!
Ledia: Natalie has another exercise routine in the evening.
P4: V trains at the waterfall in the evening.
P4: I collect health data at night.
Ivy: Do you count lunchtime as a routine for those who only eat lunch?
Sasha: Could we have a nap routine? You could start one. Then there is an after lunch nap routine if you want to join it.
LRRH: I think that is about everything. @StarTree, could you make the sidebar?
StarTree: Roger!

202203290748|Starting Early
March 29, 2022 Tuesday 7:48 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
This is only a couple hours before going to the quest area. Is this better or should we just go to the quest area earlier? Let's keep that in mind so we could improve.
Tanya: I vote for simply going earlier. Our field camp is mobile. If we don't want to be bothered, we could just move behind the trees. My second suggestion is that if we start quest without going to the quest area, then we should talk at the quest channel instead of the bakery channel We could just import the quest log back to here. Then let's switch to the quest channel. Quest Channel
StarTree: How should we mark which message to import? Just write the message with no name at the credit column. Then we can easily filter out messages that are not status updates. Roger! I don't think we need a filter for a credit-less row, since we have the at-sign to show just the todo list. There is that too. If we do that, doesn't it mean we don't need the Pipe at the credit column to mask rows without credit? We can think about that later. Or should we just write the entire non-status message in the credit row? It will get filtered also. Is it really that bad if quest channel has its own row? 😅 I moved the messages to its own row so we could try and see for today! The macro would break if you do that. StarTree can make another macro for just chatting! The new macro is Ctrl+Shift+Q for messages! The original Ctrl+Shift+A is the same for rows with credits. I like this. On my view I would filter out Quest chat message. Just so you know. We'll ping you if needed. By the way, I vote for just going to the field earlier. Because the leyline is stronger there. That is a compelling reason… 😅
🕰️ [11:52 PM] 🕰️
Evelyn: Today we changed the meaning of the "homework" tag from tasks that we could do outside the quest area to tasks we cannot do inside the quest area. With that change, there are only 8 homework left, but other categories increased. We couldn't keep the other categories at the same or lower than yesterday. Other than that, Sasha tried to find a good place to nap, but she hasn't found one yet. Of all the things that goes wrong, why do you talk about this? I'm sorry! It is because I want it to work and I thought it is something we could all consider... 😖 Let's consider that later. We are expecting a spawn point to erupt tomorrow morning.
