202205190916|Day Planner
May 21, 2022 Saturday 8:16 AM
Magic Detectives
⭐
Based on the ideas in the previous discussion on note-taking, Sasha presents the Web View Word Day Planner. It is a word document with a table with daily plans, which includes what we plan to do in future days, and what we did in previous days.
Sasha: More about the features in the following.
Sasha: Reverse Chronological order This is kept to reduce scrolling. The future is at the top. The idea is to keep it short and keep a pool of tasks to be pulled.
Sasha: Pull Bin The pull bin of task can have a due date and a total estimate of task hours. By not planning exactly what day they will happen, we don't waste time tweaking a plan that will change.
Sasha: Dependencies column This is kept to highlight things we can't control.
Sasha: Web View Word This is new, based on Ivy's suggestion. The Web View format allows the view to be resized easily. Excel and OneNote cannot do this. Without Excel, we don't have the mean to automatically add how many hours are planned for each day. But that math is simple. Just do it in your head. And I don't use Outlook for this planner because this word format is easier to edit and share
Sasha: Multi Quest This is new, based on the need to combine the planners of different quest lines. The quest title is shown first, followed by its sub quests and hour estimate, ordered by the order they were completed. So within each day, the entries were categorized by quest, and each task is in forward chronological order. But the overall planner is in reverse order.
Sasha: I think that was pretty much it for now.
Tanya: Good work, Sasha. That's it? Where is the resistance? Where is the drama? But it is helpful, and if I may I want to add links to places there. XD I think it looks elegant and clear. Elegantly that we are behind schedule. 😅 I don't see the "Bin of tasks". It will be there after adding Fort Arsenal, that 90 day or something estimate. Let's aim to use it and continue today, adding Arsenal sub quests. We still have Pylon quest. We have about 4 overlapping quests plus guild quest.
Casey: Should we add Guild Quests on the same planner? I would say no, because that would just add overhead. We should show Cardinal Quests only. If we did it in spreadsheet we could just filter them out. To do that you would need to add a tag on each row to be filtered. That is annoying. XD I can think about it, but for now I want to try this and see how well it works, for at least a week or so. Casey, when we actually do a task, we are still using the Field Log to track the time. We are not losing any history data for analysis. What Sasha is doing is a simpler and more summarized version, a big picture version for planning. But even in outfield log there is a section for planning future tasks, we just don't use it for some reason. I use it. But for reminders of routine tasks. I think that is convenient for tasks that are recurrent. I think we can use it more, and tweak that so that it can also be good for Big Picture Planning. On that list you already have the list of quests. And if you need to move a task to a different day, you could just change the date. No copy and paste. Then you just sort it. That is compelling. Why did we stop using it? When I use the field log, I view it in with latest task at the bottom. That future section is completely out of sight. 😅
StarTree: StarTree updates those dates in the future section every day! Sometimes StarTree wonders whether that is necessary...!
Casey: I'm not trying to bother anyone, but there is something very similar in function in our field log. It might only do 80% what the additional planner can do, but if we use that, we don't need to manage yet another document that we need to update daily. Yet another compelling reason. Sasha hoped for resistance and her @Wish is granted! XD @LRRH
Casey: I'm not asking people to decide right now, just think about it and maybe try upgrading the field log to do what Sasha's document can do. We know Sasha's document can't replace field log, but the field log could grow toward Sasha's vision of what we need. I am not posing a competition. Casey receives Red is now reading, and all seems well.
Sasha: I am all for trying things and making real improvement instead of discussing. I totally agree with Casey's plan. Just do both and copy the strength of each other. I copied the previous way and made small changes, someone can copy mine and make changes. It is all good as long as we are not forcing people to make the changes for them. You make changes by yourself and present it so others can build on your ideas. If I sounded like I wanted to stop something, I didn't mean to. I was just explaining why I didn't use Excel. I wasn't telling others not to use Excel. I think that is very clear and I do like the simplicity even though I will continue to use field log for what I use it for. I think the day planner has the summary I need for creating weekly report without looking at Field Log. This helps me. Again, Good Job, Sasha.
Sasha: Since we got several new ideas from the thread, it is a good time to stop discussing so people can just try the ideas instead. That concludes this briefing, let's move on and try more new ideas. Sasha receives Ooo, my tears. I almost never get Arcacia Award. 😂 Thank you, Sasha. Sasha thanks all plus Arcacia for listening.
202205211340|Two Cookies
May 21, 2022 Saturday 1:40 PM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Little Red Riding Hood bakes only plain or chocolate chip cookies. She baked two cookies. At least one of them has chocolate chips. She gave me one and gave the other to my dad. What is the probability that my dad got a chocolate chip cookie? Ivy is paraphrasing a puzzle we found today at a thrift store. This is a Puzzle Time kind of post.
This sounds super tricky. 44: 1/3. Amelia: 1/2. Tanya: 2/3. Could you each explain why?
Amelia: Because knowing that one of them has chocolate chips doesn't tell me anything about the other one.
44: If we know that at least one has chocolate, then the probability that both have chocolate is one-third.
Tanya: The question didn't say what cookie Ivy has. So, the equally probably outcomes are: Both Ivy and James have chocolate cookies, Only Ivy has chocolate cookie, or Only James has chocolate cookie. Before you know what Ivy has, James has 2/3 chance of having a chocolate cookie. But then Ivy also has 2/3 chance of having a chocolate cookie. They don't add up to 1? 🤔 They don't. That is just like saying if there are 10 buckets of hot water, regardless which one you choose, the chance that it is hot will be 100%. Adding them you get 1000%, but that doesn't mean anything. True. So before Ivy or James reveal what cookie they got, each has 2/3 chance of having a chocolate chip cookie. It doesn't matter if Ivy said "Guess what my dad got first." After one of them has revealed what they got, the chance of the other having a chocolate chip cookie is 50%. 1/3 chance would be the answer if the question asks, "What is the chance that both have chocolate chip cookies?"
44: Then why isn't the probability 75%? 44:The possible cookies that Red made are: Choco1, Plain, and Choco2. So the possible outcomes are:
Ivy-Choco1/James-Plain,
Ivy-Choco1/James-Choco2,
Ivy-Choco2/James-Choco1,
Ivy-Plain/James-Choco1.
So 75% of the time Ivy would have a chocolate chip cookie. Just when I thought I understood it! XD ...
Ledia: We only know that Choco1 exists 100%. Plain and Choco2 share 50% chance of existing. So ... Choco1 is in all four cases, and each case is paired with something that only has 50% chance of existing.
Black: I would argue that Ivy-Choco2/James-Choco1 is invalid if you reveal Ivy's cookie first. Whichever cookie you reveal first is called Choco1. I don't get it. What if Red can make three cookies: Choco, plain, and mint, but only made 2, at least one is not plain. And we ask what is the odds that Ivy does not have a plain cookie if we know at least one is Choco? Then there would be four possibilities same as what 44 said:
Ivy-Choco/James-Plain,
Ivy-Choco/James-Mint,
Ivy-Plain/James-Choco,
Ivy-Mint/James-Choco.
 The chance that Ivy would get a non-plain cookie is 75%. No. Then you are missing the cases: Ivy-Mint/James-Plain and Ivy-Plain/James-Mint. Because you said at least one is non-plain, not at least one is Choco. Assuming you also meant all cookies are unique. Right. Then together there are 6 cases, and the odds of getting Non-plain is still 2/3.
Ivy: Do we all agree what the correct answer is? Ivy: Which is 2/3 ? Yes. Yes. Thank you for agreeing. Wait, what? Is that the answer or not? XD 🤣 I can't handle more twists!
Casey: Let me explain... When we found this deck of math puzzles at thrift store, naturally Ivy would take a card out and try it. And when she saw the answer she was MAD. Because the answer was 1/3. Just KO me already XD Zoey is now considered KO'ed. Ivy insisted that the puzzle answer was wrong or the question was worded wrongly. So she wanted confirmation. So 2/3 is correct? That's what it should be, just as Tanya explained. And intuitively, if you know nothing about whether one of the cookies must be choco, the chance would be 50%. So why would knowing that one of them must be choco reduce the chance of it being a choco? And so Ivy bought the puzzle deck in rage. XD So, where is my cookie? Red gives everyone a cookie.

202205220803|Veganism
May 22, 2022 Sunday 8:03 AM
@Concept
⭐
For Seed of Peace, I am defining Veganism as a moral view of minimizing harm to sentient beings, which typically translates to having a plant-based diet, opposing animal cruelty and products that made from them.
Tanya: In terms of peace ranking that would be Coexistence. Veganism poses not to hurt others without a belief of mechanism that sentient beings should help each other.
Tanya: In case it isn't obvious, this definition means a person who is a vegan CAN use animal product as long as it was not a result of treating animals as commodity.
Zoey: It matches the definition "the doctrine that man should live without exploiting animals" [Wiki]. I'd take that so Veganism is based on philosophy on avoid harm, not on a dogma on the ingredient. And if you don't know how something was treated, you would normally avoid a commercial product made of them. Since if it is commercialized, the odds are animals are being exploited. Agreed. And Posted. 👍
Tanya: For the missing ideologies for Cooperative rank, I propose "Quest Society" and Chivalrism. But I'll save the discussion for next time. Tanya receives
Fina: That part of Seed of Peace is growing nicely. I nominate @Seed to be S ranked for this month. Fina receives

202205221551|Arsenal Plans
May 22, 2022 Sunday 3:51 PM
Fort Arsenal
⭐
Yesterday, I tried making changes to Field Log to do be more similar to Sasha's planner but the result was not good. Both lists are huge lists of dates. If they are on the same sheet, even with split window, the result is inconvenient. If we keep them separate as a new window, the Word looks cleaner.
Casey: Then I'll try to do something. I don't think you need to keep that data on the same tab. It could be on a different tab.
Black: I think we should just try Sasha's for a week and concentrate on completing the tasks instead of upgrading the management interface.
Tanya: But I do want to first get a number for Arsenal Quest. We need that even for Sasha's method. I think you can get those numbers from the field log map. Put an hour to estimate everything that is not yet completed. The first step might be to decide which task should be done first, then list all of them on Sasha's list. We can tweak the order later. Okay. I will update the priority column at map.
Tanya: Hospitalian Knights will take over the Jewel Market. So I will put that and all mine locations as lower priority for us. I'll set them to Priority 0.
⭐
Casey: I have a suggestion, the priority could double as the number of days it should complete before the due date. Then we can use that to calculate the date when something should be done. That's a good idea. Then I will set all the mine locations and Jewel Market to Due 2 For everything else I'll put Due 7 for now. For anything that requires leyline, let's put Due 14. And everything that needs shipment Due 21. Done.
Tanya: Previously, we estimated that each spawn point at Deer Crossing took us 16 hours to seal. Arsenal has 47. However, the map shows the sub quests, marked by @, we need to do for each spawn point. Then I can make a guess that each @ takes 2 hours and get a possibly closer estimate of remaining load. That turns out to be 422 hours remaining instead of 752. That is 53 days, so the estimated completion date is 7/14. Almost a month behind. 😖 It is more than a month behind because that math assumes we do the quest every day. If we only do quests on 5 of 7 days, then... It gives August 4. I think that is enough estimate for now. Let's put those dates and weights on Sasha's calendar. There are only five dates total and 5 numbers. Done.
Tanya: After some more tweaking, the estimated completion date is 9/19. There are 9 spawn points that might need crafting materials to seal. We need to confirm this week. Let's start with the newest spawn point, Backup Barrier Generator. The task tracker now includes the estimated completion date for Arsenal! 👍 Tanya switches to Quest Channel.
🕰️ [8:17 PM] 🕰️
Casey: I feel like we didn't make a dent trying to reach the backup barrier. It is like a maze down there. I have asked for help.
Evelyn: What else can we do to help decrease the completion date? If I understand correctly, if we don't close four @ signs marked on the map today, the completion date will increase. (?) 😅 There is a factor of 5/7, so we need to close three @ signs to prevent an increase.
Zoey: I'll pick up where I left off exploring the mines.
Sylvia: Are we doing something about the Courthouse? We are running out of space. It was empty when we first got here. 😅 Let's see what we can send back to the archive.
🕰️ [11:26 PM] 🕰️
Tanya: After using Sasha's Planner for a day, I propose to remove the corresponding entries in Field log that are duplicates and less useful. They have always been just getting in the way. I would rather have StarTree manage the planner. I concede.
Black: I think we need to do something about the documentation. Each @ sign there is not worth 2 hours. I think we should focus on completing them instead of just reducing the estimate. Overestimation are less trustworthy and will be ignored. Then I will do many of them quickly. Now the date is down to 9/1. 435 hours remaining. I think the description should take only 1 hour max for each. Then it is down to 8/28, 414 hours. Better.

May 28, 2022 Saturday 9:23 AM
Music Room
⭐
What could you do if you start coughing from singing?
Evelyn: This was a topic logged last year in September. With a note that "your throat needs rest and hydration." I also used to cough when singing, but in the last few months that has stopped. I think the reason was, as I learned to do lip trills, I ended up singing with less air blowing through my throat. So my throat does not dry up as early. I want to comment by doesn't know one way or the other. XD Good job practicing!
Black: For me I think that it was drinking sparkling water that would hurt my throat if I sing.
Ivy: Are you sure it wasn't just because the temperature was colder? If you sing but never warm up, then you are relying on the ambient temperature. That's possible. But I don't want to experiment with it. They say lip trill is a warm up exercise. 👍 I guess we will see when it is September again.
202205281031|Break-in
May 28, 2022 Saturday 10:31 AM
Front Desk
⭐
About a week ago(?), we started adding the telephone section on the side panel. There are a few options. What should happen if someone chooses "Emergency"?
Tanya: What should happen if a visitor chooses any of them?
LRRH: Ideally, we provide actual help. If we can't do that, we provide a relevant story.
Ledia: When was the last time there was an emergency?
James: It was January this year. Someone threatened to break in. So we asked Natalie to help. Now I remembered. What did Natalie do? Normal Paladin procedure would be to contact the person who was alleged to have made the threat that the Paladins are aware of the dispute and hope that the parties can resolve the situation peacefully. So they didn't send anyone over? I didn't ask for it. But if they actually try to break in, it would be an emergency, so I was giving the paladins a heads up. And what happened afterwards? The person making the threat toned down and situation was resolved peacefully. I see.
Zoey: Why did the person want to break in? XD It was a combination of miscommunication, and misuse of technology. They were trying to get a room in the guild house, but didn't response when we offered them to come. Then they said they sent the money using an online service. When we say we didn't receive it, they didn't believe. So they wanted to break in. Sounded desperate. The problem was that that particular online service requires phone registration which was not obvious. It was holding the money without sending it. Eventually we did receive the money, but it took a week instead of what we thought would take minutes. And we sent them back the money. As they were to look for another place. But during the time the service is holding the money, they won't have the fund to pay for another place. That was our concern but not theirs. They had enough money to pay for another place. But they were angry even when we showed them the fine prints that the transfer might take two weeks. Well, what's done is done.
Evelyn: I have no idea that happened. 😖 Would you like to know the next time something like that happens? Yes, please. Evelyn is now part of Magic Bakery Emergency Response Team. I also want to know. Tanya is now part of Magic Bakery Emergency Response Team. Are they any duty for being on that team XD I'm a Herald, I think I need to be on that team regardless XD.
LRRH: There is no duty for being on the team. It just means that if something *worrying* happens, we'll tell you about it. But do we need to keep that a secret? Can I make a post about it? Then everyone would know. If you post inappropriate information we would stop telling you. I don't think I have a record of posting anything inappropriate. 🤔 But are you good at keeping secrets? I think I am good at keeping secrets... 🤔 But no one ever tells you their secrets, do they? I don't think we have many secrets to begin with. 😅 But if you do have a secret, would you tell Zoey about it? Sasha, I think your questioning is unnecessary. Zoey has a record of keeping secrets because she is part of Cardinal Quest. Compelling argument. It's not compelling. If you use that argument, then even I would be trustworthy. XD 🤣 But I'm not asking to be on the team. I'm just laughing. XD
LRRH: The emergency response team will decide if someone else needs to know. See? Being on Cardinal Quest is not enough to establish trust worthiness. I added Evelyn because she has relevant emergency response skills. I added Tanya because she has relevant problem solving skills. I am not adding Zoey yet although she has relevant skill, because I'm not getting the vibe of mental readiness from her. Red is using ESP! XD I'm not complaining. I don't necessarily want to change my 'vibe' just to be on the team.
Tanya: Red doesn't have ESP. Red has hesitation because Sasha confused her. We will sort it out the next time an emergency happens. Which, hopefully never happens. 😅
Evelyn: From yesterday's study group, how about we end with some affirmative thinking?
Evelyn: We are not here to deal with emergencies, but to prevent them from happening. We are a great team and we share ideas of preventative tasks. The next emergency will probably be from Cardinal Quest if we can't seal all the spawn points. We are diligent and we seal spawn points ahead of time. We are legendary and celebrated heroes. We are saving the world and having fun doing so. We use all help we can get and that brings us more help than we hope for. Evelyn receives Evelyn is recognized for the Cleric skill Protect III. We do our best and Arcacia does the rest. Evelyn receives Evelyn is recognized for the Cleric skill Benediction. It makes me jealous that Evelyn doesn't consider sparing her message for another day to get more Arcacian points, since she is already getting it everyday. IKR XD 🤣 😊 Evelyn thanks everyone for being wonderful friends.
202205281346|Cardinal Quest
May 28, 2022 Saturday 1:46 PM
Fort Arsenal
⭐
The projected date of finishing sealing all spawn points is July 27. Arsenal base camp is now calling for heroes to help seal them proactively.
Evelyn: Evelyn is here. 😊
Ledia: Are there like 50 spawn points? Which one are we doing?
Zoey: I'm going to finish where I left off at the barrier backup generator. There are just a few runes left to translate there. XD Let's go together. 😊
🕰️ [3:29 PM] 🕰️
Cardinal: The party arrives at the dungeon under the barrier generator. Is this necessary? I'm almost done with what I'm here for. XD But it wouldn't really be Cardinal Quest if we aren't actually playing it. Zoey concentrates and shoots an arrow against a wraith. The wraith is destroyed. Zoey gains 1 EXP. And it is done here! XD Zoey crosses off 2 hours of work. The remaining hours is now 339.
Sasha: What about the other tasks for this location? Those are not my forte. I think there is something we don't understand about this backup generator. We need to study more.
Cardinal: As Evelyn speaks, she, and only she notices a malicious dark shadow lunging at Zoey. Light arrow. The wraith is destroyed. Evelyn gains 1 EXP. Sorry, I missed it. I think we are potentially missing a lot more. I read Tanya's report back at camp... We can't see what we don't understand. We must understand. So I plan to stay here for awhile and study. What task are you doing? It is spell rehearsal. Tanya allocated 2 hours for it. After that, we should have a better chance completing the sealing confirmation spell. Which is worth another 2 hours. That's sound more like it. More like what? More like she knows what she needs to do. According to Tanya's report, I should have done that first so Zoey would take less time down here. 😖 Anyway, it seems that you know what you are doing so I will head back up. Thank you for checking on us. I'll stay and study also. Does this count as the study group Ivy talked about yesterday? I have no idea. 😅 No, it is different. This one worths more. You get 1 EXP per question you ask an answer. Then I'll stay then. Wait, what?? Why are you so surprised? That's how it has always been in Cardinal Quest. XD Of course I knew! I'm making it dramatic for the reader! She's not. She didn't know. It's because the person answering questions most of the time is Tanya. 😅 How about we all stay for the "quiz" session?
🕰️ [4:22 PM] 🕰️
Tanya: Question 1: According to records, a backup generator could use two mana types to tell if the main generator is down. Does our generator use both mana types?
Casey: It does not. It can only use one of them. I don't know what you want to call it. How would you like to call it? XD It only senses Earth mana. Not air. Casey earns 1 EXP. That means we might need to run an Earth mana leyline to the chamber above. Why didn't you get the one that can use air mana? We saw what others used and just did the same. Hmm... I might be seeing a pattern here. Ignorance. 😖 But we won't be if we start digging and answering the questions.
Tanya: Question 2: Does the main generator above have room for another Earth mana leyline? Possibly. That answer is not good enough. We can check when the chamber above is open next week. That's a better answer. If we connect them, we are actually doing more than the other teams are doing. That's like asking, do we dare to do better than the other team... That's not what I meant. I'm just saying we are doing something extra. I... had a dream last night. Evelyn receives
Evelyn: In my dream, what effort we put into Arsenal is not extra. It is preventative. Wait, have you started using ESP already? XD I tried... 😅 I agree with Evelyn regardless whether there is ESP involved. Fort Arsenal is an important location and we are talking about the barrier. This seems like a low hang fruit even if you believe it is an upgrade. If you act with love you would include those upgrades. If we have the experience that it is a good design, we would recommend it to the other teams. We just lack the experience to make the recommendation now. We need to first prove that it works and is better. Tanya receives You're right. That's the Arcacian way.
Sylvia: There should be room for the leyline because HK will need to expand it for the market. Good call. Then we should confirm that the main crystal can accept the backup generator spell before getting and installing the leyline. I added that task to the planner. Thank you.
Casey: How sure are we that it will work? Should I start looking for suitable materials? But if it doesn't work, we are wasting time looking now. My experience is that adding to the material list is almost always a time saver. Anyway I added. 🤷
Evelyn: Then can we also start the check list? We should define the criteria to determine whether the spawn point is sealed. Agreed. I added a task on the planner to look for the checklist of the other team. I think we should add something... I feel that it might not exist. 😅 Of course you may add more checks.
🕰️ [6:52 PM] 🕰️
Evelyn: So... How do we test the backup barrier generator? Do we actually shut down the main generator? 😅 We should do some preliminary tests before the big test. So I've added to the checklist. Is that task considered complete? I would say yes. If we need to update it, we would need to update it 'for free'. Okay. Remaining hours is now 333. Creating the checklist seems an easy way to reduce the hours. Tanya updated the list. The remaining hours is now 340. There was an spawn point that had not estimation. I've just added it. Please don't be discouraged. Are there more unestimated spawn points? XD That was the only one. We are heroes and full of positivity. 😊 Then I'll solo the Howling Circle checklist. That seems super easy. It is not called a checklist. It is called a rehearsal, or mock battle. Simulated battle. I like that. I am soloing it. Ledia soloed the mock fight and earned 1 EXP. The remaining hours is now 338.
Ledia: No way that was worth 2 hours. Then I will update it. The remaining hours is now 319. But as I said in the report, we shouldn't pay too much attention on fixing accuracy issues on the estimation. We should just focus on completing the tasks. It is not called tasks, but sub quests. Subquests. Then I'll solo Millennia Crystal trial. Zoey could not complete the trial but earned 1 EXP.

Ledia: The remaining 12 are harder to solo. I added a flag on something to investigate. Please don't be discouraged. The remaining hours is now 320. I'm out of mana. XD

202205290828|Remote Healing
May 29, 2022 Sunday 8:28 AM
Magic Bakery
⭐
Is there anything you wish to happen? This is for Chapter 22, or perhaps also for the telephone.
Evelyn: I want to try remote healing.
Zoey: How far have you gone in ESP study? We only started two days ago. XD But there is no reason not to try it if it could help someone. 😅 That's true, but I don't understand the meditation part. I can't get to the alpha state. I thought being in alpha state just means you are relaxed and positive. Is that all? Then why does it ask for meditation? XD I thought that is for people who are really stressed. Are you serious? We don't need to meditate? 🤔 I don't know for sure. 😅 I just thought that if we are already connected, we can cast the spell without doing anything other than being in Arcacian Aura. You mean the same feeling when you get Arcacian Award? Yes. Evelyn receives But then you need to sing. Actually I can turn it on at will. 😅 😲
Evelyn: It is like using the pedal when you play the piano. When I sing and I don't feel it, I could just "step on the pedal" and create the aura and sustain it throughout the singing. Yes. Then it isn't really an award if you could give it to yourself. XD I don't think Arcacianism is against people rewarding themselves. You are supposed to let your better self manifest and reward yourself. 😅 That's three free points everyday. 🤔 That's three free points for everyone who chooses to connect to the better self each day. Many of us don't do that. 😅 That makes me feel that everyone in the guild should get at least 3 points if they just show up. I think that is a good aim, but no pressure. 😊
Zoey: But if all you need is to flip on the switch and cast the spell, isn't that too easy? There is no cost. 🤔 Why would you want there to be a cost? 😅
LRRH: What is alpha state? It is a brain wave frequency of about 8 to 13 Hz. When people are awake they are normally in the beta state which is 14 to 30 Hz. Umm... correction: Beta State corresponds to being Actively awake. Meaning that you are awake and attending to a task. You are in Alpha state when you are in auto mode. Inattention and daydream while awake are in Alpha state. If you zone out from your sensory perceptions while awake, you are in alpha. Then why the emphasis on meditation? I can zone out anytime I want XD Maybe we don't. 😅
Ivy: I am not entirely convinced when you switch on the Arcacian Aura you are in alpha state. We know the Arcacian Aura can happen while people are attentively doing something. It might be a separate phenomenon. So I won't say they are the same until I measure it with EEG. That I can understand.
Evelyn: So I want to remote heal two people. One has cancer, the other has migraine. I turn on my Arcacian Aura and visualize them healthy and happy... and with hair. Evelyn casts remote healing. Evelyn receives I am not recognizing remote healing as a skill until we get news that it works. Ok. 😊 If they both work then Evelyn would get remote healing rank A? Something like that. Let's wait and see. I feel like when Ivy asked for the study group, she was really asking for test subjects. XD

StarTree: The part completed 15 quest hours today, the projected date is now July 22! Shouldn't 15 hours be more like 3 days instead of just 1? XD We started at July 24 today! It is one hour short of moving the date to July 21! I'm beat for today. I want to unwind XD

StarTree forgot to change it back to a formula after trying to tell how many hours are need to move the date! StarTree will fire herself! I'm sure we all make a lot of mistakes. 😅 I feel that we will keep asking the question of "how many quest hours do we need to complete to reduce the date by 1". StarTree could you automate that answer? Done! StarTree automated the counter. The party is 6 minutes short of reducing the date to July 21. OMG we were right on the edge! XD 😅 That equation has to be wrong. It should be advancing slower than real time. It is missing a factor. StarTree corrected it... again... 🏳️ I think it is correct now. 4 minutes. If we complete another 15 minutes or work, it will say we are 333 minutes away from reducing the date. I can't take this no more XD I think all we should really care is whether we at least finish about 6 hours per day. The clock will keep ticking and "undo" our work. It is too stressful to keep looking at it. I see. So this is a situation where the Heroes shouldn't be told how many hours they need to complete to reduce the date at the end of the day. Even if they put extra effort to complete it, it would immediately expire since they had only barely reached a moving target. StarTree is very sorry. 😭

Cardinal: No one is exhausted at the moment. No one is KO'ed. For the first time it didn't work! XD Tanya thanks the Heroes for their efforts.

Puzzle Time
⭐
What has two heads, two arms, and four legs?
Evelyn: I hope the answer is not conjoined twins. 😖 It is not! And I tried very hard skipping puzzles where someone is hurt and to bring you a puzzle that is patently innocent! Sylvia: A dancing couple? Cute! 😊 That's not the answer but I'd consider that a better answer! Congratulations! You may keep guessing what the original answer was. Is it a living thing? Yes. I've got a "Wonder Woman" asking if it is big and if she had seen it. It is taller than a normal person and most people have seen it, but would not describe it the way the puzzle did! A plant? An animal? It is alive but not an animal. 😱 Is it scary? It is not scary! Does it have eyes? Each head has two eyes! Can all four eyes see things? Yes. 44: Is it mirror? No. Here is a hint: the two heads are not similar at all! Is it cute? It is! Not an animal, not a plant, and it is alive? 🤔 Hint: It is not biologically one single thing! Where does it live? You could find it on a ranch. Does it live in a cage? Not when it has two heads! More hints please. You could see it in parades! Usually. What color is it? It depends on its species. If I have to pick one I would say brown. Amelia: Is it insects? No. Will it die? It will die separately! What do they eat? One is herbivore, the other is not. Amelia: Is it a cowboy? Congratulations! It is a person on horseback!

Magic Detectives

This week I don't have anything compelling that I'm trying to solve. So I'll just update the counter unless someone has improvement they want to present.
Evelyn: I found that it might be easier to stay in "meditative" state instead of falling asleep by imagining a screen with words a distance away. I'm not sure where this information would go. 😅
Sasha: Is this from your study group thingy? It seems that your study group needs its own chapter.
LRRH: There was a plan for a chapter related to dreaming. I think the study group needs to discuss where those information should go.
Ivy: I think mental wellness topics can go to Evelyn's Garden, chapter 15. I'll consider it after finishing chapter 11. An advantage of JQuery is that you could just post first and worry about where it should go later. That's true and I want to present it in an orderly way like chapter 11. But not in chapter 11.
Sasha: What exactly are you learning from the study group? Affirmation and visualization techniques. It sounds to me they belong to Chapter 20 and the Telephone section "Lost". If you feel lost about your life, then those are techniques that would help you find purpose.
Ivy: I want a walk through style comments on what we read. We post the material and the alleged effects, then we add our comments, fact checks and experience along the way. Similar to the style of chapter 11. Yes that is what I think we should do. But I don't know how to do it without copying everything we read. So it would take time paraphrasing. Unless we find a copy free version. As for adding them to Chapter 20, I am still upgrading the presentation format.
Sasha: I think this is a backburner topic. Just ignore it until you have time for it, and concentrate on finishing what you have now. If it is still relevant by the time you are done with what you are doing, then you will remember to do it.
Zoey: I think it is better to just start with a place where we could put what we learned and build on it. I assume our study group is on-going. After reading this, where would be more we are reading. I don't think we would have time going through each thing we read and turn them into a tutorial like Chapter 11. But we should be able to pick and add the best concept we learned to Chapter 20. Ok. Let's add both to Chapter 20 as Cleric skills.
Evelyn: I added this description: "Affirmation is the use of a positive present tense statement to recruit the power of the subconscious mind toward a desirable outcome. For example, instead of making a wish by saying, "I hope for world peace," an Affirmative statement would be, "I am peacemaker and I am making the world more peaceful everyday." The statement is expressed in present tense and defines the role the speaker wants the subconscious mind to equip itself to perform." Evelyn receives Evelyn is recognized for the Cleric skill Affirmation. Legit. I think visualization is the same as affirmation, but done without using words.
Evelyn: "Visualization is an technique to perform Affirmation using mental images instead of (or in conjunction with) verbal descriptions. To use this technique, one would rehearse or visualize themself performing in the role they affirm themselves to be, associated with the joy, pride, and sense of accomplishment to help direct one's subconscious mind toward such desirable future. To help the subconscious mind remember and accept the goal, it is said visualization (and also affirmation) is more effective when performed in relaxed state of mind when brainwave is at alpha or theta levels." Evelyn is recognized for the Cleric skill Visualization. That's a good summary of what we read without any controversial topics
Black: Just a quick comment or suggestion. I think it is better if good skills are part of the routine. Then you can be sure that you will practice it daily without forgetting.
Evelyn: In the early hours before you get up, your mind would be in theta state even if you aren't trying to meditate. So if we want to fit it in the routine, it would be before Paladin Training. @StarTree, please add to the routine. What should that session be called? How about Positivity Time? It is added! Is it true that if I visualize myself doing Paladin Training, I don't have to actually go? XD 😅 I've just realized that Evelyn is on Every routine except PT! XD I suppose I should join that too. 😖 Baby step, Evelyn, just start with one lap. XD I see Evelyn as a kunoichi. Thank you for the suggestion. I feel fine as a Cleric. 😅
Zoey: Can we change "Positivity Time" to something else? Otherwise its abbreviation is also PT. XD How about Positive Affirmation? How about Super Positive Time? XD I don't think theta state is that exciting. We would be barely conscious. 😅 I am fine with Affirmation Time. We won't be gathering for that. We just do it around the time we wake up and that could be different for everyone. True. 🤔 StarTree doesn't understand what to change it to! Don't worry about it, StarTree. Let's just leave it as is for now. XD A column is now added to daily tracker!
Sasha: By sharing our experience, the guild added a new routine and moves on for more self-improvements to come! Sasha thanks the participants for sharing and helping each other be better.

202206020951|Moral Alignment
June 2, 2022 Thursday 9:51 AM
Mira Mira
⭐
What moral alignment is your character? I'm adding a section at Mira Mira for people to define their moral alignment: D&D style. We sort of did that in the old profile pages, but do we share the same definition? Here could you explain why you class your character that way.
Ledia: I classify myself as Neutral Good because "Good" means you would try to help people and "Neutral" means I would go against the law if the law lags behind, but I won't try to break the law just to show its shortcomings.
Tanya: I am Lawful Neutral. I don't think I go out of my way to help people. I do what intrigues me. If the law forbids from helping others, it should be changed. Then there is no situation where you need to break the law to help people. But in the lack of laws explaining what is allowed, I prefer there to be laws. That makes me Lawful instead of Neutral.
Evelyn: I think I am Lawful Good because I rely on rules to help me tell what is good.
LRRH: I am Neutral Good because I rely more on intuition than on rules to tell me what is good. Cute is good. I can't really define what is cute. 😊
LRRH: Arcacia should be Chaotic Good because she doesn't seem to care about "rules" at all. She is unpredictable and doesn't take any responsibility. I don't think I want to put that until Arcacia tells us about herself. But it was on her old profile. I don't know who put it there. Red put it there! Arcacia is my mom. Why would I not know what alignment she is? I would prefer if she describes it herself instead of us speaking for her. But that's like never. But not exactly never. I can wait.
Sylvia: I am Chaotic Neutral. I don't t care about rules. I don't care about help those I don't care about.
Sasha: My character is Lawful Evil. I enjoy seeing people in trouble so I bring them trouble. But as a minor villain, I do this for my entertainment so I'm not trying to destroy the heroes. The lawful part is about I like using rules to corner the heroes. Your old profile says Chaotic Neutral. But now you are asking about my character, not me. The me Sasha is Chaotic Neutral. And why do you think the real Sasha is Chaotic Neutral? Isn't that off topic? I just want to know how you distinguish Lawful and Chaotic Evil. That's in the style of doing evil. My style is different from Vivi. Vivi would just go and attack if she feels like it. That is Chaotic Evil. For the game-Sasha, she would find lawful excuses to make it legal. Understood.
Vivi: What Sasha said. Queen Vivi is Chaotic Evil. Gotta recruit a Neutral Evil for team villains!
StarTree: StarTree is True Neutral! StarTree just does what is told most of the time! In the story that would be the useful idiot. Can we not use that word? 😖 But that's the term. StarTree feels... hurt...
Evelyn: StarTree is not true neutral, StarTree is actually Good, but had been told that she is supposed to be neutral. StarTree actually wants to be Good. Come join the Good side, StarTree. 🤗 Okay. 😭 StarTree decided to be Neutral Good. You've just lost our best recruit. Evelyn is using witchcraft, she has been studying ESP and knows mind control. Hospitalian Knights are against mind control. So now Evelyn is an enemy of Hospitalian Knights. Tanya do your thing. Evelyn didn't do anything out of line.
Sasha: Yes she did. She said that "StarTree is actually Good, Come join the Good side", not "StarTree do you want to join our side?" That's different from what Evelyn would have said before learning ESP. Evelyn was using affirmation speech on someone else, but the ESP only taught her to use it on herself. She is using mind control on someone else. That should be illegal. Evelyn? Sasha is right, I feel guilty 😖 But StarTree doesn't think it would make a difference if Evelyn just asked! But StarTree is still under influence of Evelyn's mind control technique. StarTree, if there is any influence, don't you think it would fade in a week? If a week later you still feel that you should join the "good" side, then it will be convincing. Okay! StarTree decides to wait for a week before changing alignment.
StarTree: StarTree doesn't want Evelyn to feel guilty, so StarTree will choose by herself! Sasha believes in StarTree's autonomy and neutrality. StarTree has always been great in the story because StarTree helps **everyone**, including those who thinks they are evil. Sasha thinks that StarTree is very wise and understands deep down that by being neutral, she will end up helping the most people. Sasha thinks that StarTree explained this earlier in the story. StarTree remembers. 😭 I also remember. I'm sorry StarTree, you are neutral for a good reason. I used mind control on you and spurred you to change. I shouldn't have done that and regret doing so. 🏳️ StarTree decides to remain neutral and be a friend to everyone. Nice save, Sasha. Vivi thanks Sasha. Getting a kudos from Queen Vivi makes Sasha very proud.

June 2, 2022 Thursday 11:44 PM
Library

I know it is late, but what are we reading tomorrow for the study group? We finished reading the ESP thing XD
Sasha: Could we read Fate Core? I will read anything just to keep the habit. XD It is downloaded! OMG 300 pages XD
Ledia: I'm interested. I heard it is simpler than D&D and makes faster games. @Cardinal should know this so he can beat it. Cardinal will join.
Ivy: I'll sit out on this one. The content doesn't seem directly beneficial. But if you report otherwise, I may change my mind.
Evelyn: I don't think I am done with the study yet. I want to come up with some visualization scenes that we could fall back on. I thought lunch time would be a good time to discuss and write it down, since it doesn't take a lot of writing. I'd be more interested in doing that.
Sasha: Then you should join the Fate Core study group because Fate Core is about making characters and making the world. There's got to be something that will help you visualize. I can totally see that connection. Why didn't you say 'compelling argument'? I don't know what we will read to know whether it is compelling. But I would read it and apply anything good for @Mira. I don't think we all have to read it. I'm good as long as at least someone else is reading with me. I just don't want to read alone. Then I want to join too. 😊
Sasha: Ok! I count a group of five. Let's do it!

202206030827|Rob for fun
June 3, 2022 Friday 8:27 AM
Puzzle Time
⭐
A bank robber holds up a bank but leaves with no money. Yet, he is happier than if he would. Why?
Tanya: Did he holds up the bank to destroy evidence of what he did previously? The crime is standalone! Casey: Did he steal something that is not money? Yes! What did he steal? Zoey: Did he steal jewelry or something from the safe? Here is a hint: The thing he stole is liquid, in a container! Sylvia: Did he steal wine? No, it is not anything one could normally buy! I was going to say gasoline. It is not gasoline. Sasha: What liquid can't you buy? Is he stealing bomb fuel? It's not, and I've got two hints: 1) He stole it from a bank. But the "bank" is probably not the kind you are imagining. The second hint will make it really easy so I'll hold it for now. Evelyn: Did he steal blood? He stole blood from a blood bank to help his sick kid! Does that actually work? This sounds more like a movie plot. 🤔 I guess that is possible if the robber or someone he knows can use it. 😅
Sasha: May I ask a moral alignment question? If a blood bank is reserving donated blood for rich people, is it okay for poor people to steal the blood to help poor people? You could simplify that question to "if you have a rare blood type that could help save someone else life, do you have a right to refuse donating blood?" That turns into an @Concept question XD The channel is open for free discussion! That situation is answered in Stewardism reciprocation. If you can help someone but you choose not to, it creates a right for others to not help you. So if you are not willing to donate something that is regenerative (such as your blood), then it is not wrong for other to help you with what is regenerative for them, or to help you with something that is more permanent. So if someone tries to restrain me and steal my blood, you would just stand there an do nothing if I refused to donate in the first place? Isn't that against my autonomy? If your refusal to donate blood would result in someone else losing their life, then your disregard of their autonomy permits your autonomy to be disregarded. In that situation, defending you would violate reciprocation. I could choose to be neutral and do nothing. But everyone has a right to restrain you to take your blood because you refused. But you are not giving me a choice if you are allowed to take it by force. That is reciprocation to your not giving others a choice when you could afford to offer such choice. If they are asking for something that will kill you or leave you disabled, than that's different. But they are taking my time, and time is life. So they are taking my life. If that if your argument that people could just do it while you are sleeping. It is fine if you ask for compensations and accomodations. But a flat "NO" is gross disregard of autonomy. If you just care about your autonomy but not that of others, you can't ask for others to respect your autonomy either. Compelling reasoning. Isn't Stewardism supposed to be neutral? If you help someone take by blood, that is not neutral. You picked a side. Stewardism doesn't say I have to help anyone or I have to stay out of the way. It is within my choice to help or not. But due to reciprocation, stopping others from taking your blood violates Stewardism. I can see that it violates reciprocation, but I don't agree with your definition of autonomy. I think autonomy should include the choice to not help other people. So if I choose not to help others, they could choose not to help me. But they can't be allowed take things from me. Stewardism is a moral code, not a law code. It is just saying that you can't demand others to respect your autonomy if you don't respect other's. I know but you are not listening to what I said. Taking is different from not giving. If I don't give, others don't need to feel bad not giving to me. But as long as I don't take, others have no rights to take from me. Your word "respect" doesn't distinguish between taking and giving. Stewardism doesn't distinguish them because a person is allowed to actively get what they need. Disrespecting someone's autonomy means treating them as objects or not caring whether they may continue to be alive. So if you treat others as objects, they can treat you as an object. But I am not doing anything to them. Say they are half way across the globe and I just happen to have the blood type. I didn't go half way across to stop them to get blood or find a solution. What gives them the right to come half way to take my blood against my will. My refusal didn't disrespect anyone's autonomy. Their coming to take my blood is the disrespect of autonomy. Your refusal to help someone stay alive when you could is the initial disrespect of autonomy. Their coming is a reaction to your disregard. Say you receive a letter request your blood to save someone's life. What is your reply? So far your reply is just "I don't want to and I don't care if they die." But if autonomy is a right, then that should be what it means and what I am allowed to reply without retaliations. We are disagreeing on whether not helping someone in need is a disregard of autonomy. Fina, do you agree that not helping someone needing autonomy assistance is disregard of autonomy, but not a violation of their autonomy? Disregard and violation seem to have different meaning. Sasha is saying that disregard can be reciprocated with disregard, but it takes a violation to be reciprocated with violation. Right! If am apathetic, then others can be apathetic to me. But only if I go out of my way to attack someone, others should not be allowed to attack me. If you are apathetic about someone dying, that means that others are allowed to be apathetic about you dying. That means others are allowed to let people treat you as an object. Then you are a piece of public resource, like a piece of regenerative forest land. People can come harvest and let you regenerate. Because someone would die from your apathy, disregard and violation would lead to the same outcome of your being classified as a resource. But the result is I didn't enslave anyone, but I get enslaved. How is that equivalent reciprocation? I didn't say enslave. I said people can come and take your blood and supply you with what you need to regenerate. They can do that while you are unconscious. They are not asking you to do anything for them. But if I don't naturally sleep, or if I live in a very secured house, would you let people break my house and put me into sleep? You already said they have a right to restrain me. So even if that doesn't qualify as slavery, that still qualifies as imprisonment. So if I didn't poke a needle into someone, you are letting others force a needle into me. You are saying that I'm not a human being unless I help other human beings even when I never attacked them. If you treat someone as non-human, you don't need to attack them to be treated as non-human. In Stewardism, the default is that all objects are to be taken cared of. If you treat someone without care of them as a human being, why do you demand others to treat you with the care as a human being? But you didn't answer my question. Are you going to break into my house and put me to sleep? Qualified damages should be restored. But normally if you put a fence around a public apple tree to prevent others from accessing the tree, then breaking the fence is not damage that needs to be restored. So if you try to keep people away after disregarding them as human beings, all of your defenses can be taken down. No one has responsibility to restore them. How is that not terrorism? It is going for your blood, not to kill you or prevent you from doing what you want otherwise. But how often do you need to do that? If you need to do that once a week, them I'm basically in a prison without walls. The result is still either I take my own time to give you my blood once a week, or you would come and take my blood once a week. There is no choice. That is compared to your not giving the other the choice to live. You denied other's the choice to live when you have the power to let live. The reciprocation spares your life. You are already at a bargain. But I didn't put them in their condition to begin with, so why do I need to do anything? If they are at fault for their condition, then that's true you don't need to do anything. Otherwise there is no excuse. It is like saying if someone is hanging on a balcony and you consciously choose not to help when you could do something safely to save them, then while you are still in a position to help, others may do what it takes to override disregard to save someone. You don't have a right to keep others from breaking into your house to get to the balcony to save the dangling person. Hospitalian Knights should agree. That's correct. In that situation, damages to the house are considered self-inflicted by the party making the path to assist inaccessible. But we are not talking about balconies, but blood. Blood is inside my body. But we are not talking about someone needing help on their homework, but needing help to stay alive. If a vampire wants your blood just to know its taste, that won't warrant anyone helping the vampire get your blood. But what if the vampire needs blood as staple food source? Then everyone needs to volunteer their blood or be bitten? Then it is a matter of sustainability. You can defend against an unsustainable life style and just say no. Then why can't I refuse to give blood? If it is one-time deal then it is not unsustainable. In reciprocation there is a consideration of effort. If the blood taken from you takes 1 year to restore, then everyone trying to take your blood is signing themselves up to take care of you for 1 year. Suddenly it sounds fair. Let me think about it. That is within what you could ask for as fair compensation in Stewardism. Stewardism doesn't ask you to help people for free. Helpers need to be reimbursed to maintain sustainability. Sasha is grinning at her imagination of having a servant for a year. Sasha totally spaced out. Even though "1 year to recover from donating blood" was totally hypothetical! XD It is not really hypothetical. Even if it takes only 3 days to recover, if you do it every 3 days, then you are perpetually cared for. That is, if there is a demand of it. That's true. 🤔 Many people are willing to donate blood for free, so... let's return to reality? 😅 Mikela thanks every for the playing and the thought provoking discussion!

202206040857|Catacomb reboot
June 4, 2022 Saturday 8:57 AM
Arx Catacomb
⭐
I am planning to go through each logical fallacy as a training module in the theme of a dungeon crawl. In each module, there will be a short description of the zombie, followed by a few statements. Some of the statements would match the zombie type. The player is trying to spot the zombie of the same time. When they click on a choice, the choice would immediately tell them whether they are right or wrong. If we are fancy then we will add a hitpoint bar. Otherwise it is just click and reveal answer. I need help presenting/formatting it, and also interesting statements for the real zombies and the decoys.
Ledia: I'm in. This sounds fun.
Tanya: I am just going to go through each fallacy one by one. But you could skip ahead if there is one you want to do.
Tanya: The first one is Strawman zombie. The short description is Strawman zombies attack using a voodoo doll. When the zombie pokes the doll with a needle, susceptible heroes would think that they were hurt and become manipulated by the zombie to attack other healthy heroes.
Ledia: I think that sounds a bit wordy but we could work on that.
Tanya: Then we need at least two examples. An example would feature either a statement or a short dialogue, followed by two choices: Strawman zombie spotted, or Strawman zombie clear. Spotted and Clear for short. What should those examples be?
Ledia: How about: A says, "Zombies live in the catacomb, they have a right to defend against intruders." and B says, "If you let them call anywhere home, then there won't be space for living people." I see.
Zoey: Just to be clear, that was a positive example, correct? Correct. B was using a strawman argument.
Fina: I have a suggestion. Why don't you start with the player choosing a statement they believe in, then see what a strawman reply would be from someone opposing it? And what statement would you like to start with? "I believe that each person has a right to do nothing even if they know that their inaction would result in someone's death." Isn't that opposite of what you said this morning? For the sake of the training dungeon, the dungeon can show both paths: "I believe that people don't have a right to do nothing when they know that their inaction would result in someone's death." For either statement, there is a way to reply with a strawman, and a way to reply without.
Evelyn: Are we trying to train ourselves to not use Strawman, or are we trying to train ourselves on what to do if someone else uses Strawman against us? Both. Okay. It seems complicated. 😅 If we do both sides of a statement, and do both speaking and replying, there are four scenarios, and each scenario needs a strawman choice and a non-strawman choice. That's eight.
Sasha: I kind of like Ledia's example talking about zombie rights. It is funnier. But I can see how Fina's idea would be immediately useful. If you do both then that is 16 choices XD
Evelyn: I mainly want to learn how to response when someone uses strawman against someone or myself.
Tanya: How about we go back to Ledia's dialogue for a second and list what we think would be effective ways to respond?
Evelyn: I think my choice would be, instead of saying "That's not what I meant", provide the law that zombies follow on defining their home. For example, I could say the zombies were placed there, so they have a a right to call the catacomb their home against the people who placed them there. I think in Tanya's scenario, the zombies were summoned. They were not re-animated from corpses that were placed there. The zombies were intruders infesting burial ground of heroes. Most of them have no idea why they were there. They were spawned there. I'll let Ledia fill in the gap about the context, since Ledia worked there before. Okay. 😅
Zoey: Then in that context, the zombies are living in the catacomb because they were placed there. But they don't have the right to live there, do they? So A was wrong, correct? We don't have to agree on whether A was right or not. But if we don't fix one stance for the discussion it would be really confusing 🤣 XD
Tanya: Could we have a show of hand on whether the forcefully summoned zombies have a right to live there? Those in favor: Evelyn: ✔️😖 Those oppose: Tanya: ❌ Ledia: ❌ Fina: ❌ Zoey: ❌ Sasha: ❌ Because there is no consensus, let's continue without assuming whether zombies have the right to live there. The reader can decide whether A expresses their belief. The training will focus on whether the response to A is a strawman. Then we are down to two choices. 👍 May be three. So two more. We need a reply to A that is not a strawman, and a good reply on B's strawman from A. Then the situation is covered. 👍 Anyone has a situation for either? I have a non strawman alternative to B's reply: "In the scenario, the summoned zombies are from a different space, not from the heroes that the catacomb was built for. Do you believe that both the heroes and the summoned zombies have a right to live there?" Am I supposed to answer that? 😖 Not for the training module. Please wait. Now a reply to B's strawman.
Evelyn: Because they were summoned there against their will, they have a right to be where they are. I don't believe that people have a right to attack them just because they are not where the living people want them to be.
Zoey: I think I spotted a strawman. Ledia didn't talk about attacking zombies. Sorry, I thought that was implied. 😖
Sasha: Hold on, we said Ledia's reply was a strawman because A never said they would just let the zombies roam. But Evelyn's reply was she would let zombies roam, and they could call wherever they are home. Wouldn't that mean Ledia did not make a Strawman? She hit the actual argument.
Tanya: Not at the time the statement was made. When Ledia made that statement, she didn't know that Evelyn would confirm that belief.
Sasha: Objection. If Ledia knows that is a strawman because in this exercise she intentionally assumed that A didn't mean that and tried to make it seem ridiculous. But in an actual debate, the person making the strawman could believe that that's what A meant. And in this case, that guess was correct. Then B did not try to misrepresent A's position. B correctly represented A's position.
Tanya: A can judge whether B's reply is a strawman. Because Ledia created the dialogue, Ledia knew what A was thinking instead. Presumably, A's position was different from Evelyn's, therefore in her scenario, A would have said B's reply was a misrepresentation. OMG We need to know what A actually thought! We've got adds! XD I'll deal with the adds.
Ledia: A's position was that the subterranean domain (where sun light can't normally reach) is traditionally the domain of the undead. The catacomb is underground. The living people have no rights to section the undead domain real estates. It is for the undead to decide. A didn't believe that the undead can just roam anywhere, especially not above ground where the living people lives. But underground, they have a right. Therefore B's reply was a strawman.
Fina: I am not trying to make another branch for the discussion, but Stewardism doesn't arbitrary assign the living to take the aboveground and the undead to take the underground. Whether something has a right to live depends on whether they give equivalent right for others to live. If they don't try to accommodate, you don't have to try to accommodate. Zombies don't respect anything's right. They just spread. They don't have rights by reciprocation. I am not saying that you won't, but I believe they should be treated with respect because they cannot control what they are doing. I think they should be horded back to a place where they can't hurt anyone. Evelyn, good job demonstrating how to express your belief without spawning strawman. By saying, "I am not saying that you won't." Evelyn is recognized for having a staff of sanctuary.
Fina: But I am visualizing a party going to the catacomb, got the only light magic party member and that party member happens to be a conscientious objector of using light magic against the undead. 😄 I can use light magic too. It depends on the purpose of the mission. I still have Protect and Sleep. We could just sneak by unharmed even if they try to attack us. We don't need to fight them. 😖
Ledia: Zombies at the catacomb are cursed beings. Their souls are not at peace, but in a constant state of torment. You can release them from the curse by either destroying their physical body, or use de-curse type spells to release their souls. I assume that you don't know de-curse spells. But even if you do, Clerics that go to the catacomb eventually accept that the physical way is easier, quicker, and safer than casting de-curse. To cast de-curse you would generate a wild area aura, you will get mad aggros. So just beat them up. It might not look nice, but it is safer and more humane because it is quicker. I am imagining a situation where someone is locked in a burning building. Do you take the time to pick the lock, or do you just kick down the door? Exactly. Ledia receives It is also safer for the caster because de-cursing means the caster need to connect to the soul of the cursed. Normal casters can't handle the torment happening in the zombie's mind. They will get PTSD from trying. 😖 I think it is better if we can skip traumatic suggestions. We'll fight happy zombies then XD
Tanya: I'm following a rule adopted earlier that the stories and themes we use cannot contain any trauma we create just for the explanation or entertainment. If we add any traumatic element to a story, it can only reflect existing traumatic event in real life that we are trying to resolve. Otherwise, for story purposes, the representation and description should stop at the abstraction that "Zombies have hit points" and Heroes have attacks and other skills that can decrease their hit points. You may imagine what the scene is in your head. But you may only post abstractions at Magic Bakery because Magic Bakery is supposed to be an E-rated blog. No contest. That is why we call Arx Catacomb the Arxade. When you hit a zombie, stars come out. Enough stars come out then things are good. Ledia, I think your description is sufficient. I imagine when I cast an attack spell they turn into gold coins and treasure chests. Just the usual XD 🤣
Evelyn: May I learn surgical de-curse? A skill that allow me to release cursed soul link telepathically, that is safe and with a low aura signature? 😖 That sounds so high level XD @Cardinal.
Cardinal: How about a skill that let you enchant objects so that on contact, there is a chance to release zombie curse? How is that different from just shooting them with a light spell? I am offering a skill that can enchant fighter weapons so that all of them have a chance to instant KO a zombie they hit. Then what if she enchants the ground? The larger object she enchants, the more mana it takes and increases the signature. If she wants to have a low aura signature, then enchant just pin points. So, just the tip of a sword instead of the whole blade. Except it wouldn't really matter whether my sword is enchanted if it hits, since zombies have low hit points... But if she enchants the ground, and zombies aggro the ground, and they get released on contact, then there is no fighting. The enchanted object is mana-linked to the spell caster. Every time it releases a curse, the caster's mana is deducted. The caster is KO'ed on mana-overdraw. And, if the zombie is not released on contact, the zombie follows the mana-link toward the spell caster. I would take that skill. Evelyn is gains the Cleric enchantment skill Soul Release Rank B.
Tanya: I think I have enough to work with in terms of formatting the presentation. Thank you all for this discussion. Tanya thanks all for helping.
202206041003|Honorism
June 4, 2022 Saturday 10:03 AM
World Tree
⭐
For Honorism, I'm defining it as a moral view that promotes and celebrates people who are honorable without implying that honor can be exchanged for any tangible reward. Honor Society recognizes honorable people and honorable deeds, but does not necessary connect those recognitions to rewards and priorities. This is for @Seed, to be posted at Seed of Peace. Any objection or addition?
Tanya: Honorism appeals to those who believe that people should do good for goodness sake, not for the reward. Arcacianism is compatible with Honorism because in Arcacianism if you use your credits (honor) to bid on things for priority, you lose those credits. The concept that honor is quantifiable is missing in Honorism. Honorism is mainly qualitative and spiritual instead of "functional". In Arcacian Society, people who subscribes to Honorism are those who typically don't care about their numerical ranking and don't use their credits to bid for any priority. They keep 100% of their credits they have ever earned because earning credits to spend is not their intention. They earn credits for the sake of doing good or the sake of being recognized as honorable. Not for the sake of spending them.
Fina: Then I have a question: If two sick people seek your help, but one is willing to let go of some honor credits to be prioritized. Is it honorable to prioritize helping the one that let go of credits, or to treat them equally and decide randomly?
Tanya: In Arcacian Society the answer is clear. The priority goes to the one willing to spend credits. The moral reason is that those people got their honor from helping others. They have a right to be prioritized, at the cost of their earned credits. Arcacian moral holds that as a fair arrangement and compensation. On the other hand, "Honorism" is not well-defined. It is up to you to define which is more honorable in your style of honorism.
Fina: Then if someone defines treating others equally is honorable, then Arcacianism is dishonorable. On the other hand, Arcacianism would NOT say that deciding randomly is dishonorable. As a healer, if you choose not to prioritize helping those willing to shred their credits, then you are not arcacian. You are still earning credits for helping. You are still honorable. So if you choose to define Arcacianism to be not honorable, Arcacianism would not contest your definition. It is compatible to the kind of Honorism that do not have contradicting definition. Fair enough.
Zoey: Then I also have a question: In Arcacianism, you get credits for helping people. Do you get more credits if you prioritize and help someone who won a credit bid? I need to think about it. I would think that it does. You get Extra Credits for helping, and you get Extra Credits for promoting Arcacian values. In reciprocation that would make sense. If you honor someone spending credits to get priority, then you should earn honor for doing so.
Tanya: Does a provider who distributes help in Arcacian priority earn extra credits for adopting that priority?
Ledia: I don't recall having such credits. If you are Arcacian, you prioritize but you get the same credits you would if you just help randomly, or whoever you want to help. If you can only help one person, you get the same amount of credits regardless which one you help.
Tanya: I think that result comes from Aracianism being a philosophy based on an Alchemist world view. Tanya receives
Tanya: Prioritizing is a matter of last resort. Alchemist world view is a world view of abundance, and strides to help everyone. If you give people extra credits for prioritizing , you could end up promoting scarcity.
Tanya: So the scoring doesn't allocate any credits for prioritizing. After helping the first person, whoever helps the second person gets the next credit. The focus is on helping the second person also, and the rest of them. Tanya receives Arcacia has spoken XD But isn't it a little odd that you get credits for helping people, but not for being Arcacian? That just means that Arcacia doesn't give credits for being loyal.
Fina: In Stewardism, not taking care of care takers first is considered unsustainable. It is not morally neutral. It is a moral violation.
Tanya: There is no contradiction because if the target is trying to help someone, reimbursement is implied. The Arcacian Reward is not reimbursement. It is something extra beyond simply resupplying the helpers with what they need to keep helping. That is in Step 4 at @Carrot. Reimbursement and Reward are different. The reward is in addition to sustainability.
Evelyn: That section also states that when you give others a reward, you earn Extra Credits, and that creates a network of people wanting to reward good deeds. To me that means you do get credits for giving rewards. Giving reward implies prioritization. But Tanya is also right that the focus is not to prioritize but to help everyone. So when two people are in need, you get more total credits by prioritizing the one spending credits, and also help the second. If you help the one without credit first before rewarding the one with credits, you would end up getting fewer credits even if you help both. Step 5 made it clear the intention that this mechanism needs to be practiced routinely to prepare for calamities. There is credit for following the priority. Not following the priority still gives credits, just not as much. Evelyn receives I can see situations where if the credits for following the priority is not too much, the overall accounting would still promote helping everyone. So Fina and I were right. We do get Extra Credits for prioritizing XD Sorry, I was wrong. But you were pointing out something important that Arcacia would agree. 😊 Evelyn receives The whole point is to help everyone, but in order to minimize conflict, there is a priority for people to be familiar with. Evelyn receives
Zoey: The priority is that the priority is secondary. XD Zoey receives Zoey is recognized for Magician Skill Confusionism.
Fina: I nominate Evelyn as an Arcacian Ambassador. Fina receives Evelyn is now recognized as an Arcacian Ambassador. Well-deserved. LRRH: Congratulations! Your effort of taking care of @Carrot is paying off! 😂 Evelyn receives
Zoey: This is way more content than I was asking for. Good job and thanks for chiming in! Zoey gives another round of kudos for the day.
202206042003|Tavern Trial
June 4, 2022 Saturday 8:03 PM
Fort Arsenal
⭐
Seeing how @Cardinal isn't really being maintained since February, Ledia has some concerns on whether their heroic deeds would be lost in history. But the priority remains that the party should push on to seal the area. @StarTree, status report please.
StarTree: 246 quest hours remain, projected sealing date is July 17!
Ledia: StarTree, what subquest would you recommend for me? Tavern has 6 quest hours that can be soloed! Okay then. Ledia, do you mind if I join? Of course not. 😊
Twinkle Light Tavern
Evelyn: Yesterday we almost got this area completely sealed. But the part of the magic circle that should activate the lights did not work. We are asking the sages for help. In the meantime we need to map and archive the changes we made to the leyline. So, how do we start? Normally Zoey goes to the area hall to get a registration code... I have never done that before. 😖 But StarTree said this can be soloed. Yes it can! Would you like StarTree to show you? Yes please. Ledia followed StarTree's guidance and obtained 1 of 2 official registration code.
Ledia: I feel spoiled to have such assistant. StarTree is a great guide. Wee~~! May I try doing the second one? Be my guest. Evelyn obtained 2 of 2 official registration code.
StarTree: Next, Sylvia would normally uses a template scroll, which StarTree can create! StarTree creates the scroll template.
Ledia: Now this part I am familiar. Yes. Protect. 😊 Evelyn casts Protect on the party.
Ledia: I open the scroll. 12 Demon Gnats are spawned.
Evelyn: I cast sleep. 8 of 12 Demon Gnats are now asleep.
Ledia: I attack the closest one to me.
Cardinal: Ledia approaches the first Demon Gnat that was awake. Their agility requires Careful and Quick strikes to hit without disturbing the slept Gnats. Which should be within my ability to do. Or should I say Aspect? Sounds like you are using FATE terms. I am experimenting with the terms. No change in mechanics yet. Ledia KO's the demon Gnat without trouble. 11 Gnats remain.
Evelyn: Can we reposition so we are not fighting among the slept ones? You may. But the Gnats do not seem very strong.
StarTree: StarTree attacks the moving one closest to Evelyn! StarTree's grasping vines sprouts forth from the ground Sneakily and KO's a Gnat. 10 remain. StarTree is not sneaky! How do you want to do it? StarTree saw that the Gnats would dodge, so StarTree summoned a lot more vines than necessarily! StarTree's Forceful and Flashy vines KO the second woke Gnat and also a third slept Gnat near Evelyn. 9 remain. Wee~~!
Zoey: OMG what did I miss? XD
Evelyn: We are playing Cardinal Quest with some FATE terms added. 😊 Can I shoot something? XD While Zoey is observing the situation, Ledia attacks the third moving Gnat.
Cardinal: As Ledia moved to the third Gnat, the fourth Gnat swooped in to attack her also. Ledia did not land a hit. Meanwhile I take careful aim.
Zoey: By the way, if the Gnat are asleep, are they on the ground or are they hovering?
Sasha: HAHAHAHAHA! Cardinal, ARP!!
Cardinal: As Zoey tried to take aim, she noticed that the slept Gnat are waking up as they hit the ground. All nine remaining Gnats are awake. 😖 Sorry for asking! XD
🏹
Zoey: I already took aim so I shoot one of the Gnats Ledia was fighting. Zoey KO's her target with a Careful shot. 8 Gnats remain.
Cardinal: The remaining 8 Gnats attack the four heroes at once. Two on each hero.
Ledia: Tiamat Chain Lightning.
Sasha: Cardinal, Invoke area aspect: Fort Arsenal Magic Dispel!! Fabulous. The partially functioning anti-attack magic barrier caught up to the fight and locked down Ledia's mana circuit. Ledia collapses. Ledia is OOM and KO'ed. We haven't played for so long I've forgotten the main aspect of Fort Arsenal. 😖 StarTree doesn't know what to do if she can't summon vines! The party's Protect effect has worn off from the Gnats' attacks.
🏹
Zoey: Barrage. XD
Cardinal: Zoey uses barrage at a disadvantage because the Gnats are scattered. But she managed to hit some. Zoey KO'ed 2 Gnats and took 1 damage. 6 Gnats remain.
Evelyn: Flare. Evelyn casts flare for help. Evelyn takes 1 damage while doing so.
🌼
StarTree: StarTree uses sweet flower! All six Gnats become fixated on StarTree's fruity fragrance. StarTree takes 1 damage while doing so.
Zoey: I wait for the gnats to gather at StarTree, then I will barrage again. 😅 Evelyn recasts Protect. The party gains Protect.
🥝
StarTree: StarTree feeds the Gnats! StarTree summons Fruit Basket. StarTree's Protect has worn off. StarTree takes 1 damage from the six attacking Gnats.
🏹
Zoey: Barrage. XD Zoey, roll 5 dice with advantage please. Zoey: D20x5 = {20,17,6,5,4}, {20,17,16,15,8} Zoey's Forceful barrage KO's 4 Gnats as they has just KO'ed StarTree. The remaining two Gnats flies to Zoey. 🏳️😭
Evelyn: I heal Zoey.
Cardinal: Zoey is healed to full health, which is 2. One of the Gnats now attacks Evelyn. Protect on Zoey and Evelyn wears off from the attacks.
Cardinal: Zoey, what do you do? I Hunter Mark the Gnat attacking me so I can dodge and run away without looking at it, while trying to take a shot at the one attacking Evelyn XD Roll one die with disadvantage please. D20 = {20}{5} Ouch XD The Gnat followed Zoey too closely. Zoey takes 1 damage and had no opportunity to make a shot.
Cardinal: Evelyn, what do you do? I ... 😅
✨
P4: Double clone sneak attack. Roll four times with advantage please. P4: D20x4={18,12,11,3}{18,12,11,2} P4's Sneak Attack KO's the Gnat attacking Evelyn and stunned the one chasing Zoey.
Zoey: I shoot that thing point blank XD
Cardinal: Zoey KO's the last Gnat. The trial is complete. Ledia and StarTree are revived to 1 hit point.
Ledia: Sorry team, I was way too excited and forgot everything.
Evelyn: I think we all did. 😅
StarTree: By the team effort, quest hour is reduced to 240 and the sealing date to July 16!
Ledia: StarTree, what are the next trials we can do? Owl Forest, Serpent Cave, Geyser! I think we should keep going tomorrow. Yes, let's play again. P4 please come too. 😊 💟 Ledia thanks everyone for the great party and looks forward to tomorrow.
